programme.title: Are You The One?: Are You The One? Special Delivery
programme.desc: Deltagerne i sesong en gjenforenes for den største hendelsen i Ethans og Ambers liv - en baby! Finn ut hvordan det har gått med deltagerne mens de tilbringer en vill helg sammen for å feire babyen med et AYTO-gavedryss.

programme.title: Are You The One?: One Too Many
programme.desc: Ti perfekt matchede gutter og jenter bli sjokkerte når de får vite at denne sesongen blir tøffere enn de trodde - ettersom det kommer en jente nummer 11. Paris og Pratt legger planer for å slippe sannhetsboksen.

programme.title: Are You The One?: The Truth Will Cost You
programme.desc: Laget blir spent når både Layton og Shelby havner i kjærlighetstriangler. Gutta graver opp ting om jentene i en konkurranse som kan sende den ellevte jenta til sannhetsbåsen.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Virgin Tears
programme.desc: Det gråtes når Shelby avslutter kjærlighetstriangelen sin. John prøver å nærme seg Christina, men blir stadig blokkert av Brandon, hennes ikke-match. Gjengen blir sjokkert når de hører at det er en jomfru blandt dem.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Loose Lips Sink Relationships
programme.desc: En tabbe begått i beruset tilstand kan splitte det sterkeste paret i huset. Anthony sjekker opp dama Layton er forelsket i, Jenni. John prøver seg endelig på Christina. Parseremonien snur oppned på huset.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Strap Those Boots Tight
programme.desc: Huset er sjokkert etter den siste parseremonien. Jenni mener at Layton er hennes rette, men frykter vreden til Jessica. For ett par kan sannhetsbåsen bringe enda mer hjertesorg.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Using only their eyesight, their noses and their taste buds, the four remaining chefs must re-create a dish without a recipe.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The chefs must create fusion dishes by mixing cuisines from two different countries, the winner has a dinner date with Chef Ramsay and their family while the losers participate in moving day.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The two finalists are taken to LA Market where the winner will work, and told to cook five dishes for a taste test.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: A new batch of contestants battle for a head chef position at Paris Las Vegas in Paradise, Nevada. They begin with a dramatic arrival.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: A challenge involving scallops earns the winning team a luxury yacht cruise while the losing team clean the kitchen; evening service is catastrophic and one team attempts to rig the elimination.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The men compete against the women in a challenge in which they serve classic American fare to special diners. The winning team takes a day trip.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Kamprop
programme.desc: Etter at en ung jente dør og andre barn blir alvorlig syke, drar Walker til cherokee-reservatet for å etterforske en fabrikk som dumper giftige kjemikalier i reservatets vannforsyning.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Vestens kodeks
programme.desc: Etter at en farlig innsatt rømmer fra fengselet han soner livstid i og begynner å drepe de involverte i saken, drar Walker og Trivette ut for å avslutte hans terrorvelde før han dreper Arthur McSpadden, dommeren i saken.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Halloween-barna
programme.desc: Det blir en skremmende Halloween for noen barn i Dallas som kidnappes og holdes som gisler av "Lucifer" og en gruppe djeveldyrkere.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Overlevelse
programme.desc: Da Alex blir kidnappet og holdt som gissel i Utah-fjellene under en camping-tur, må Walker finne sin elskede forlovede og redde henne før det er for sent.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: En ny sjanse
programme.desc: Som hevn for at en av deres egne har blitt skutt, følger IRA-terrorister Adam McGuire til Dallas, der de kidnapper hans syke datter i bytte mot at han snur den irske fredsavtalen han sto bak.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Paradis-stien
programme.desc: På Walkers bursdagsselskap gir CD ham en dagbok fra Hayes Coopers tidlige dager og leser historien om hvordan Cooper hindret tre desperadoer i å angripe mormonske nybyggere i Utah-fjellene på 1800-tallet.

programme.title: MTV Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek styrer serien, som inneholder klipp fra nettet, samt har kjendisgjester og medprogramledere som Sterling «Steelo», Madison Beer og danske Nina Agdal. Nye episoder hver onsdag.

programme.title: Punk'd (MTV) NO: Kevin Richardson (Backstreet Boys), Seth Greene
programme.desc: The Backstreet Boys' Kevin & Trishelle from Real World Las Vegas get caught in building security. Seth Green gets stung when Ashton's celeb craps game gets raided. Punk'd takes over a tattoo parlor.

programme.title: Punk'd (MTV) NO: Jessica Biel, Jessica Simpson, Nick Lachey
programme.desc: Charges are threatened on unsuspecting Jessica Biel when she agrees to watch a fan's kid, Jessica Simpson's long-lost relatives show up on her doorstep asking for money and customers are treated badly by valets when they come to pick up their cars.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Ryan O'Malley
programme.desc: Rob, Steelo og Chanel viser sinnssykt morsomme Redneck Good Times, Nutflix og Double Whammies. Ryan O'Malley, hoppestokkmester, viser frem sportens gode og dårlige sider, og du får se hvorfor du aldri bør snu ryggen til en lama!

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Johnny Knoxville
programme.desc: Johnny Knoxville hjelper Rob med å presentere Makeshift Ramps, Freak Beasts og Poorly Placed Kid, og du får vite hvorfor fugler aldri er dine venner, spesielt ikke om de har nebb lange nok til å nå hjernen din gjennom nesa!

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Big Black
programme.desc: Robs tidligere medspiller Big Black slutter seg til panelet og ser på Makeshift Thrill Rides, Bieber Hair og Coming in Hot. Se hvordan menneske-skorpioner stikker på en helt annen måte enn edderkoppen som angriper en uskyldig far.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Travis Pastrana
programme.desc: Motorsportsstjernen Travis Pastrana hjelper Rob med å presentere Poorly Placed Trees og Whiskey Throttles. Rob viser deg Pastranabees og Animals Being Human, og du får sjansen til å eksplodere av latter av Butt Bottle Rocket.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Farrah tilkaller politiet etter en heftig krangel med moren. Amber lurer på om hun er gravid, og dermed kan glemme å fullføre skolegangen. Maci saksøker Ryan for å få barnebidrag, og Catelynn må flytte ut av huset til kjæresten Tyler.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Catelynn risikerer å miste kjæresten, mens Ambers kjæreste sier at han kanskje vil forlate henne. Farrah balanserer college, ny jobb, og å bo alene med datteren. Maci innser at hun ikke kan bo sammen med både venner og babyen.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Movie
programme.desc: Phelps poses as the head of a Hollywood movie studio as part of the IMF plan to prevent a crime syndicate's takeover of the studio.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Hit
programme.desc: Phelps poses as a government investigator who must work through a crooked district attorney to prove that a crime syndicate boss killed his girlfriend.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Ultimatum
programme.desc: Phelps and Mimi take on the guises of fugitives to invade the home of Jerome Cooper, a nuclear scientist, who is threatening to destroy a major American city with a fifty-megaton hydrogen bomb.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Kidnap
programme.desc: Jim Phelps is kidnapped and held for ransom until Barney, Casey, and Willy can steal an incriminating letter from a safe deposit box and turn it over to crime syndicate boss Andrew Metzger.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Crack-Up
programme.desc: Jim Phelps poses as a master chess champion to trap a criminal with a near-genius mentality and his mysterious boss.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 506
programme.desc: En liten leiebolig i Vanløse og to små barn - ikke den beste kombinasjonen. Lisa og Erling drømmer om et stort hus med en stor hage. Tobias må jobbe hardt, da drømmene er mye større enn budsjettet.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark
programme.desc: Kristian drømmer om en diger garasje, og Nathja vil heller bli i Køge – kan Tobias oppfylle drømmene sine?

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark
programme.desc: Maja og Kenneth bor på Vestjylland og drømmer om å komme nærmere familien til Maja i Silkeborg. Men budsjettet deres krever at de går på akkord med beliggenheten og ser i de nærliggende små byene.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 603
programme.desc: I Ikast er Camilla og Marc sultne på et hus med plass til oppbevaring. Men når Tobias finner et stort hus til dem, mister de motet, da det nå er SÅ mange rom som må pusses opp...

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: North Denmark
programme.desc: North Jutland has a rich culinary history. The unique conditions have created equally unique products. Tareq meets local food entrepreneurs who have learned to adapt to this ever changing environment and putting this region on the culinary map.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Uppsala
programme.desc: Uppsala is the city of knowledge: home to the oldest university in Scandinavia. It’s a wonderful agricultural area surrounded by fertile flatlands. Tareq discovers the historical treasures of Uppsala and its thriving culinary life.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: North Sealand
programme.desc: North Zealand has been a playground of the rich and famous since the fifteenth century. Tareq learns how this beautiful north eastern part of Denmark is the perfect place to go foraging for wild berries and herbs.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Åre
programme.desc: Sweden’s largest ski resort Åre is well known for its local ingredients, boasting the highest number of organic food producers per capita in Sweden. The fresh water and clean air create unique conditions for growing excellent food.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: The Danish Lakelands
programme.desc: The Danish Lakelands produce some of the finest ingredients that you can find. Tareq has a go at an old cooking technique from New Zealand called Hangi - using heated rocks buried in a pit oven.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: West Sweden
programme.desc: Gothenburg on the west coast of Sweden has recently been discovered as an exciting destination by both international travel journalists and food bloggers. Tareq tracks down an old army barracks which has been converted into a world class cheese factory.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Luleå
programme.desc: Tareq visits Luleå, home to the beautiful Tree Hotel: a collection of treehouses built by an award winning architect. Following the river further up into the mountains he reaches the land where, for centuries, the Sami people kept their reindeer herds.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Halmstad
programme.desc: In Halmstad Tareq explores the contrast between the busy summer scene at the beach and the quiet rural country life, meeting Jörgen Persson: award winning table tennis player and visiting a village famous for its cheese.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Return Of The Mac
programme.desc: Nathan konfronterer Nathaniel, James sitter fast i en skotsk Sandwich og et sjokkerende tilbakekomst truer Chloe og Louis' gryende romanse.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Kiss Louis Goodbye
programme.desc: Louis satser alt, men Chloe har betenkeligheter. Marty skal gjenoppleve fortiden og en sjokkerende utkastelse splitter huset.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Just a Kiss?
programme.desc: Ant har dårlige nyheter til Louis. Chloe drar på date med en modell, og huset opplever sitt tøffeste dumping så langt.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: Marty og Chloe drar på dete. Louis kan ikke tie stille. Og det kommer en sjokkerende kunngjøring før den store utekvelden.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Out Out
programme.desc: Fire nye ankomster endrer alt. James har store planer for bursdagen til Roxy. Kommer Marty og Louis til å spolere den store utekvelden?

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Make Or Break
programme.desc: Marty slipper en bombe på Chloe, Ant presser Molly til bristepunktet og geordierne må fatte en tøff avgjørelse.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Control the Crazy
programme.desc: Sammi konfronterer Deena med hennes kjøttbolleutbrudd og de blir stående og stange. Mike og kompisene blir kjent med Paulas "ville" side, og Mike vet ikke helt om han kan takle det.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Make it Unofficial
programme.desc: Jenni planlegger en babyfest for Nicole og inviterer alle kameratene. Gutta støtter Mike som vil slå opp med Paula, og blir med ham for å oppleve øyeblikket fra første rad.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Shore Shower
programme.desc: MVP er tilbake og muliggjør en nær-trekantopplevelse for Vinny. Gjengen treffer på Angelina i en klubb. Jentene sliter med å holde babyfesten hemmelig for Nicole, og Vinny liker ikke tanken på seg selv og Jionni sammen på babyfesten.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Awkward!
programme.desc: Vinnie prater ut med Jionni og de ordner opp i flokene, så Vin og Nicole kan gjenoppta vennskapet om de vil. Samtidig innser Mike de feilene han har gjort og forsøker å få Nicoles tilgivelse.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Raining Men & Meatballs
programme.desc: Kjøttbollene tar over strandpromenaden og holder audition for å finne en midlertidig festkompis til Deena. Mike avslører at han var stripper før i tiden og romkameratene får ham til å vise sine kunster.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: The Icing on the Cake
programme.desc: Det er slutten på sommeren, og slutten på en lang reise for romkameratene når de forbereder seg på å ta et siste farvel med Seaside.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Temptation
programme.desc: A beautiful attorney seduces Catherine's boss, Joe Maxwell, creating a serious conflict of interest.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Promises of Someday
programme.desc: Catherine is disturbed when she begins to suspect the new attorney in her office is a fraud... and more disturbed when she finds him looking for the entrance to Vincent's world.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Down to a Sunless Sea
programme.desc: Catherine fails to heed Vincent's warnings about her dangerous former law-school beau.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Fever
programme.desc: After Mouse discovers a ship's gold and gemstones treasure buried beneath the city, Vincent's community is torn apart by greed and strife.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Everything is Everything
programme.desc: A Romani boy clears his father's name and regains the love and trust of his grandparents with Vincent and Catherine's help.

programme.title: JAG: Ares
programme.desc: Someone kills a Naval officer on Okinawa, then his ship encounters major trouble during war games at sea

programme.title: JAG: Skeleton Crew
programme.desc: The body of a woman Naval officer, a friend, and classmate of Harm, is found ashore.

programme.title: JAG: Trinity
programme.desc: Harm and his new partner, Marine Major Sara MacKenzie are drawn into a game of revenge when they're sent to Belfast, Ireland, to represent the legal interests of a Navy Lieutenant whose infant son has seemingly been abducted.

programme.title: JAG: Secrets
programme.desc: Admiral Chegwidden, Mac and Bud Roberts are taken hostage in the Admiral's office by Pvt. Magida, a Marine who escaped from a nearby Federal prison.

programme.title: JAG: Ghosts
programme.desc: Harm and Mac investigate an attempt on Admiral Chedwiggen's life and uncover the fact that all the members of his former SEAL team have died under mysterious circumstances.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Love Honor And Obey / Gladys And Agnes/ Radioactive Isaac
programme.desc: As widow tries to set up her spinster sister with an English lord, Isaac's overtures to a beautiful girl fall apart when his new tooth filling starts receiving strange transmissions.n may lead to divorce.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Isaac The Marriage Counselor / The Incredible Hunk/Jewels And Jim
programme.desc: The ship shudders when an entertainer hired by Julie turns out to be an exotic dancer and he doesn't want his secret revealed. Meanwhile, Isaac learns that a former passenger misunderstood his advice and divorced his wife.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Take A Letter Vicky / The Floating Bridge Game/ The Joy Of Celibacy
programme.desc: An emotionally cold woman finds herself falling for a Romeo with hot ideas. Meanwhile, a widow's romance with an attractive dentist is hindered by her nosy, card-playing companions (Rose Marie, Jan Clayton, and Lucille Benson).

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Viking's Son / Love Boat - Pride Of The Pacific/ Separate Vacations/ The Experiment - Part 2
programme.desc: An emotionally cold woman finds herself falling for a Romeo with hot ideas. Meanwhile, a widow's romance with an attractive dentist is hindered by her nosy, card-playing companions (Rose Marie, Jan Clayton, and Lucille Benson).

programme.title: The Love Boat: Good Neighbors / Captain's Portrait/ Familiar Faces
programme.desc: Capt. Stubing develops an unusual relationship with a lovely woman who is tasked with painting his portrait.

programme.title: Happy Days: Casanova Cunningham
programme.desc: When Richie is caught two-timing Lori Beth for a pretty baton twirler, the Fonz has to step in and give Richie a few lessons in love.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie Gets Framed
programme.desc: Richie and the Fonz visit a massage parlor to escape the pressures of a heated class presidency race, and Richie's opposition photographs the sheet-clad candidate with a pretty masseuse.

programme.title: Happy Days: Potsie Quits School
programme.desc: When troubles with his studies and an insulting professor cause Potsie to quit school, the Fonz comes up with an ingenious but offbeat plan to help his friend.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie'S Funeral (Part 1)
programme.desc: In Part I, Fonzie is called to make emergency mechanical repairs on a stalled hearse and inadvertently discovers thousands of dollars in counterfeit money hidden in the coffin.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie'S Funeral (Part 2)
programme.desc: In Part II, after Fonzie discovers thousands of dollars in counterfeit money in a hearse, the counterfeiters attempt to silence him.

programme.title: Happy Days: The Duel
programme.desc: The Fonz defends America's pride and saves Richie's hide when he matches blades with a French fencing champion, who not only insults the country, but makes nasty remarks about Joanie

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie Gets Shot
programme.desc: During a week-end at Potsie's uncle's hunting cabin, Fonzie is accidentally shot in the vicinity of his favorite jeans' back pocket.

programme.title: Happy Days: American Musical
programme.desc: Struggling to write a school essay on America's immigrant history, Chachi is inspired by Fonzie's colorful story told to the tune of an imagined melting pot melody.

programme.title: Happy Days: Grandma Nussbaum
programme.desc: Grandma Nussbaum teaches Fonzie and Chachi a lesson in growing old gracefully when they try to convince the feisty granny to move into a retirement home.

programme.title: MacGyver: Out In the Cold
programme.desc: While vacationing on the slopes, MacGyver and Pete Thornton become targets of a mob "hit" squad.

programme.title: MacGyver: Jack Is Back (Aka "Dalton, Jack of Spies")
programme.desc: MacGyver and his rapscallion buddy Jack Dalton are back together again this time they are up against a CIA agent gone bad and his cohorts, who are smuggling top-secret documents out of the country.

programme.title: MacGyver: Partners
programme.desc: MacGyver and Pete Thornton find themselves right back where they were seven years ago -- up against a top-level, world-class assassin whom they believed dead.

programme.title: MacGyver: Bushmaster
programme.desc: MacGyver is called on to rescue an American cargo pilot being held on espionage charges in Central America.

programme.title: MacGyver: Friends
programme.desc: MacGyver contemplates resigning from the Phoenix Foundation.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Ta frem bestikket! Fire fremmede konkurrerer om penger og tittelen som den ultimate vert for middagsselskapet, følg med for en spicy konkurranse.

programme.title: Matlock: The Singer
programme.desc: When a successful country music star is murdered, the promoter she fired – Steve Fisher – becomes the logical suspect.

programme.title: Matlock: The Juror
programme.desc: Matlock’s on jury duty, and the case against a man-about-town who stands to gain a fortune from his wife’s death seems airtight. Close examination of the evidence suggests otherwise to Ben.

programme.title: Matlock: The Fortune (Part 1)
programme.desc: When multi-millionaire Marvin Estes dies from an apparent suicide, leaving his fortune to supposed girlfriend Theresa LaValle, Matlock must find the missing beneficary.

programme.title: Matlock: The Fortune (Part 2)
programme.desc: When it’s discovered that a multimillionaire’s suicide is actually murder, Rick Stafford, the nephew recently cut out of his uncle’s will, is the #1 suspect. However, Matlock suspects other players in this high-stakes game of foul play

programme.title: Matlock: The Debt
programme.desc: Even though her former husband was a liar and a cheat, Leanne Matlock refuses to believe he was capable of murdering his philandering boss.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Steve becomes embroiled in political intrigue after the murder of a city councilman's wife appears to be part of a larger political strategy.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Mark investigates when her older lover, a new state Supreme Court Justice, murders a teenage girl.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A Malibu Hills fire is the backdrop for rising tensions between the residents; a disgraced stockbroker, a naturalist, a worried father, and a land developer. A worried Dr. Sloan deals with his own parental fears when Steve helps fight the fire.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Community General is already under increased security, with a high-profile criminal hospitalized, when an important businesswoman is brought in. Mark suspects her security guard has deadly intentions.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Jesse's new part-time job as a trainer of the pro basketball Mustangs turns deadly when he's accused of murdering a star player.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Følg med huseiere når de tar valget om å endre livsstilen sin og bytte ut bylivet med det rolige livet på landet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Old Mike vs. New Mike
programme.desc: Veien til El Paso tar en uventet vending når Mike blir møtt med et antall rykter og beskyldninger. Det blir et rent helvete da han formidler dem til gjengen.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: El Paso Pt. 1
programme.desc: Gjengen setter kursen mot til El Paso for å se Pauly snurre plater og delta i linedans. Det er kjærlighet ved første tygg da Mike spiser sin første Texas tacos, men alt annet enn det mellom Angelina og jentene.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: El Paso del 2
programme.desc: Festen fortsetter da DJ Pauly D legger beslag på El Paso og kjøttbollene en ugle. Men Angelinas FaceTime gjør at Mike tilter.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Kjøttbollene snakker til dyr Jenni forklarer en sak hun brenner for Og Angelinas treff med Snooki og Deena er kjempeforsinket.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Mike Vs. The World
programme.desc: Røret henter endelig inn Mike Først i et legendarisk oppgjør med Angelina og så en følelsesmessig konfrontasjon med Jenni.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Koichi Tabata, a wandering chef who has worked in over 200 restaurants in Japan, challenges Iron Chef Chen in the battle of eggplant.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chef Michiba is challenged to a battle of tuna by Takasehi Mera who uses the longest knife in Japan.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Tadaaki Shimizu, the first-ever Japanese sous-chef of the famous Tour d'Argent, challenges Iron Chef Sakai in the battle of homard.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: It's a team matchup between the Iron Chefs Mihciba and Chen and two of Paul Bocuse's favorite apprentices, Joel Bruant and Masashi Furutaka, in this battle of sea bass.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chef Sakai takes on Mitsuru Saito in an all-out battle of beef.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Kandagawa, Iron Chefs' nemesis, sends out his lethal weapon Yasuhiko Yoshida to challenge Iron Chef Michiba in a wriggling battle of eel.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' fyrer Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood av noen 'Skliskudd', starter hårete branner 'I fyr og flamme' og krangler om rot i 'Snuskete kjærlighet'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood tak i en partner og nyter 'Parskøyting', gjør seg klar til en underholdende kveld i 'Brettspillmiserer' og opplever hvor tøft det er å dele rom med 'Pottesure papegøyer'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' finner Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ut hvilken terrengbåt de helst velger i 'Landjakk', ser på alle måtene barn kan sette seg fast i 'Smårollingfeller' og avslutter med distre folk som er 'Uten romforståelse'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood i gang kjøretøyene sine i 'Flyktende motorer', vender det andre kinnet til i 'Overraskelseskyss' og hogger i vei med litt 'Økseanarki'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood L
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' blir Rob, Steelo og deres spesielle gjest Lolo Wood, redd for å få sprøyter i 'Stikkpanikk', får igjen verbalt i 'Ta igjen-attakk' og føler hele dekkmønsteret når de blir 'Overkjørt'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppdager Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood at uhell elsker selskap i 'Du blir med meg', strever med vekter i 'Verstinger med vekstang' og møter noen fryktelig glade papper i 'Overentusiastiske fedre'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' smasher Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood handlevogner med 'Vognkrasjere', deler luftyogaens felles smerte med 'Dinglende duoer' og blir banket opp av gårdsdyr i 'Buskapssmell'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' faller Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood lett i 'Henfallen til fall', forbauser aper voldsomt med 'Apemagi' og har problemer med å finne tingene sine i 'Borte, men funnet'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LIV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' kan ikke Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood løpe fra den morsomme snublingen i 'Fluktfall', viser fram imponerende bisker i 'Hermehunder' og snakker varmt for bruken av solide hodeplagg i 'Skudd fra oven'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' finner Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ut hvor stor skade en strippepåle kan forårsake i «Pål-lateral skade', oppdager at ikke alle liker å bli skremt i 'Skremtraseri' før de avslutter med noen 'Forlatte farer'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' slår Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ut fra tee i 'Sving-ding', krasjer med 'Små landingsmatter' og blir offer for noen 'Byfeller'.

programme.title: Andromeda: Bunker Hill
programme.desc: Dylan og hans nye Commonwealth-flåte tar på seg Drago-Kazov-flåten, men synes den er mye større enn forventet.

programme.title: Andromeda: Ouroboros
programme.desc: Magog-eggene i Harper begynner å klekkes, så teamet bygger en Tesseract-maskin

programme.title: Andromeda: Lava og raketter
programme.desc: Dylan overtar en turistpram i et forsøk på å unnslippe leiesoldater.

programme.title: Andromeda: Vær alle mine synder husket
programme.desc: En kroppsidentifikasjon går galt når det viser seg at Bekas tidligere mannskap ikke er død.

programme.title: Andromeda: Mayflies dans
programme.desc: Andromeda redder døende mennesker fra en drift, men de blir snart til zombier som blir kontrollert av en bikube.

programme.title: Andromeda: I himmelen er nå tre
programme.desc: Motoren til skapelsen er i stand til å omskrive universet i henhold til eierens ønsker. Dylan, Beka og Trance må skaffe det før noen med mørke planer får det.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Blood
programme.desc: In rural Canada, Dr. John Schneeberger is accused of sedating and sexually assaulting one of his female patients and his step daughter. DNA tests demonstrate that the doctor is innocent, but the patient insists that he sedated and raped her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pure Evil
programme.desc: In the search for the killer of two Texas teenagers, a behavioral profile led to suspect Jason Massey. Hard science proved the profile was correct, and Massey was executed by lethal injection on April 3, 2001.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Punch Line
programme.desc: In 1994, Rhoda Nathan was found murdered in a Cincinnati hotel room. When hotel employee Elwood Jones visited the emergency room with an infected hand, which he said was cut on a dumpster, the doctor recognized the injury as something else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sibling Rivalry
programme.desc: In 1991, San Francisco pornographer Artie Mitchell was murdered in his home. His brother and business partner, who was found near the scene carrying a rifle, later confesses to shooting Artie.The question is whether the shooting was premeditated.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bagging a Killer
programme.desc: In 1999, 9-year-old Valiree Jackson vanished on her way to school near Spokane. Her father, Brad Jackson, reported the disappearance and the entire community started searching for her abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Alibi
programme.desc: In 1991, a high school girl vanished after attending a party. The prime suspect had two alibi witnesses for the night she disappeared. A solid alibi can often overcome circumstantial evidence, but forensic evidence is another matter.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Purr-fect Match
programme.desc: When police discovered the body of Douglas Beamish's estranged wife, authorities linked 20 cat hairs found on her jacket to a cat owned by Beamish's parents. It was the first time animal DNA was used to solve a criminal case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bio-Attack
programme.desc: When more than 700 Oregonians contracted food poisoning from a unique strain of salmonella in 1984, investigators uncovered a secret plot to influence local elections.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: Two sets of scientists probe a woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Prayer
programme.desc: In 1995, the founder of American Atheists disappeared with one of her sons, her granddaughter and $500,000 in gold coins. The police investigated several suspects, including David R. Waters, who worked for American Atheists.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 23
programme.desc: This episode includes: Motorcycle Mom & UD, Update: Ready Teller Robbery, White Bird, Strychnine Death and Missing Mariners.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 24
programme.desc: This episode includes: Victorio's Gold Pts. 1 & 2, Where's Kari? & UD and Hot Jock.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode: 1
programme.desc: This episode includes: Update: Molester Cop, Thanks Lieutenant Stevens and Roswell Pts. 1 & 2.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode: 2
programme.desc: This episode includes: Realtor Murder, Miracle Cross, Update: Robbinghood and Nudist Fraud.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode: 3
programme.desc: This episode includes: Kay Hall & UD, Update: Thanks Lieutenant Stevens, Coin Scam, Marth's Kennel, Sarah Joe and Baltimore Babynapping.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode: 4
programme.desc: This episode includes: Bad Chief, Locust Grove, Update: Pizza Man and Perpetual Partners.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hidden Agenda
programme.desc: Across the Midwest, a band of armed robbers struck banks at the rate of nearly one per month. They attacked with lightning precision and lethal force. They were in and out in five minutes.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Dixie Mafia
programme.desc: On Mississippi's Gulf Coast, a Judge and his politician wife are murdered in their home. The killer left few clues. It looked like a professional hit, and the investigation led nowhere. But the FBI refused to give up.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Radical Agenda
programme.desc: In the 1970's a string of bank robberies and bombings spread fear and destruction along the east coast. The FBI faced a new breed of criminal, the domestic terrorist.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hunter's Game
programme.desc: In the 1970s and 80s, people went to Alaska looking for a fresh start, to reinvent themselves, or to disappear for a while. Some of those disappearances weren't by choice.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Silent Strike
programme.desc: Money may not be the root of all evil, but for some men, a million dollars is enough to justify murder. Even men sworn to uphold the law can sometimes be tempted.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Camera Clues
programme.desc: Forensic Photography: Forensic photographers are among the first people at a crime scene, capturing vital clues on film. What do the cameras capture that can't be seen first-hand, and who are the men and women who analyze the camera's clues?

programme.title: The New Detectives: Tainted Trust
programme.desc: Poison is the subtlest form of death, and investigators must see through unusual circumstances to bring these murders to light.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Family Plots
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When murder becomes a family affair, investigators must turn to forensics to uncover family plots.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Murderous Attraction
programme.desc: In Columbus, Ohio, a woman is found shot in the head. The death is ruled a suicide, but something is not right and detectives refuse to let the matter rest.

programme.title: The New Detectives: For Love Or Money
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When money is the motive, murder can rip at the very foundation of marriage and family.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Hack Green Secret Nuclear Bunker
programme.desc: The Hack Green Secret Nuclear Bunker is a former government-owned nuclear bunker located at Hack Green, Cheshire, England. It Started as a decoy site for enemy bombers but later developed into a legitimate base. Now it is ripe with hauntings.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Tutbury Castle
programme.desc: The team head to Tutbury Castle in Derbyshire to investigate the paranormal reports at the location. Past Hunters appear to have caught the Tutbury Ghost on camera.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: Haunted and Cursed Magpie Mines
programme.desc: Haunted Magpie Mines are located in the Peak District of Derbyshire. Believed to be one of the most paranormal mines in the UK. Will a ghost be caught on camera? and will any of the paranormal equipment make contact with the spirit world?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Lost Souls Of The Tivoli Venue
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension Team travels to North Wales and the Tivoli Theatre in Flint for a night of haunting entertainment.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Strange Things at Owd Betts
programme.desc: Sean heads to Rochdale and investigates strange paranormal reports at Owd Betts. Something spooky lurks in the basement and it seems Sean is not alone as he investigates the main bar.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Carnfield Hall
programme.desc: Carnfield Hall is a country house dating from the 15th and 16th Centuries. This private residence turn event hall is using its paranormal activity to draw in business. Are these spirits the old residents?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I’m Not the Man You Think I Am
programme.desc: Sean says his wife has made him so angry that he’s put her in the hospital over 10 times. Sean’s also got a secret of his own — he is really a she! Can Steve help Sean iron out his issues?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Real Teens: Real Topics
programme.desc: Steve’s hosting another teen girl town hall to address critical issues all teen girls could face, including drug use, physical abuse, and online predators. No question is off limits!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Rescues a Runaway
programme.desc: Sherry was attacked at 15 and ran away from home. She wants Steve’s help with reuniting her with her mother. Then, Dawn's teenage daughter Cathy recently gave birth, but lives in fear of the baby’s unemployed and unstable father Nick.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Look What You Did to Your Baby
programme.desc: Kristy wants her baby back from her mother Donna! Donna claims she took the baby away because he was born with severe disabilities due to Kristy’s drug use during pregnancy. Who’s the liar?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Teen Mom Murderer?
programme.desc: At 17, Janelle's infant son died from serious injuries. She was sentenced to 3 years in prison for reckless homicide, but claims she's innocent. What will her polygraph results say?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: A Shocking Betrayal
programme.desc: Korey is positive that his girlfriend Dominique is cheating on him and is also worried that she might be selling sex. She says that his suspicions have caused him to become abusive. Then, Gregory thinks that his girlfriend Robin isn’t faithful!

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Uninvited Guest
programme.desc: A soldier is stabbed to death at a drive-thru. Kenda’s only clue is that this is somehow tied to a breakdancing competition.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Who Took Heather?
programme.desc: A 13-year-old girl is missing, sending Kenda’s city into a panic. A cryptic letter to the District Attorney’s office suggests the girl isn’t the only victim.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bad Blood
programme.desc: A army vet is found bleeding to death on the asphalt of a parking lot -- his chest littered with too many knife wounds to count. Kenda’s case is stuck in first gear until a gruesome clue appears.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The End
programme.desc: Kenda faces his most difficult case yet – the slaying of a young boy. The detective makes the most consequential decision of his career.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: When the Music Stops
programme.desc: Vietnam War veteran Charles Walker is found unconscious, after a stabbing attack so savage even 45 units of blood couldn’t save his life.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Monster Awakes
programme.desc: When Julie Smith reports being sexually assaulted, Lt. Joe Kenda and his Sex Crimes Unit discover a terrifying similarity to other attacks on the east side of town.

programme.title: Mind Investigators: Deadly Revenge
programme.desc: On September 2nd 2015, the body of 2 years-old Méline is found in her home. Her father confesses to the murder.

programme.title: Nurses Who Kill NO: Malcolm Webster
programme.desc: Nurse Malcolm Webster was convicted for the murder of his first wife, Claire Morris. For 17 years it was believed to be an accident; until he staged another 'road accident' in New Zealand, involving his second wife, Felicity Drumm.

programme.title: Nurses Who Kill NO: Vickie Dawn Jackson
programme.desc: Vickie Dawn Jackson was described as sweet and 'gone to fat' by locals in her small Texas town. Why did Vickie kill off the friends and relatives of those whom she knew in Nocona, Texas?

programme.title: Nurses Who Kill NO: Jeannie Miata
programme.desc: Jeannie Miata was a nurse who killed a woman with a lethal dose of insulin. Experts analyse the actions and motive of this disturbing murderer.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Dr. G must figure out if a man died as a result of his infected stab wound or if his history of drug abuse was the culprit.

programme.title: The Haunting Of. . .: Barry Bostwick
programme.desc: Barry and Kim come face to face with the spirit activity that haunts the home forcing Barry to resolve the personal issues that continue to haunt him to this day.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Rise of the Fourth Reich (Nazi's in America)
programme.desc: The Allies defeated the Axis Powers on the battlefield, but did they actually win the war? Richard interviews several alternative historians who say that while the German Army may have surrendered in 1945, the Nazi's never officially did.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Did Elvis Fake His Death?
programme.desc: A serious investigation of the long-held theory that Elvis Presley faked his death in August 1977. Jokes of Elvis sightings in Kalamazoo aside, there is a considerable volume of evidence to suggest Elvis may not have left the building

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Manchurian Candidates
programme.desc: Several prominent researchers in the field provide a short history of Mind Control experimentation beginning with the Nazis through to the CIA's infamous MK Ultra program.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Framing of Sirhan, Sirhan
programme.desc: Was Presidential hopeful, Robert F. Kennedy really killed by disgruntled Palestinian Sirhan Sirhan as we’ve been led to believe? Or was he another in a long line of Manchurian candidates, a victim of a long standing mind control program.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Past Life Regression Pt. 2
programme.desc: Richard witnesses a municipal employee in Toronto, Canada undergo a regression during which he re-experiences a previous life as a doctor in early 20 century England.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Bible Codes
programme.desc: Does the Bible contain hidden messages encoded within certain passages of the Old Testament? Is the prophetic nature of these 'codes' proof the Bible's author is of supernatural or extraterrestrial origin?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Journey to the Center of the Earth
programme.desc: Richard interviews the expedition organizer who is planning on leading a team of scientists, filmmakers and tourists to the Arctic aboard a Russian nuclear ice-breaker in search of an entrance into the interior of our world.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard meets members of the 9/11 Truth movement who challenge the official version of events concerning the attack on the U.S. Pentagon. Researchers present evidence to suggest the attack was perpetrated by some rogue element inside the U.S. government.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Razor Ruddock's Home
programme.desc: We visit the home of Soccer legend Neil "Razor" Ruddock which seems to be haunted. Is it his home specifically? Or are these ghosts attached to him?

programme.title: Mutant X: Wasteland
programme.desc: Jesse blir tvunget til å komme i kontakt med sin tidligere forlovede når Mutant X-teamet får vite at selskapet hennes er involvert i genetisk manipulering av avlinger.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Light of Truth
programme.desc: Arabia 843 e.Kr.: En sjeik bruker sannhetens lys for å avsløre sin general som en forræder. 2001: Prince Shareem dropper fra Sydneys klasse for å søke etter sannhetens lys.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Treasure Island
programme.desc: Sydney er på jakt etter en pirats bytte, men vil en forræder tvinge henne til å gå på planken?

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Women Want to Know
programme.desc: Sydney har funnet et tempel med et afgud av Ganesha, og det blir filmet for TV, men de blir fanget inne når de lokale opprørerne snubler over dem. Kan Nigel og Karen hjelpe fra USA?

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Star of Nadir
programme.desc: En anonym sultans kone Danielle dør under mystiske omstendigheter i ørkenen. Hun hadde imidlertid bedt Sydney om å hjelpe. Sydney mener Danielle lette etter stjernen til Nadir.

programme.title: Andromeda: Og ditt hjerte vil fly bort
programme.desc: Når en forlengst mistet kjærlighet kommer tilbake, forsvinner Tyr fra skipet for å beskytte henne mot en snikmorder.

programme.desc: Newsmagazine with features focusing on people, and events in the news and behind the headlines.

programme.title: Face the Nation
programme.desc: Margaret Brennan hosts news interviews with distinguished national and foreign figures, offering insight and analysis on the top issues of the day.

programme.title: On the Case: A Mystery on Cherry Hill
programme.desc: When a beautiful young woman vanishes without a trace, it may take another tragedy before police will be able to solve the mystery of her disappearance.

programme.title: On the Case: A Killer in Town
programme.desc: Paula Zahn examines how police raced to track down a vicious killer on his deadly cross-country journey.

programme.title: On the Case: Greed, Lies and Murder
programme.desc: Fifty-year-old mother of three Marilou Johnson disappears from the home of her boyfriend, Roger Blanchard, a wealthy retired businessman, then it becomes clear Johnson has met with foul play.

programme.title: On the Case: Vanished in the Night
programme.desc: When 20 year old Lynsie Ekelund suddenly goes missing in the dead of night, it leaves her mother scrambling for answers.

programme.title: On the Case: Courage and Conviction
programme.desc: A college student's battle for survival may be the key to solving a double homicide from years earlier.

programme.title: On the Case: Darkness in The Desert
programme.desc: Paula Zahn investigates the story of a Las Vegas starlet who mysteriously vanished during a visit to a local spy store.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: The River Lift
programme.desc: A vital ferry link is down, so Buffalo mounts an all-out campaign to airlift 100,000lbs of essential goods across the Mackenzie River.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Don't Muck with Chuck
programme.desc: Crusty mechanic Chuck leads the scramble to ready the Electra for a disaster relief mission in Haiti, but fate's curveball sends them to the High Arctic instead.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: The Finish Line
programme.desc: A multi-stop mission to the Far North has Devan, Scott and Adam facing a series of white- knuckle obstacles.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Ski Plane
programme.desc: Young pilots AJ and Andrew get the chance of a lifetime to fly the magnificent DC-3 specially equipped with skis to land on frozen strips.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Buffalo Scores
programme.desc: Buffalo scores the charter of a lifetime when they're asked to transport the Stanley Cup on a tour of the North. Cup fever spreads quickly around Buffalo, and for Mikey, what begins as an innocent love for this hockey icon soon becomes an obsession.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Special Delivery
programme.desc: Chief Pilot Arnie lands the DC-3 on a homemade sand strip at a remote lodge. Electra expert Chuck goes one-on-one with a stubborn power unit, and Rod's wife Sasha goes into labour with the newest member of the McBryan family.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Ralph Macchio, Drew's News with Dennis Rodman
programme.desc: Ralph Macchio opens up to Drew about his new memoir, "Waxing On: The Karate Kid and Me." Plus, Dennis Rodman joins Drew and Ross Mathews at thew news desk to help serve the news sunny-side up!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Cooking with Molly Yeh, Drew's News
programme.desc: Plus, in an all-new Cookbook Club Molly Yeh joins Drew in the kitchen to whip up a yummy and comforting dish from her new cookbook, "Home is Where the Eggs Are."

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Martha Stewart, Drew's News with Phil Rosenthal
programme.desc: Martha Stewart stops by to whip up brioche and apple bread pudding, dishes on her thirst traps, the one person she's desperate to meet and shares why she has decided to open-up her Bedford home and gardens in her new shows.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Relationship Red Flags with Martha Stewart, Drew's News with Josh Wolf, Drew Gooder
programme.desc: Icon Martha Stewart and Drew tackle relationship red flags at the news desk and Martha reveals which young star she simply adores.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Brooke Shields, Drew's News with Brooke Shields
programme.desc: Drew, Ross Mathews & Brooke Shields report a 60yo joining a pop punk band & the new hickey trend. Later, Drew & Brooke cook brown butter bowtie pasta.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew's News with Carla Hall, Corn Kid Tariq
programme.desc: Carla Hall joins Drew and Ross Mathews for food news, covering an avocado ripeness detector and TikTok restaurant reviews. Carla makes frittata with Drew, while Lindsay Peers and Tariq join for a Thanksgiving craft at "The Craft Studio."

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Chris Freimuth, Drew's News
programme.desc: Horticulturist Christopher Freimuth shares holiday decor tips. Drew & Ross report on E.T. auction & benefits of being in the rain. James Warren talks about building benches at local bus stops.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Queen Latifah, Chris Appleton, Mikel Welch, Drew's News
programme.desc: Queen Latifah shares behind-the-scenes stories. Chris Appleton does music teacher's hair. Drew's News w/ Ross Mathews & Mikel Welch. TikToker Sarah T. shows hack for lamp cords.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Jessica Biel, Drew's News with Derek Blasberg
programme.desc: Jessica Biel tells Drew about dog sledding and plays "The Real Biel" trivia. Derek Blasberg joins Drew and Ross to cover news, including Dolly Parton's award and throwback fashion.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Fat Joe,Drew's News with Natasha Leggero
programme.desc: Fat Joe talks about his memoir, "The Book of Jose," with Drew. Natasha Leggero covers news with Drew and Ross, discussing memory after childbirth and "sitter-vising." Fat Joe and Leo Kelly make caterpillars from old socks.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: David Duchovny, Drew's News with Kirby Howell-Baptiste
programme.desc: David Duchovny talks about his career and upcoming rom-com with Drew. Kirby Howell-Baptiste joins Drew and Ross for Drew's News, discussing dating and British foods.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Dark Side of Paradise
programme.desc: A report about Don North, a free spirit who took to the waters of the Caribbean, living among the tight-knit "cruiser community", a group of individuals who choose to live their lives on the water.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Letter
programme.desc: In 1998, police in Pleasant Prairie, Wisconsin were called to the home of Mark and Julie Jensen. Mark said he had found his wife dead in her bed. But a letter written by Julie before her death expressed her suspicion that Mark might kill her.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Janet's Secret
programme.desc: A report on the murder of Janet Walsh and the 34-year search to find her killer, as new forensics technology allows detectives to re-examine evidence left from the initial investigation into the death of the Monaca, Pennsylvania woman in 1979.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Live to Tell: The Vendetta
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Case Against Brooke Skylar Richardson
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours: FindJodi!
programme.desc: A report on new information in the search for Iowa television anchor Jodi Huisentruit, who disappeared on her way to work on June 27, 1995.

programme.title: Cops: Hit and Run
programme.desc: The threat of a tasing is enough to slow a fleeing suspect, a heated argument between girlfriends leads to vehicular assault, and a man with weed in his car has no poker face.

programme.title: Cops: Be Careful What You Ask For
programme.desc: An unstable man in a standoff with officers begs to be shot, a drunk woman is accused of beating her spouse, and unwanted guests occupy the garage of an out-of-town homeowner.

programme.title: Cops: Cats and Dogs
programme.desc: A trespassing man uses his dog as a shield when police arrive at the scene, a stolen tablet leads to a bloody altercation, and kittens run wild in a Florida neighborhood.

programme.title: Cops: Sittin' in the Dark
programme.desc: A suspect seen fleeing a vehicle refuses to admit he was ever in said vehicle, and police respond to a call that shots were fired.

programme.title: Cops: The Blame Game
programme.desc: An arrested man has a long list of instructions for his "bae," and a driver charged with heroin possession claims he was framed by the passenger in his backseat.

programme.title: Cops: Brotherly Love
programme.desc: A recently released convict leads police on a high-speed chase in a stolen vehicle, and officers respond to a report of a man pulling a knife on his brother.

programme.title: Cops: That's My Grill
programme.desc: A son fights his mom and responding officers, a man tells police the wad of weed in his mouth is not his, and a pack of cigarillos is the root of a domestic dispute.

programme.title: Cops: Drive and Dash
programme.desc: After deputies pursue a car-theft suspect to his home, he tries to convince them he has been there all along, and a man violates a protection order to try to reconcile with his wife.

programme.title: Cops: Thick as Thieves
programme.desc: Carjacking victims flag down officers whom then locate, pursue and acquire the stolen vehicle, and a man admits to officers the car he's driving is stolen.

programme.title: Cops: Pinky Promise
programme.desc: An officer finds a woman asleep at the wheel in the middle of a highway, deputies investigate a possible kidnapping, and a nervous driver just wants to be honest with police.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: A Very Strange Suicide (Muller case)
programme.desc: Police in Strasbourg receive a startling emergency call from Doctor Jean-Louis Muller, a forensic pathologist well known in the region.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Christophe Lejard Case
programme.desc: The lifeless body of Christophe Lejard is found by his son just metres from their home. The man was shot in the head as he was getting into his car to go to work. An execution, which at first glance doesn't square with the profile of a quiet family man.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: Deathly Fatal Passion At the Hotel (Villermet case)
programme.desc: The body of Nathalie Villermet, 46, manager of a small hotel and -restaurant, is found by a walker in the woods outside Paris, hidden under branches.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Little Martyrship of A10: The Inass Touloub Affair
programme.desc: On August 11, 1987, the Orléans police discover the bruised corpse of a 4-year-old child behind a guardrail on the A10 motorway.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Céline Marchand Case
programme.desc: On May 30th 2015 in Sorinières, Yann Machand reports his wife Céline Marchand missing.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: En ung mann blir funnet død på et jorde utenfor Enköping. Ved første øyekast ser det ut som om han har lagt seg ned for å hvile - men når politiet undersøker liket, oppdager de noe som antas å være et skuddsår.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 506
programme.desc: 26. januar 2001 ble Benjamin Hermansen knivstukket til døde som følge av sin hudfarge. Drapet fikk hele landet til å delta i antirasistiske markeringer og protester.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: En familie som rammes av en husbrann klarer å unnslippe flammene, men alt de eier har blitt til aske. Det som først ser ut til å være en ulykke, viser seg å være mye mer komplisert.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 105
programme.desc: Tina Jørgensen forsvant etter en kveld på byen i Stavanger. En måned senere finner politiet liket av en 20 år gammel kvinne. Hvem kan ha tatt livet av Tina og deretter dumpet henne langs en øde veistrekning?

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 301
programme.desc: Justisminister Tor Mikkel Wara blir i 2018 utsatt for en rekke alvorlige angrep på sitt private hjem. I flere måneder står politiet uten spor, helt til det kommer et sjokkerende gjennombrudd i saken.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 404
programme.desc: I desember 2015 gjør gallerist Reidar Osen et ærend med varebilen sin da han blir kapret av ukjente gjerningsmenn, som truer ham på livet og krever to millioner kroner. Hvem står bak kidnappingen?

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Beacon/One Life, Furnished in Early Poverty
programme.desc: Physician stranded in wary village/Gus Rosenthal revisits past, meets younger self. Guiding him, Gus realizes mistakes.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Night of the Meek/But Can She Type?/The Star
programme.desc: Store Santa redefines Christmas for owner/Secretary finds alternate universe revering her job/Starship discovers Bethlehem's star and ancient civilization's remains.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: People Are Alike All Over
programme.desc: When a space exploration crashes on Mars, the surviving passenger is surprised to find that Martians are human-looking, very friendly and apparently just like us...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Execution
programme.desc: Just before being hanged for shooting a man in the back, a man in 1880 is transported into the year 1959 by a professor who soon realizes that he has brought forward a savage killer.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Big Tall Wish
programme.desc: An over-the-hill boxer gets a boost from one of his biggest fans - a little boy with an unwavering belief in magic.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Nice Place to Visit
programme.desc: After being shot to death, Rocky Valentine encounters the amiable white-haired Mr. Pip, who gives Rocky everything he wishes for.

programme.desc: Dan finds mystic photos in antique camera/Irishman's leprechaun tales turn real/Critic's end foretold by fortune cookies.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: More than 50 years after its construction, the Golden Gate remains one of the world's great engineering marvels. It took 25-million man-hours and 80,000 miles of cable to complete; the cost in human life proved even greater.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Built of stone and glass, persistence and prayer, gothic cathedrals are an epiphany of imagination and an articulation of joy; featured are such masterpieces as Chartres, Notre Dame and the National Cathedral in Washington D.C.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Cutting, digging, picking, stripping, shaking, and raking--whatever the crop, there's a custom machine to harvest it; it all began with handpicking and today it's often one man and one machine harvesting hundreds of acres in a single day.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: America's orchards and farms balance hand labor with mechanization through efficient harvesting methods; explore orchard management, California's largest fruit packing house, Nebraska corn fields, Wisconsin cranberry marshes, and more.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Heavy metals occupy select periodic table portions and are essential to America's economic and military might, stored in National Defense Stockpile; vital metals include copper, uranium, lead, zinc, nickel, and corrosion-resistant superalloys.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Take a peek into one of today's fully-automated homes that is so smart, the owner can operate everything from the home theater to the outdoor waterfall at a push of one button.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: Nazis Outfought
programme.desc: By 1944, Hitler's image as a victorious leader is crumbling. He faces a bomb plot led by Stauffenberg and Tresckow, intending to kill him and overthrow the regime. Hitler survives the bombing, triggering a brutal reprisal against conspirators.

programme.title: Secret War: The French Triple Agent
programme.desc: Operation Cockade, led by MI6's double agent Henri Dericourt in 1943, aimed to deceive Germans with sabotage. Despite efforts, Germans withdrew divisions unconvinced. Dericourt faced a post-war treason trial and died in a mysterious 1962 plane crash.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Host Wil Willis tests the Garand against the Arisaka Type 99, showcasing its impact in WWII and sniper rifles' deadly precision, from Carlos Hathcock to Craig Harrison. Witness the historic rifles that shaped warfare!

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: In Power
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler's secret agenda is to rid Germany of Jews. By 1938, after creating work schemes and rearming, he orchestrates "The Night of Broken Glass," burning 1,000 synagogues and killing 91 Jews, preparing for further aggression.

programme.title: Battle Of Dunkirk
programme.desc: I et kappløp med tiden krysset over åtte hundre private båter Den engelske kanal for å redde de havarerte soldatene fra infernoet på strendene ved Dunkerque. Se de enkelte veteranenes ekstraordinære heltemot i et slag som endret andre verdenskrigs forløp.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: iCarly: Restauranten
programme.desc: Gibby åpner en hemmelig restaurant i skolens kjeller med Sams hjelp. Og Spencer designer en sikkerhetsrobot til hjemmebruk, som plutselig mister fokus helt.

programme.title: iCarly: Aprilsnarr
programme.desc: I dette spesielle aprilsnarr-avsnittet blir Carly og Spencer satt på gaten, så gjengen sitter og tenker tilbake på sin tid i Bushwell Plaza. Men minnene deres stemmer kanskje ikke alltid helt med hvordan vi husker hendelsene.

programme.title: iCarly: Dårlig stemning i butikken
programme.desc: Freddies nye drømmejobb i Pear Store blir et mareritt når Sam også blir ansatt. Imens prøver Carly å bli inviteret ut av en fra Pear Store, og Spencer må melde seg til frivillig jobb på den lokale brannstasjonen.

programme.title: iCarly: Halloween
programme.desc: iCarly-gjengen holder en "Halfoween"-fest, for de syns at det skal være Halloween to ganger i året. Men da en forkledd gjest spiller Carly og vennene et puss, blir festen litt for vill.

programme.title: iCarly: Chucks lillebror
programme.desc: Et sinna barn ønsker inderlig å hevne seg, men målskiven Spencer prøver iherdig å stoppe ham. Gibby blir knust når hans nye lekelaserpistol går i stykker, men blir fra seg av henrykkelse når Freddies reparsjion gir den overraskende krefter.

programme.title: iCarly: Utestengt
programme.desc: Når Carly bannlyser T-Bo fra hennes og Spencers hjem, hevner han seg ved å ikke slippe Carly inn på Groovy Smoothie. Imens oppdager Freddie og Gibby at det fins mange fordeler ved å spille i band...og også et par ulemper.

programme.title: iCarly: Turen til Las Vegas
programme.desc: Når Sam får vite at moren hennes er i fengsel i Vegas, bestemmer gjengen seg for å ta sine mest verdifulle eiendeler, kjøre til Vegas og pantsette dem - så de får nok penger til å betale borgen for henne. Gjesteartister: History Channels PAWN STARS.

programme.title: iCarly: Nattsynbrillene
programme.desc: Sams venn kommer ut av ungdomsfengselet, og Sam advarer alle om å holde seg unna, men Carly hører ikke etter og havner på dypt vann. Hjemme i leiligheten finner Spencer noen nattsynbriller.

programme.title: iCarly: Verden er rystet del 1
programme.desc: Jimmy Fallon inviterer iCarly-gjengen til å opptre live i programmet sitt i New York. De elsker New York og er kjempeglade for å være med i programmet, men alt kan skje på live tv.

programme.title: iCarly: Verden er rystet del 2
programme.desc: Jimmy Fallon inviterer iCarly-gjengen til å opptre live i programmet sitt i New York, men en stor klesmiss fra Gibby betyr store problemer for nettshowets fremtid.

programme.title: iCarly: Spencers venner
programme.desc: iCarly-gjengen vil finne venner til Spencer på hans egen alder. De finner noen gode muligheter, men vil vennskapet blomstre?

programme.title: Key & Peele: The Power of Wings
programme.desc: Inkluderer sketsjer der Keegan og Jordan avlytter hvite kvinner som elsker svarte menn, Wendell lager en musikkvideo og Kareem og Jahar går på treningssenteret.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Soul Food
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan diskuterer hvem som er mest svart, og å være den eneste svarte på en fest. Sketsjer inkluderer Tea Party som oppdager et nytt håp, hærens ververe som tenker annerledes, og Bobby McFerrin som duellerer mot Michael Winslow.

programme.title: Key & Peele: The 420 Special
programme.desc: Neil deGrasse Tyson slapper av hjemme, Keegan må bevare fatningen under et jobbintervju, en skredder får en klient med luft i magen, parkeringsvaktene diskuterer 'Game of Thrones' og en telefonselger prøver en ny strategi.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Terrorist Meeting
programme.desc: En gangster prøver desperat å bevise at han er gal, terrorister møtes for å planlegge sitt neste trekk og en sjalu storebror gjør familiemiddagen pinlig.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Bone Thugs And Homeless
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer en hund som plager en nyhetsreporter og Harriet Tubman som løper fritt omkring.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Landlord
programme.desc: I sesongfinalen vil president Obama behandles som alle andre, Jordan ser på en leilighet som er eid av en mistenksom utleier, og et par festfiksere som vil få gang i festen på en bar mitzvah.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Hollywood Sequel Doctor
programme.desc: Kileleking mellem to venner blir plutselig merkelig, forfattere brainstormer til 'Gremlins 2', to bøller mistenker vennen sin for å stjele og Keegan og Jordan diskuterer Afrika på en fest.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Biological Dad
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer et romvesen som lærer om kvinnelig anatomi, karer som prøver å overgå hverandre og møtet mellom de to siste mennesker på Jorden.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Y'all Ready For This?
programme.desc: Et fotballag girer seg opp før en kamp, president Obama og Luther møter Hillary Clinton, to karer forbereder seg på potensielle trusler på et fly, pirater synger en sang og en betjent er litt for skyteglad.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Manly Tears
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer en narkohandel som går på trynet, en mafiafyr som er en stor grinasabb, og Darius Rucker som prøver å takle sin Hootie-fortid.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Michael Jackson Halloween
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan feirer Halloween med å flykte fra rasistiske zombier, skuespillerne i 'Human Centipede' har en skremmende gjenforening, og vi besøker en folkeskole for trollmenn med problemer.

programme.title: Broad City: Abbi's Mom

programme.title: Broad City: Witches

programme.title: Broad City: Florida

programme.title: Broad City: House Sitting

programme.title: Broad City: Bed Bugs

programme.title: Broad City: Friendiversary
programme.desc: Jentenes 'Friendiversary' utvikler seg i en farlig retning når de blir vitne til noe forferdelig.

programme.title: Broad City: Stories

programme.title: Broad City: Shework and S**t Bucket
programme.desc: Ilana gir seg i kast med sin seneste mulighet til å tjene penger da hun en åpner et utendørs kontorlandskap for New Yorks røykere; Abbi konfronterer husverten sin da han nekter å modernisere sanitæranlegget hennes.

programme.title: Broad City: Bitcoin & the Missing Girl
programme.desc: Ilana besøker en gammel flamme for å få sin del av en Bitcoin-formue; Abbi glemmer klesvasken sin for første gang, og mister favorittgenseren sin.

programme.title: Broad City: Make the Space
programme.desc: Ilana oppdager en skremmende hemmelighet om Jaimé; Abbi prøver å avansere fra genserbretter til vinduskunstner på Anthropologie.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Revenge of Mike Powers

programme.desc: Some promising new recruits intimidate the team with their skills, and Wiegel has trouble making magic with her incarcerated boyfriend.

programme.desc: Dave takes a realistic look at "Pretty Woman" and "The Matrix" and introduces the Wu-Tang Clan's new financial consulting firm.

programme.desc: Dave takes Japan by storm in the sci-fi adventure "Blackzilla," and America Undercover presents The Playa Haters' Ball.

programme.desc: Dave presents the History Channel coverage of great inner-city gang wars from the 1980s.

programme.desc: Dave sees people's inner thoughts and freaks out when a little kid beats him at video games.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Woah Vicky
programme.desc: Daniel møter en sterk Afroamerikansk kvinne med navnet Woahh Vicky, deltaer i dåpen til Den digre babyen og gir en dypfølt unnskyldning som dere aldri hadde forventet.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Web Redemption Reunion Spectacular
programme.desc: Daniel kommer tilbake fra sommerferie med en veldig spesiell gjenforeningsfest, gir en del av seg selv til en verdig sak, og avslører en ny klesstil som er like flytende som seksualiteten hans.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Mack the Trans Wrestler
programme.desc: Den sterkeste mannen på high schools brytelag hjelper Daniel å tre sin liberale agenda ned i halsen på deg, og Daniel oppdager en magisk ny metode å merke sine barn for livet og ramser opp hvilke av kjendisene han ville hatt sex med.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Paul Flart
programme.desc: Daniel belønner en sykehusvakt med Purpurprompen for å slippe seg på jobben, beviser at den eneste sikre trampolinen er ingen trampoline og gir ros til en som virkelig har fortjent det: ham selv.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Naked Hanging Artist
programme.desc: Daniel hjelper en naken norsk performancekunstner, finner ut mer om Tuna Box med Daddy Long Neck, og snakker om føtter.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Flat-Earth Rocket Man
programme.desc: Daniel tar et stort bakoversteg for menneskeheten med en som tror at Jorden er flat, avslører noen kjendiser som har mistet troverdighet, og viser hvordan man kan slutte å spyle penger ned i do.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Crying Mukbanger
programme.desc: Daniel bryter brød med en kranglefant, forklarer hvorfor det er viktigere å tvitre enn å stemme og finner ut hvem som mangler 'O.P.P.'.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Deafies in Drag
programme.desc: I denne superskumle Halloween-episoden snakker Daniel med noen døve dragqueens, viser oss noen smakløse kostymer, og beviser en gang for alle at spøkelser er 100 % virkelige.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Adrenaline Junkie Chase
programme.desc: Daniel hjelper en adrenalin-junkie å ta overdose, introduserer deg for nettets mest snuskete pervoer og tilbyr de siste valgresultatene live.

programme.title: Tosh.0: One Hole or Two?
programme.desc: Daniel avklarer nettets heiteste hull-debatt, introdusere nye sportsgrener som tar nasjonen med storm og presenterer tilbakekomsten av showets mest ubesvarte innslag.
