programme.title: World of Love Island
programme.desc: Velkommen til Love Island hvor hotte single som leter etter kjærlighet og konkurrerer mot hverandre om å bli på øya. Bøttevis av intriger, drama og, selvfølgelig, mye kjærlighet.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 402
programme.desc: I Gøteborg flytter spesialtransportøren Jonathan campinghytter, og været er ikke på hans side. I Stockholm er rotter et problem, og Max, en søppelmann, vil helst slippe å møte dem.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 403
programme.desc: I Stockholm tømmer Max søppeldunker i kjendistette nabolag. Jörgen transporterer en 25 tonn tung gryte i Skåne, og veien dit er både smal og ujevn.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 404
programme.desc: Spesialtransportøren Johan transporterer 30 meter lange trebjelker. Slamsugeren Magnus tar seg av en pumpegrop, en risikofylt jobb på grunn av de farlige gassene som produseres.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 405
programme.desc: Anton kjører en grusknuser oppe i Norrland, og Amanda er på et kloakkrenseanlegg med kranbilen sin for å hjelpe til med å tømme en silo.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 406
programme.desc: Max har byttet ut byluften med skjærgården, og dagens oppdrag er å tømme søppeldunker på Ingarö. To termoser med kaffe og Emanuel er klar for en hel dag i skogen.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 407
programme.desc: Ingenting kan gå galt når Jörgen kjører en 70 tonns kran fra Värnamo til Helsingborg. Mickan kjører tømmer for første gang. Olivia transporterer kalver, men kalvene rømmer!

programme.title: America's Next Top Model: And The Winner Is
programme.desc: Cycle nine winner Saleisha Stowers stops by to cheer on the contestants during their Cover Girl commercial and print ad shoot.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: A hi-tech runway analyzes the girls’ strut & Tyra, Miss J and Jay Manuel assess which 14 show the most Top Model potential.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model: The Ladder Of Model Success
programme.desc: Benny Ninja is back to educate the girls about posing, but one of the girls takes contorting her body a little too far.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model: You’re Beautiful, Now Change
programme.desc: The ladies are excited when Tyra reveals it’s time for makeovers. Hair is cut and tears are shed when the girls see their new looks for the first time.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model: Fierce Eyes
programme.desc: The ladies practice their strut down a catwalk while wearing blindfolds and one girl shocks the judges when she decides to lift her dress while posing.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Dette er sværingene
programme.desc: De nye kandidatene får en tankevekker om hva det innebærer å være en DCC. Jentene kjemper for å lære dansene. Melissa Rycroft treffer nykommerne for første gang.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Time to Push
programme.desc: With the first cut looming, the girls must push their dance skills to the limit; Melissa Rycroft works to bring out showmanship; stress increases on makeover day as the girls try to get the DCC look.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Big Surprises
programme.desc: A new choreographer shakes things up; uniform fittings and the Belk fashion show approach; two-time Grammy winner Kacey Musgraves stops by rehearsal.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Dance Intervention
programme.desc: Melissa Rycroft makes a house call to help Yuko; Kitty Carter rocks some of the candidate's worlds; cameos give Kelli and Judy a fresh perspective on the girls; at Show Group auditions, the girls let it all hang out.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Rehearsals with the Stars
programme.desc: Kellie Pickler comes to a rehearsal to share her experience and motivate the girls as Training Camp comes to an end; Melissa Rycroft makes Kelsey aware of a big mistake; Candace Romo helps with a big night of cuts.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: The Finish Line
programme.desc: Squad announcement feels bittersweet as some favorites go home; the team has their first appearance at the Star Ribbon cutting; Game Day arrives.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 2
programme.desc: Junior Doctor Tom Fish’s first patient is 18-year-old Lewis who has broken bones and deep wounds from a moped accident - but causing him the most pain is his fear of needles.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 3
programme.desc: Sister Benita is running the shift, when suddenly, a fire alarm goes off and she must prepare the entire department - staff and emergency patients - for a full evacuation.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 4
programme.desc: Sister Harriet spots Terry waiting in the queue and decides he needs urgent care. He’s fallen off a roof and is unable to move his arm from a position above his head.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 5
programme.desc: Priority is being given to two patients fighting for breath: 72-year-old Lynda and 2-year-old Seb. Junior Doctor Emma Faragher is treating Lynda. ‘Not being able to breathe is absolutely terrifying,’ says Doctor Faragher.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 6
programme.desc: Consultant Doctor Julian Humphrey looks after a 76-year-old woman who has come in after a nasty fall. She has broken her nose but Doctor Humphrey fears that bleeding on the brain could have much more serious long-term consequences.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 12
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Alan, a sound therapist who has lived on his own for 20 years. His son has tried to help him clean, but it’s a battle he’s never been able to win.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 4
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Anita from Manchester, who’s house is overrun with her 3 cats who make a mess wherever they like.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 5
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Scout Leader and Single mum of two; Debbie from South London, whose 2-bed flat is drowning in clutter and filth.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 1
programme.desc: Hoarding is on the rise and it's believed that 1 in 20 people could have a problem. With over 1.2 million problem hoarders in the UK today, one could be your neighbour?

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 2
programme.desc: Susan's hoard has made her virtually homeless. Brian has dedicated his life to hoarding and his daughter is sick of it. Jake is lucky to be alive as his home almost burned to the ground in an inferno fuelled by the clutter he'd collected.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 3
programme.desc: Arthur's flat is packed with junk. Experts Caz and Tee are up for their toughest assignment ever. Khim is getting married but first she must clear her hoard. Mandi's passion for vintage clothes is out of control.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 7
programme.desc: Near the junction to East Midlands airport, a trailer sheds its load and causes rush hour chaos. Adam dispatches a crack team of his finest recovery ops.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 8
programme.desc: A 20-tonne digger has been written off after it fell into the Thames, and Jim has to work fast to get a stranded HGV driver to safety.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 9
programme.desc: A seven-car motorway pile-up leaves a local council's waste truck in trouble. Fluff does his best to shift one of the heaviest loads his vehicle can lift.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 10
programme.desc: A burnt-out van abandoned on an isolated towpath presents a serious challenge for Steve and Marta, but the solution comes in the form of a bespoke, bright yellow rescue truck.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 1
programme.desc: A 44 ton Artic straddling the central reservation of the M1 is a rush hour headache for Crouch Recovery Incident Manager Steve and one of the youngest Recovery Ops on the team, Pat.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Greta & Hoss, Storm, and Chula
programme.desc: Cesar helps a young Akita control his aggression; Newfoundland is the world's pickiest eater; two-year old Shiba Inu has a knack for bolting out open doors.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Eton & Dolly, and the Pups on Parole
programme.desc: Cesar goes to jail to help wayward humans rehabilitate wayward pups through a program called "Pups on Parole."; Bulldogs learn to play fair.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Vicky & Taz, Punkin, and Maddy

programme.title: Jade Fever

programme.desc: Spenningsnivået øker da de utenlandske investorene plutselig stikker innom for å sjekke Wolverine-gruven. Alan forsøker å skape fred.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Etter endelig å ha oppdaget flere lovende steiner i Wolverine-gruven, oppdager mannskapet at de kanskje har gått ut forbi sitt erklærte område.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Spenningsnivået stiger når slutten av gruvesesongen nærmer seg, og Jade-mannskapet er redde for å ikke finne den etterlengtede steinen verdt millioner.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Kuldegrader utfordrer Jade-gruvearbeiderne som forsøker å treffe jackpotten – en jadestein stor nok til å imponere investorene – før gruvesesongen er over.

programme.title: Jade Fever

programme.title: Armor of God 2: Operation Condor NO

programme.title: The Hills: A New Roommate
programme.desc: Med Spencer ute av bildet, prøver Heidi en siste gang å bli venner med Lauren igjen. Når Audrina begynner å være mer sammen med Heidi og Justin, spør Lauren seg selv om de egentlig bør fortsette å bo sammen.

programme.title: The Hills: A Date With The Past
programme.desc: En gammel flamme blusser opp når Stephen Coletti dukker opp igjen i Laurens liv. Heidi prøver å hindre Stephanie i å komme på Laurens innflytningsfest.

programme.title: The Hills: No Place Like Home
programme.desc: Lauren havner mellom to stoler når spenningen mellom Lo og Audrina stiger. Heidi bestemmer seg for at forholdet til Spencer er over, og aksepterer et jobbtilbud som fører henne til Las Vegas.

programme.title: The Hills: The Next Move Is Yours
programme.desc: I sesongfinalen føler Audrina seg utestengt av Laurens nære vennskap med Lo, og vurderer å flytte ut. Lauren gjør et inderlig forsøk på å reparere forholdet med Audrina, men det kan være for sent.

programme.title: The Hills: We'll Never Be Friends
programme.desc: Når sesong fire starter er situasjonen mellom Audrina og Lo anspent. Lauren forsøker å gjøre et godt inntrykk på en ny fyr, og et besøk fra Heidis søster Holly truer Spencer og Heidis forhold.

programme.title: The Hills: Drama Follows Them
programme.desc: Stephanie blir uvenner med broren sin og kompisen hans når Lauren møter på Spencer på bursdagen sin. Kelly Cutrone sparker noen på People's Revolution og Whitney fyller plassen. Laurens forhold med Doug kanskje går litt for fort fram.

programme.title: The Hills: Better Off As Friends
programme.desc: Lauren innser at kjemien hun hadde med Doug på videregående, ikke lenger er der. Whitney er nervøs for å dra til New York for jobben, men en date med en kjekk modell hjelper på humøret. Til tross for en fin gest vil Spencer bryte helt med Stephanie.

programme.title: The Hills: Boys Make Girls Cry
programme.desc: En heidundrende tur til Las Vegas går galt når Audrina ignorerer Lauren. Brody tar opp Stephanies fortid, og gutta ender opp i fengsel. Heidis søster Holly flytter inn, men det er lite Spencer heller vil enn å sparke henne ut.

programme.title: The Hills: Something Has To Change
programme.desc: Lauren og Audrina kjemper for å redde vennskapet sitt, men det kan allerede være for sent. Spencer har fått nok av Heidis søster Holly og tar saken i egne hender. Og Brody og Doug forlater fengslet med noe nytt å fortelle.

programme.title: The Hills: You Always Miss a Best Friend
programme.desc: Heidis søster Holly tar kontakt med Lauren, noe som tvinger både Lauren og Heidi til å revurdere hva som skjedde med vennskapet deres. Audrina og Justins forhold blir satt på prøve når hun jobber på en stor begivenhet for Epic Records.

programme.title: The Hills: When Lauren's Away...
programme.desc: Når Lauren drar på ferie med familien, ting går galt i Los Angeles. Stephanie dater Doug bak Laurens rygg, og Audrina og Heidi blir venner.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Ain't That a Beach
programme.desc: En forvirrende avsløring i hemmelighullet gir Da'Vonne en sannhet hun ikke kan flykte fra. En ny eks kan ikke bestemme seg for om de er her for kjærlighet eller skikkelig hevn. En omgang 'sannhet eller konsekvens' får opp dampen med et treveiskyss.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: The Lengths We Go To Lie to an Ex
programme.desc: Sannhetsbrettet avslører hvor langt Jamar går for å beholde en hemmelighet for eksene, mens Rays spiller tar ham igjen. En ny eks ankommer og avbryter en pågående kjærlighetstriangel.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Wait, That's Not an Ex
programme.desc: Nye singler kommer i en sjokkerende vri, og vender villaen opp ned. Et par tar forholdet til et nytt nivå, og skaper fyrverkeri. Hemmelighullet sjokkerer Arisce med sannheten om hva Mike egentlig syns om forholdet.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: The Ex-Husband and the Best Friend
programme.desc: En eksmann skylles i land og får en veldig kald velkomst. En eksplosiv krangel ved sannhetsbrettet presser et par til en tidlig avskjed.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Seeing is Believing
programme.desc: En eks kommer og prøver å klore seg tilbake i Rickys liv, noe som gir anspenthet i villaen. Bryce gjør alt galt med Nicole. Hemmelighullet viser Dani en sannhet hun ikke kan bortse fra.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: You Can't Get Divorced Twice
programme.desc: Kyra og Davids forhold settes på prøve da eksen de fryktet dukker opp. Sannhetsbrettet gjør så alle i villaen stiller spørsmål ved sin egen virkelighet. Ranin og Elias kjemper for å finne ut hva vennskap betyr etter skilsmissen.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, the crew pimps Seth's Nissan Maxima.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, the crew pimps Vanessa's Ford Festiva L.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, the crew pimps Andrew's Cadillac Fleetwood Hearse.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1978 Cadillac Sedan DeVille
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen Niles Cadillac Sedan DeVille. Nile ruller hjem i en mørkerosa metallic bil med bagasjerommet fullt av nye sko.

programme.title: Are You The One?: She Don't Want You
programme.desc: John tar av når Stephen prøver seg på Julia. Tori og Camille er begge ute etter den samme fyren. Presset er stort for de 'gylne parene' som skal i Truth Booth.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Three's a Crowd
programme.desc: Huset er i opprør når Gio og Kaylens perfekte forhold begynner å rakne. Asaf sover med feil person.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Beer Goggles
programme.desc: Eventyret om Gio og Kaylen skaper uro i gjengen når Gio gjør tegn til å ville prøve seg på Julia, og alle de andre jentene i huset. Cam og Victoria tilbringer en natt sammen som ikke er verdt å huske.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Mammas' Boys
programme.desc: Guttene avslører sine myke sider når mødrene deres avslører pinlig informasjon. Stephen blir mer og mer paranoid på grunn av Gios interesse for Julia. Francesca blir fanget i Gios ulvehi.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Pulling Punches
programme.desc: En Adam og Eva-fest fører til sjalusi når parene blandes. Det dannes en kjærlighets-sekskant og slagene faller når John, Tyler, Stephen og Gio prøver å få orden på sin forvirrede hjerter.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Great Ex-pectations
programme.desc: Guttenes ekser blir invitert til skittentøyvask i en utfordring som skaper forlegenhet. Gio og Stephen får endelig høre sannheten når det gjelder Julia.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: It's the night of the fashion show and some of the chefs become distracted by the models they're cooking for.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The contestants are tasked with preparing food for UFC fighter Tito Oritz and former boxer Sugar Ray Leonard.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: It's steak night and the contestants must prepare some beef for Chef Ramsey and during a special steakhouse service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: There is chaos during service on steak night, prompting Chef Ramsay to throw one team off the job due to infighting.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The arrival of three special guests, including David Beckham, raises the pressure during service. In the team challenge the chefs must roll dice with letters on them, choosing ingredients starting with the letters they roll.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The teams submit to the annual blind taste test challenge. The winners spend a day at a water park while the losers make deliveries, grind peppercorn, change the oil in the fryers and peel potatoes.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Rektoren
programme.desc: Etter at en av Walkers gamle venner angivelig begår selvmord, forsøker Walker å finne sannheten om dødsfallet og få orden på et campus fullt av narkolangere.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Team Cherokee, del 1
programme.desc: Walker må finne ut av hvem som prøver å sabotere et urfolk-racerbillag idet det forbereder seg på et viktig løp.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Team Cherokee, del 2
programme.desc: Da sjåføren til Team Cherokee blir satt ut av spill, må Walker ta rattet for å holde laget fra å bli diskvalifisert.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Livegirls.com
programme.desc: Det blir et kappløp mot tiden da Trivettes nye kjæreste bortføres av menneskesmuglere.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Ingen utvei
programme.desc: Da Alex og Trivette blir bortført av Walkers erkefiende og plassert i en tank med iskaldt vann, må Walker redde dem før de drukner.

programme.title: MTV Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek styrer serien, som inneholder klipp fra nettet, samt har kjendisgjester og medprogramledere som Sterling «Steelo», Madison Beer og danske Nina Agdal. Nye episoder hver onsdag.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant
programme.desc: Sørstatsjenta Whitney er familiens baby, men da både hun og moren blir gravide, blir det for fullt i huset. Whitney og kjæresten Weston må flytte ut og stifte sin egen familie.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant
programme.desc: Den 16 år gamle småbyjenta Catelynn er fornuftens røst i en ellers ilter familie. Med støtte fra kjæresten Tyler bestemmer hun seg for adopsjon uten foreldrenes samtykke.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Fade to Black
programme.desc: Paulie og Mike må sjonglere flere grupper med jenter. Det blir slåsskamp i baren, og en av deltakerne blir slått ned.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Just Another Day at the Shore
programme.desc: Med støtte fra de fleste av de andre er Snooki på bedringens vei. Ronnies familie kommer på besøk, og Sammi ønsker å gjøre et godt førsteinntrykk. JWoww blir lei folkene i klubben og havner i slåsskamp.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Boardwalk Blowups
programme.desc: Mike ber jenter til huset, og situasjonen kommer ut av kontroll. Snooki havner i slåsskamp igjen. Ronnie havner også i bråk, og Sammi begynner å tvile på forholdet deres.

programme.title: MTV Cribs: Melissa Joan Hart, Trick Daddy, Jewel
programme.desc: Featuring the homes of Jewel, Melissa Joan Hart and Trick Daddy.

programme.title: MTV Cribs: Redman, Eddie George, Howie Dorough
programme.desc: Featuring the homes of Redman, Howie (Backstreet Boys) and Eddie George - NFL.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Question
programme.desc: Elizabeth Ashley guest stars as a beautiful IMF agent who becomes the key to determining if enemy agent Nicholai Varsi is telling the truth when he claims he's defecting to the United States.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Fountain
programme.desc: George Maharis guest stars as John Bachman, an underworld figure with access to the syndicate's top secret computerized records who is convinced by the IMF that he has found the fountain of youth.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Fighter
programme.desc: William Windom guest stars as Paul Mitchell, a boxing promoter tied to a crime syndicate who becomes a target of the IMF when one of his fighters is killed before he can talk to the police.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Speed
programme.desc: A breathtaking motorcycle chase over the hills of San Francisco figures prominently in the IMF's plan to recover three tons of the drug commonly known as speed from Sam Hibbing's illegal drug operation.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Pendulum
programme.desc: Dean Stockwell guest stars as Gunnar Malstrom, one of the leaders of Pendulum -- a secret terrorist organization -- who has a plan involving a major attack on the government that the Impossible Missions Force is assigned to uncover.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 303
programme.desc: Charlotte og Mikkel bor i en så liten leilighet at dusjen må tømmes for ting hver gang de skal bade. Men nå ønsker de å flytte litt ut av byen sammen med sønnen deres.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 304
programme.desc: Pernille og Nicklas fra Odense bor så lite at hvis de trenger litt privatliv, så har de bare toalettet å ty til. Nicklas drømmer om å få et kjøkken med to ovner, slik at han kan lage mer mat.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 305
programme.desc: Wendy og Jesper fra Kalundborg bor allerede bra, i en leilighet som har en utrolig utsikt. Men en kommende familieforøkelse betyr at de må finne noe som er større.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 306
programme.desc: Jonas og Louise får sjokk når de ser hvilke hus de har råd til. Mads Mikkelsen og Tobias Edlev Nielsen jobber overtid for å prøve å oppfylle parets ønsker.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 307
programme.desc: Mads og Mia ønsker å flytte litt utenfor byen - men ikke helt på landet. Med Tobias og Mads sin hjelp kjøper de en bolig som har nøyaktig alt de ikke liker.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 401
programme.desc: I første episode møter vi Tine og Lars, som har svimlende åtte millioner å kjøpe hus og pusse opp for. Men det store budsjettet har ikke hjulpet dem så langt - kan ekspertene være til hjelp?

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Estonia (Part 2)
programme.desc: Estonia has embarked on a journey greatly inspired by the nordic cuisine. Tareq explores the countryside of Estonia before he returns to the capital of Tallinn where he meets people that really love their traditional food.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Öland
programme.desc: Tareq bikes through the unique landscape of Öland, Sweden's second largest island located in the Baltic Sea. It is a place where the interaction between man and nature have created a diverse and rich farmland with an amazing amount of small producers.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Bornholm
programme.desc: Bornholm, the sunny bright green island with it’s own gastronomic tone is a true pioneer when it comes to local food at it’s finest quality. Tareq visit Denmark's first regional food culture house where they develop this unique flourishing cuisine.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Laponia
programme.desc: In the northern part of Sweden, you’ll find the stunning world heritage Laponia. Almost 10.000 square kilometres of nature reserves and national parks. Tareq visit the rich, unique culture of the sami in the vast impressive wilderness.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Malmö & Copenhagen
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor returns to his home turf to see what has happened and what the future might bring to the new nordic cuisine. He visits a local goat farmer and meets up with young enthusiastic chefs who takes this nordic legacy further.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Zealand
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor visits the South Coast of Denmark to make his own versions of open-faced sandwiches and smoked fish dishes.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Dalsland
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor puts on his hiking boots and explores the pilgrim trail of Dalsland in West Sweden. This episode will include outdoor cooking, foraging and beaver safari.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Stockholm
programme.desc: When Tareq arrives in Stockholm he will meet innovation and world class gastronomy, a big city for foodies. He will make some pizza at the Rosendal garden café and go on an adventure in the archipielago.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Big Birthday Battle: Holly's Dream Comes True
programme.desc: Hollys drømmer går i oppfyllelse når en fra fortiden hennes kommer gående inn døren, men hvordan vil resten reagere? Charlottes lag sverger hevn over Garys, men vil de klare å gjennomføre det?

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Big Birthday Battle: Charlotte Messes Up
programme.desc: Scotty T er tilbake og alle i huset jubler! En S&M-kveld på jobben gjør Charlottes lag kåt, og en dum tabbe gjør at Gary må forlate huset. Betyr det slutten på ham og Charlotte?

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Big Birthday Battle: And The Winner Is...
programme.desc: Det er finale, men UTEN Gaz og Charlotte i stuss, må begge lagene ha nye ledere. Anna har en overraskelse etter finalen, men hvem VINNER konkurransen? Klarer Charlotte og Gaz seg? Tårene flyter når den gamle gjengen forlater huset for godt.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The Geordies React: S02E01
programme.desc: Geordie Shore-gjengen er tilbake for tre helt nye episoder av Geordies React! Guttene og jentene setter seg ned sammen med Charlotte, Holly og James for å se seg selv i serien og finne ut hva som skjedde på de uklare nettene!

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The Geordies React: Episode 202
programme.desc: Gjengen setter seg ned med hverandre for å se seg selv i serien for å huske de uklare nettene. I denne episoden blir Sams trekantsdrama alvor, Nathan viser sine ballferdigheter, og Chloe står igjen med regning for en veldig rotete natt!

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The Geordies React: Episode 203
programme.desc: Geordie Shore-gjengen er sammen med James, Holly og Abbies bestemor for en ny episode av The Geordies React! Finn ut hva de syns når de ser seg selv i serien. I denne episoden feirer Marnie bursdagen sin med karnivalfest.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Good Riddance
programme.desc: Trekanten blir mer intens når Ronnie tar Sammy i å gi nummeret sitt til en annen gutt. En deltaker velger å forlate The Shore for godt.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Fade to Black
programme.desc: Paulie og Mike må sjonglere flere grupper med jenter. Det blir slåsskamp i baren, og en av deltakerne blir slått ned.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Just Another Day at the Shore
programme.desc: Med støtte fra de fleste av de andre er Snooki på bedringens vei. Ronnies familie kommer på besøk, og Sammi ønsker å gjøre et godt førsteinntrykk. JWoww blir lei folkene i klubben og havner i slåsskamp.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Boardwalk Blowups
programme.desc: Mike ber jenter til huset, og situasjonen kommer ut av kontroll. Snooki havner i slåsskamp igjen. Ronnie havner også i bråk, og Sammi begynner å tvile på forholdet deres.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: What Happens in the AC
programme.desc: Gjengen drar til Atlantic City, der moro blir til alvor idet Mike støter fra seg både Snooki og Jwoww. En av deltakerne avslører at hun har hatt spiseforstyrrelser.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: One Shot
programme.desc: Sommeren går mot slutten, men dramaet er ikke over. Pauly får en stalker, og en deltaker havner i fengsel etter en slåsskamp.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Chamber Music
programme.desc: While walking in the world Above, Vincent recognizes Rolly,a teenage musical prodigy and ex-tunnel dweller who is now a junkie.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Remember Love
programme.desc: In a moment of profound despair, Vincent undergoes his own It's a Wonderful Life (1946) experience and sees what would have happened if he had died as a baby.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Ashes, Ashes
programme.desc: A Russian sailor escapes to the tunnels only to bring a plague upon the people in the Underworld. It is up to Catherine, Vincent, Father, and everybody to help save their world.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Dead of Winter
programme.desc: When the tunnel world is having an annual event, Paracelcus makes plans to crash the event and do something.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: God Bless the Child
programme.desc: With Catherine's help, a pregnant teenage hooker is welcomed into the tunnels. Complications arise when she falls in love with Vincent.

programme.title: JAG: Ghost Ship
programme.desc: Harm and Mac investigate the discovery of a skeleton found hidden aboard a decommissioned aircraft carrier that is being cut up for scrap, and learn it is all that remains of a long-missing JAG officer.

programme.title: JAG: The Court Martial of Sandra Gilbert
programme.desc: The top female gunship pilot at the Yuma Marine Base is charged with disobeying an order to stop "fraternizing" with her crew chief, a married, enlisted man. Mac is assigned as prosecutor and Harm is set as Susan's defense attorney.

programme.title: JAG: Vanished
programme.desc: Concerns regarding the mysterious disappearance of a fully armed Navy F-14 during a storm lead Harm's investigation to consider such diverse scenarios as pilot suicide, terrorism, the Bermuda Triangle curse, or UFO interference.

programme.title: JAG: King of the Fleas
programme.desc: Having just stabbed a man on a street-corner, Willie, a wheelchair-bound former Vietnam POW arrives at JAG headquarters to report "a 30-year-old murder" which he's just committed. Willie relates that while imprisoned he knew Harm's father.

programme.title: JAG: Against All Enemies
programme.desc: Harm, Mac and Bud board an aircraft carrier in the Sea of Japan to investigate the accidental shooting down of a North Korean civilian airliner by Navy jets.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Burl Of My Dreams / Meet The Author/ Rhymes, Riddles And Romance
programme.desc: While the captain's daughter falls for Gopher, a book publisher flips a page in the book of love when trying to sign a burly author who happens to be accompanied by his attractive niece. Plus, an unusual couple looks for treasure.

programme.title: The Love Boat: His Girl Friday / A Wife For Wilfred/ The Girl Who Stood Still
programme.desc: Crew members become matchmakers when a man offers a handsome reward to anyone who can find him a good woman. Plus, a teen girl traveling with her mother faces potential humiliation when she runs into a former boyfriend.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Pali-Mony-O-Mine / Does Father Know Best?/ An 'A' For Gopher
programme.desc: A doctor and his lawyer girlfriend find their relationship on trial when he meets an old friend. Meanwhile, Gopher flips for his former schoolteacher, and a young man tries to impress his father when he meets two women.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Mothers Don't Do That / Marrying For Money/ Substitute Lover
programme.desc: The captain and his crew suspect that a beautiful woman is trying to kill her millionaire husband, while a glamorous divorcee (Eva Gabor) tries to get reacquainted with her son, who prefers the company of his father.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Command Performance/ Sketchy Love/ Hyde And Seek
programme.desc: A mother and daughter are shocked to see the girl's long-lost father entertaining passengers as the cruise comedian. Plus, a teenager pursues Gopher and drastically changes her appearance to try and catch his eye.

programme.title: Happy Days: Not With My Sister You Don't
programme.desc: Richie's surprise over little sister Joanie's first real date turns to shock when he learns it's with Spike, a pint-sized replica of his Uncle Fonzie.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie Moves Out
programme.desc: Hoping for more privacy, Richie moves out of the Cunningham home to share an apartment with his brother and soon discovers it's not the paradise he expected.

programme.title: Happy Days: You Go To My Head
programme.desc: Richie's fears get the best of him while he's reading a book on abnormal psychology and it drives him to secretly see a psychiatrist.

programme.title: Happy Days: Wish Upon a Star
programme.desc: Hollywood comes to Jefferson High when Richie wins a dance date with a beautiful movie star in a school raffle.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie's Flip Side
programme.desc: Richie lets fame go to his head when he takes a turn as a disc jockey at the local radio station.

programme.title: Happy Days: Goin' to Chicago
programme.desc: While in Chicago with their high school choir, Richie, Ralph, and Potsie sneak by their chaperons, wind up on the wrong side of an unsympathetic downtown nightclub owner, and win the sympathy of a kind-hearted cocktail waitress.

programme.title: Happy Days: The Cunningham Caper
programme.desc: Richie is sick in bed with the flu and is bored with eating soup and doing crossword puzzles. But when his family leaves him alone in the house, pandemonium breaks loose when Fonzie, Potsie, Ralph, and a burglar join him.

programme.title: Happy Days: Get A Job
programme.desc: It's a new experience for Richie when he becomes romantically attracted to an "older woman."

programme.title: Happy Days: Cruisin'
programme.desc: Richie, Potsie, and Ralph Malph visit another part of town to meet some girls and find themselves in trouble when the girls' boyfriends show up. Fonzie steps in to save the day.

programme.title: MacGyver: Lost Love (Part 2)
programme.desc: MacGyver heists an ancient Chinese artifact as a ransom for a woman he once loved, only to learn she's double-crossed him.

programme.title: MacGyver: Back From The Dead
programme.desc: When former mobster Jimmy "The Eraser's" new identity is exposed, MacGyver is forced into action to save Jimmy's daughter and grandson.

programme.title: MacGyver: Ghost Ship (Aka "Sasquatch")
programme.desc: While hiking through remote wilderness, MacGyver uncovers an elaborate scheme to siphon oil from a pipeline when he comes to the aid of a young girl, terrorized by the legendary Sasquatch.

programme.title: MacGyver: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: MacGyver teams up with the sister of a murdered friend to expose a diamond heist operation that they suspect is the work of a diplomat, using his status to shield him from suspicion and arrest.

programme.title: MacGyver: Gx-1
programme.desc: Working behind the iron curtain to destroy the wreckage of a top-secret jet, MacGyver comes to the aid of a renowned Russian psychic who wishes to defect.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Ta frem bestikket! Fire fremmede konkurrerer om penger og tittelen som den ultimate vert for middagsselskapet, følg med for en spicy konkurranse.

programme.title: Matlock: The Final Affair (Part 1)
programme.desc: When Matlock looks into the double murder of a man studying for the ministry and the stabbing death of his wife, it looks like the case is closed when the wife’s lover is charged.

programme.title: Matlock: The Final Affair (Part 2)
programme.desc: When Matlock looks into the double murder of a man studying for the ministry and the stabbing death of his wife, it looks like the case is closed when the wife’s lover is charged.

programme.title: Matlock: The View
programme.desc: Viewing a heated argument from his hotel window, Matlock witnesses a murder involving two stars of a local theater production and an unhappy husband. When he helps investigate the case, his memory becomes a bit blurred.

programme.title: Matlock: The Play
programme.desc: Director of an amateur stage production, Doug Michaels fires would-be actor Ben Matlock from his role as a detective, claiming he’s seen kumquats with more talent. However, the tables soon turn when Michaels is accused of murdering the leading lady.

programme.title: Matlock: The Capital Offense
programme.desc: It’s a race against time as Matlock tries to save conman Adam Spangler from being executed for a murder he claims he never committed.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: The Sloans run into plenty of industry politics when they investigate the death of television network executive, Rachel Woodrall. Seamy revelations about Woodrall's college sorority lead to the killer.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Jesse finally reunites with his father. After they narrowly elude an assassin, Jesse begins to realize his father isn't the accountant he's always claimed to be, but rather a spy. The Travis's attempt to discover who's sending the killers.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A dead mime leads to an investigation of a crooked auto dealer. Randy Wolfe, a woman who's apparently an expert at everything, leads the investigation while continually annoying Steve.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A motorcycle stunt driver has a fatal accident while filming an action video. Steve investigates.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: When Steve is shot and falls into a coma, Mark does all in his power to find the assailant, even threatening a suspect with bodily harm.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Følg med huseiere når de tar valget om å endre livsstilen sin og bytte ut bylivet med det rolige livet på landet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Dren
programme.desc: Dren (n): Snookis alter ego. Pauly og Nikki kommer, og gjengen utforsker friluftslivet. Men løver, tigre og bjørner er ingenting for Snooki når Dren overtar Nikkis bursdag.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Staten Island Notebook
programme.desc: Dren fortsetter angrepet på San Diego. Noe foregår mellom Angelina og Vinny. Og da samboerne tar en tur til San Diegos Little Italy, overraskes de over å finne den ultimate Guido-greia - onkel Nino.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Wild "N Out: Jersey Style
programme.desc: På Deenas «familiedag» sliter Angelina i kjølvannet av sitt mislykkede ekteskap. Jenni havner på akuttmottaket. Og Nick Cannon og Justina Valentine leder gjengen i en improvisert runde «Wild 'N Out» Måtte den morsomste Guido vinne!

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Bank, bank! Hvem er det?
programme.desc: Vann blir til vin, og plutselig er det fullt kaos mellom Pauly, Nikki og Angelina.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Another Day, Anoter Crisis
programme.desc: Angelina forhandler nok en gang for å løse feiden med Pauly og Nikki. Vinny begynner å planlegge Vin-Day. Mike og Vinny fortsetter til en brasiliansk grill. Hvem spiser mest?

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Vin Day
programme.desc: The San Diego trip comes to a close on a high note with a day of exercise, drinking, and strippers, and Vinny has a heart-to-heart with Angelina.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chef Morimoto engages Challenger Masayoshi Kimura in this battle of rice.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Chef Sakai, known as the Iron Chef French, will have his hands full in this battle specially designed around Wedgwood china.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The challenger is a master chef hailing from Kyoto. He has the support of the former Iron Chef Michiba and Dr. Yatori. Can the Iron Chef win this battle?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The challenger is a seafood expert who chooses and masterfully cooks gifts from the sea. He has apprenticed in the top kitchens of Japan. Which competitor will find the soul of the sea?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The challenger is a stubborn chef descended from a long line of Tokyo dwellers. The Iron Chef will have his hands full facing such a strong tradition.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The challenger is one of the few Mexican food specialists in Tokyo. This is a Latin duel at Kitchen Stadium.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXIV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' havner Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood i 'Faresoner', avklarer ulike situasjoner av 'Glassknas' og oppnår betydelig høyde med 'Flygebiler'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' møter Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood ufokuserte fedre med 'Distraherte pappahjerner', driver høyt spill i golf med 'Djerv gjenvinning' og viser sine fiseferdigheter når de utfører 'Gasstriks'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppsummerer Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood kostnadene ved å ha barn i 'Dyre barn', snubler over sirkusartister som lager 'Plutselig sirkus' og opplever slitsomme feiringer med 'Dårlige bursdager'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' denger Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood hodet i veggen som første trekk i 'Kraftskaller', ødelegger golfutstyret sitt i 'På tide med nye køller' og møter farene ved å benytte 'Samkjøring om natten'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' utforsker Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood ildidrettens verden i 'Flammesport', finner ut hvor farlige dører kan være i 'Helt av hengslene' og blir overrasket over noen svært 'Uventede raketter'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' krasjer Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood inn i ubevegelige gjenstander i 'Parkert smerte', oppdager at trafikkflyten kan påvirkes av bisarre årsaker i 'Motorveiforsinkelser' og opplever farene ved 'Olme okser'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' støter Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood på farlige voltere uten 'Saltobevissthet', opplever smerten ved knuste tohjulinger i Billigsykler' og oppdager at heis og fyll ikke går så godt sammen i 'Heisa-heistur'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXXI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' prøver Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood å muntre opp folk som er 'Vinterdeppa', finner ut hva som skjer når du faller og opplever 'Fjes mot gjerde' og ødelegger perfekte øyeblikk med 'Triste forlovelsesopptak'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' lider Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood av 'Konsertforvirring', får smaken på 'Søvnsnacks' og flykter fra noen 'Hissige sammenstøt'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og medvert Lolo Wood det tøft når de flytter ut og blir 'Såre flyttefolk', møter noen nye medarbeidere som er 'Dumme på jobben' og finner ut at det er greit å gi opp i 'Vi kutter ut'

programme.title: Andromeda: Immaculate Perception
programme.desc: Genitter angriper Tyrs kone og koloni.

programme.title: Andromeda: Tunnel ved enden av lyset
programme.desc: Med femti partier ombord er Dylan vert for signeringen av New Commonwealth-charteret, men oppdager snart at det er inntrengere som har til hensikt å stoppe signeringen.

programme.title: Andromeda: Hvis hjulet er løst
programme.desc: Beka og Tyr blir overtatt av energien fra en dimensjonal tunnel. Dylan, Trance og Harper må redde dem før de ødelegger skipet.

programme.title: Andromeda: Skårene i Rimni
programme.desc: Dylan er innrammet for drap og må rydde navnet sitt mens han finner bitene i en vase som sies å gi eieren kosmos 'velsignelser.'

programme.title: Andromeda: Mad to Be Saved
programme.desc: Mannskapet redder en gruppe flyktninger, bare for å oppdage at de har vært utsatt for regjeringseksperimenter og er ekstremt ustabile.

programme.title: Andromeda: Cui Bono
programme.desc: Bekas onkel løper for kontoret i New Commonwealth, men et attentat får mannskapet til å opptre som hans sikkerhet.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Telltale Tracks
programme.desc: The disappearance of Philadelphia college athlete Aimee Willard is investigated after her car is found on the roadside. When her body is found, the police find unusual marks and DNA evidence that eventually lead to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ghost in the Machine
programme.desc: While investigating the apparent overdose suicide of Reverend Bill Guthrie's wife, detectives recover incriminating files from Bill's computer and learn of his infidelity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dressed to Kill
programme.desc: After 6-year-old Michelle Lee Dorr went missing, her father confessed to murdering her. But investigators soon poked holes in his story, leaving the case unsolved for 14 years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Storage
programme.desc: The 1987 disappearance of Houston resident Tracy Jo Shine is recalled. The investigation went cold until 2000 when a "cold case squad" learned that the woman's ex-boyfriend Michael Neal had bragged about killing her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Metal Business
programme.desc: Doctors cannot pinpoint the source of a businessman's illness.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Print Conviction
programme.desc: The 1996 investigation into 48-year-old Martha Hansen's murder is helped by a legal requirement that bars have video cameras installed on the premises.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elephant Tracks
programme.desc: The murders of an elderly couple leave police stumped until, two years later, they receive a major break. A jeweler looking through old newspaper clippings recognizes a necklace the female victim wore as having been pawned in her own shop.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bag of Evidence
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of 9-year-old Jessica Knott, police use a garbage bag to connect suspect James Edward Crow, Jr. to the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tooth or Consequences
programme.desc: An investigation into the murder of Katie Poirier is stymied by the lack of a body. Finally, investigators use a single tooth found among some charred remains to identify her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scratching The Surface
programme.desc: The only clue recovered from a shooting is a twelve-guage shotgun. Scientists use unique methods to lift the serial number from the weapon to trace it to its owner

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode: 8
programme.desc: This episode includes: Sonny Liston, Update: Locust Grove, Sharon's Search and Campbell Kidnapping.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode: 9
programme.desc: This episode includes: Mental Daze, Steve's Flag & UD, Spooks and Stalker Reward.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode: 10
programme.desc: This episode includes: Dead Ringer & UD, Woody's Millions, Plummer's Booty and Jim and Tammi.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode: 11
programme.desc: This episode includes: Fool's Gold, Update: Baltimore Babynapping, Suicide Homicide, Baby Broker and Donald Eugene Webb.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode: 12
programme.desc: This episode includes: Hat Box Baby, John Branion Pts. 1 & 2 & UD and Santa's Baby & UD.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Polly Klaas: Kidnapped
programme.desc: On October 1, 1993, a stranger abducted 12-year-old Polly Klaas during a slumber party in her home.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Firefight
programme.desc: In Miami, a gang of robbers targeted banks and armored cars. They carried assault weapons and weren't afraid to use them. They struck during the day, and sometimes twice a day. For awhile, they seemed unstoppable.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Brutal Abduction
programme.desc: A Chicago street gang thought they had figured out how to kidnap people for ransom again and again, and never get caught. But their one mistake was they underestimated the Federal Bureau of Investigation.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Above the Law
programme.desc: California Highway Patrolman George Gwaltney discovered the body of 23-year-old Robin Bishop near her car on a remote desert highway.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Predator
programme.desc: In the early 1990's, Washington, D.C., became the murder capital of the nation. Few were left untouched by gang violence, which was ignited by the drug trade. By 1994, that violence would strike at the very heart of law enforcement.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Perfect Heist
programme.desc: Bank robbery is a brazen yet simple crime. A mask, a gun, a note passed to a teller. But bank burglary is different. It takes skill to disable an alarm, to penetrate a locked vault.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Tools Of Death
programme.desc: Tool marking: A tool used to commit a crime can often be the same tool used to solve it. The pattern a machine leaves on an item, the unusual way a tool crimps a wire, and even something as innocuous as the shape of a wood chip can lead to a killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Out To Kill
programme.desc: An abandoned car outside Philadelphia brings heartbreak to a family and terror to a community. A young woman is dead, the killer gone. But the marks of his passage remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Death Grip
programme.desc: Fingerprinting: The Identification Division of the FBI relies on fingerprints as one of the most effective ways to identify criminals.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Blood Money
programme.desc: Some people murder for love. But these killers did it for the money. When greed is the motive, investigators must make every clue pay off.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Killing Time
programme.desc: A killer may strike in the middle of the night, and hide clues well. But the police are always there, ready and working, and they will never give up when they're on the trail of criminals who decide it's Killing Time.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Blind Trust
programme.desc: A woman's body is found and investigators have little time and few clues to lead them to a killer who could strike again. Perpetrators try to conceal their crimes, yet savvy investigators can take the most obscure data and recreate a murder.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Haunted escape room at Moviescape - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation of the escape rooms and investigates the haunted bible and radio. Prepare for a fright when Sean and Paul join forces and witness paranormal activity firsthand

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Evil Spirit in the Cave
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension face a dark sinister ghost inside haunted Caves. Crank caves based in St Helens are said to be the most haunted in the area. Strange paranormal spirits spooky anyone that ventures inside.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: High Spirits at The Gothic Mansion
programme.desc: Bex and Sean investigate a haunting inside a gothic mansion, that is said to be haunted by the former owner of the building.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Spirits Flying High at Speke Aerodrome
programme.desc: The team head to Speke Airport to investigate claims that some of the aircraft located there have ghostly passengers still aboard, waiting to take flight.

programme.title: Past Hunters: The Block
programme.desc: The team investigate a disused factory in Burton-Upon-Trent. Reports of paranormal happenings are common and the team are ready for anything.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: WW2 Hospital Haunting
programme.desc: Built in the early 1900’s and now used as offices, a former world war hospital has become the new home for something supernatural. Strange voices, eerie footsteps and the sounds of painful screams have all been reported. What will be uncovered tonight?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: She's a Crazy Stalker
programme.desc: Victor met Jasmine a few years ago but claimed they never had sex. Jasmine claims that they fell in love and want him back! Who's telling the truth?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: These DNA Results Will Floor You
programme.desc: Joe met “Jessica” on a phone chat line. A few months later, she revealed she was pregnant. Then, Chastity claims that her ex Trent fathered her child. What will the DNA results reveal?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Punch a Woman like I Punch a Man
programme.desc: Chelse claims that her 19-month-old daughter is Malcolm's and that he beat her while pregnant. Amber and Phillip accuse each other of being abusive and want the polygraph tests to prove their claims!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Slept Around: Who's the Dad?
programme.desc: Tasha wants to prove to her ex Martin that he fathered her four-year-old. Martin's sister says that the child might belong to her boyfriend Terrence. Who's the real father?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Bullied Out of School
programme.desc: Aabrea and Jerae bullied a high school girl so badly that she dropped out. Can Steve help them resolve their differences and figure out why so many teens turn to bullying?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Extreme Deception Indicated
programme.desc: Joe and Tammy have been together for six years and they have two children. Joe faces cheating accusations again and returns to Steve's stage for his lie detector results!

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Eyes of a Child
programme.desc: A loving, churchgoing grandmother is found stabbed to death in her apartment, leaving Joe Kenda to wonder what sort of monster could do such a thing.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: City Of Fear
programme.desc: When a spate of violent robberies spreads terror across the city, Kenda and the major crimes unit are called in to bring the masked gunman to justice.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Setup
programme.desc: Douglas Warren stumbles into a downtown bar with a gunshot wound to the neck and bleeds out on the floor. Kenda must conduct a risky sting operation and launch an interstate manhunt.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Dead Weight
programme.desc: A seemingly random attack leaves Mary Moebus dead, and police flummoxed by a daunting field of suspects. But when Lt Joe Kenda uncovers a cache of new evidence, he realizes someone’s been lying.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lady in Red
programme.desc: A woman in red drops a dying man off at a firehouse… and then vanishes. Identifying the mystery woman is the hurdle Kenda must overcome in order to bring him justice.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Follow the Money
programme.desc: The body of a 72-year-old man is found in a junkyard, stabbed 13 times and wearing nothing but his underwear and dentures.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A hotel clerk calls 9-1-1 complaining of severe facial trauma, but he has no recollection of what happened and dies soon after. Police are counting on Dr. G to aid them in this investigation.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Dr. G has a challenge on her hands: a victim's body spent days decaying before it was found, and decomposition could get in the way of her investigation.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Vanished
programme.desc: A daring kidnapping and a bizarre ransom note baffled Mississippi authorities. The victim was the wife of a wealthy businessman. A list of 12 names and a few drops of blood were the only clues to her fate.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Heist
programme.desc: In Arizona, an armored van loaded with cash failed to reach its destination. Authorities suspected an inside job. When the vehicle was recovered with the drivers and the cash missing, those suspicions grew even more.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Unlawful Flight
programme.desc: In Alabama, two desperate criminals fled the custody of a local deputy. Eluding authorities, they made their way across the country in a wave of car theft, abduction, and murder.

programme.title: My Haunted House: The Boy Did It and Frozen Forest
programme.desc: A five-year-old boy claims that his imaginary friend pushed his sister through a second story window. A newly divorced woman relives the terrifying history of the remote cabin she's rented.

programme.title: My Ghost Story: It Watches Me While I Sleep
programme.desc: The suburban house of two young cousins is filled with scary encounters after a demonic ceramic giraffe is brought into their home.

programme.title: My Ghost Story: The Axe Murderer
programme.desc: An unknown axe murderer still stalks a family he brutally murdered a century ago and then next-door a spirit with a deadly secret haunts a young couple. An off the beaten path bar is stocked with other worldly spirits.

programme.title: My Ghost Story: An Entity in Bed
programme.desc: An entity jumps into a woman's bed and lies down beside her; two sisters' ghosts roam a Civil War-era house; a castle built on an old Indian burial ground is haunted by its original owner; and more.

programme.title: Death Walker with Nick Groff: Van Horn Mansion
programme.desc: Nick tries to contact a spirit to see if she'll reveal her cause of death.

programme.title: Mutant X: Brother's Keeper
programme.desc: Mutant X-teamet lærer om Lexas fremmede tvillingbror når han blir hovedmålet for en underjordisk operasjon som høster mutante organer.

programme.title: Mutant X: Possibilities
programme.desc: Brennan og Mutant X-teamet slår seg sammen med en tidsreisende mutant for å spre en bombe som truer ødeleggende konsekvenser.

programme.title: Mutant X: Conspiracy Theory
programme.desc: Mens Brennan og Shalimar etterforsker en mystisk flyulykke, tenker Lexa på fremtiden sin med Mutant X-teamet.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Devil Doll
programme.desc: En guide fører Sydney og Nigel til et uvanlig, underjordisk aztekisk gravkammer. I stedet for en kropp finner de en relikvie.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Incognito
programme.desc: Sydney og Nigel henter en mytisk lansett, og støter på Nigels likhet like før hans død. Nigel får et kutt fra lansetten. Senere overtaler Cate Nigel til å etterligne mannen.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: All Choked Up
programme.desc: Carson Inez, en samler, bruker et gammelt halskjede for å få Sydney til å hjelpe henne med å oppdra Athena, som deretter vil hjelpe henne med å erobre verden.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Nelly Crémel Case

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Drost Notthoff Case
programme.desc: On September 11th 2011, in Èze, near Monaco, the owner of a luxury villa discovers the lifeless hanging body of his tenant, a rich German businessman.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Françoise Desnoue Case
programme.desc: On the evening of August 30st 2013, in a small village of Bougrogne, Éric Desnoue, 52 years old, reports his wife missing to the police. Did Françoise Desnoue run away? Or did she reattempt to kill herself?

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Strange Hanging - Chantal Ternik Case

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 702

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: Da 32 år gamle Memo plutselig forsvinner, tar vennene hans saken i egne hender og begynner å lete desperat etter ham. Bekymringen forvandles til frykt når letingen fører til urovekkende oppdagelser.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: Natt til 13. februar 2023 rystes den lille bygda Malå i Nord-Sverige av et brutalt angrep. Etter hvert som politiet begynner å nøste opp i saken, dukker det opp mørke hemmeligheter og mistanker mot uventede personer.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 603
programme.desc: Politiet har ikke gitt opp å oppklare dobbeltdrapet i Linköping. Etter en endring i svensk lov i 2019, har politiet nå muligheten til å bruke kommersielle slektsdatabaser for å finne gjerningsmannen.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 304

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The Belgian Collaborator
programme.desc: Leon Degrelle, a charismatic Belgian leader, joined the Nazis and led Die Wallonien on the Eastern Front. Despite no military background, he earned the Knight's Cross for valor. He recruited 4000 more for the SS, defending Berlin until April 1945.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: The Misfits Gather
programme.desc: Hitler finds his political destiny in post-war Munich. He quickly dominates a fringe party & builds it into the Nazi Party. He recruits infamous men to the cause including Herman Goering & Heinrich Himmler & they plot a coup known as the Beerhall Putsch.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Closing the Ring
programme.desc: The Western Allies secure supply routes that will allow them to enter Germany, and the Ardennes counter-offensive fails. The Red Army advances rapidly. The SS implements the Holocaust.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Tanks have transformed warfare since their debut a century ago. Host Wil Willis traces their evolution from World War One breakthroughs to modern marvels like the M1 Abrams, the world's most powerful Main Battle Tank.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Could the mighty M2 be the greatest machine gun in history? Nicknamed “Ma Deuce”, this American machine gun has dominated battlefields for over 80 years. Host Wil Willis tests it and recreates Audie Murphy’s famous Medal of Honor moment.

programme.title: World's Messiest Fails
programme.desc: This holiday season, people are getting exactly what they asked for: a big old mess.

programme.title: World's Messiest Fails
programme.desc: From office oopsies to muddy mayhem, love tangles, and nature's chaos - mess takes the lead!

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: iCarly: En date med Freddie
programme.desc: Valerie er iCarly-fan og ber Freddie på date. Daten går så bra at Freddie begynner å filme Valeries eget webshow. Men når hennes webshow kommer i veien for iCarly, får Freddie problemer.

programme.title: iCarly: En lidenskapelig amatør
programme.desc: Carly inviterer Spencers kunsthelt, Harry Joyner, for å se på Spencers arbeid. Når Harry kaller Spensers ting amatørmessige, føler Spencer at livet har mistet all mening.

programme.title: iCarly: iCarlys største fan
programme.desc: iCarlys største fan, Mandy, blir invitert til showet som enslig studiopuplikum. Mandy viser seg å være mer av en forfølger enn et fan, og de blir nødt til å kvitte seg med henne.

programme.title: iCarly: Kyllinger på rømmen
programme.desc: Carly og Sam starter med å klekke ut kyllinger for et naturfagprosjekt. Kyllingene klekkes tidligere enn ventet og rømmer fra inkubatoren. Nå må Carly, Sam, Freddie og Spencer finne alle kyllingene rundt om i leiligheten.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg vil ikke krangle
programme.desc: Carly makes Sam en unik iCarly T-skjorte for å markere årsdagen for vennskapet deres. Men når Sam bytter den bort mot konsertbiletter, havner de to vennene i klammeri.

programme.title: iCarly: Dansende drømmer
programme.desc: iCarly ber fansen om å sende inn videoer av dem selv når de danser sine kuleste danser. Over tre tusen danseklipp kommer inn, og Carly, Sam og Freddie prøver å holde seg oppe hele natten for å se på alle videoene.

programme.title: iCarly: Det spøker på Halloween
programme.desc: Carly, Sam og Freddie sender iCarly fra en leilighet som det sies at det spøker i. Når det begynner å skje nifse ting, begynner også vennene å bli redde for at spøkelsesryktene er sanne.

programme.title: iCarly: En dag jeg vil angre
programme.desc: Spencer redder livet til hovedsangeren i The Plain White T's og får ham til å gå med på å delta i iCarly. Merkelige ting begynner å gå feil midt i Carlys, Sams og Freddies nettvideosending.

programme.title: iCarly: Gjensittingen
programme.desc: Sam må sitte igjen den kvelden iCarly holder sin 50. nettvideospesialsending. Carly og Freddie kan da altså ikke gjøre som de pleier, så de prøver så godt de kan å få gjennsitting de også, så de kan sende fra skolebenken med Sam.

programme.title: iCarly: Fotsår reklame
programme.desc: Carly, Sam og Freddie blir invitert til Dakas hovedkvarter, der de blir tilbudt en stor pengesum får å gå god for Dakas nye sko, Tech-foten, på iCarly. Men det viser seg at skoene er forferdelige.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg lover å ikke sladre
programme.desc: Carly får en B på historieprøven hun burde ha fått en A på. Sam, som griper sjansen på sitt ukentlige møte med rektor Franklin, forandrer Carlys karakter på datamaskinen og overrasker henne med A blank.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Dubstep
programme.desc: President Obama og hans vredeoversetter, Luther, taler til Mitt Romney, vi møter mannen som skulle holde tale etter Martin Luther Kings 'I Have A Dream'-tale, og to venner prater om hva som skjer med bæsjen deres atter at de skyller ned.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Bitch
programme.desc: I denne seriepremierer av komiprogrammet prøver Jordan Peele og Keegan Michael Key å si et forbudt ord om deres kvinner, Lil Wayne venner seg til livet bak lås og slå, og president Obama uttrykker hva han egentlig føler.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Dueling Magical Negroes
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan spiller to mystikere som kjemper om rettigheten til å gi skarpsindige råd. Andre sketsjer inkluderer Jaden Smith og hans agent som diskuterer et nytt manuskript, og et homsepar som 'feirer' ny lovgivning.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Severed Head Showcase
programme.desc: En gospel-gruppe må øve uten læreren sin, en gjeng krigere feirer en halshugning, en fange prøver å narre fengselsvakten og en ung mann blir konfrontert fordi han bare snakker i floskler.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Old Ladies And Satan
programme.desc: To gamle damer slåss mot Satan, ting går galt når en mann vil kjøpe en ny madrass og gjestene på en klubb tvinges til å se sannheten om seg selv.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Obama Shutdown
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer at Keegan blir litt for høy, en forballspiller som vil gjøre alt for å få rødt kort, og to sexeksperter som gir råd om cunnilingus.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Black Ice News
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer Samuel og Lashawn som gleder seg over fordelene ved sine nå lovlige ekteskap, en politibetjent som møter sin nye makker og Lando fra 'Star Wars' blir forfulgt av et superfan.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Non-Stop Party
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer en fyr som jager etter kjæresten sin til verdens ende og LMFAO som ikke kan holde opp med å feste.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Parole Officer Puppet
programme.desc: En tilsynsverge bruker en dukke til å knytte bånd til en person i hans varetekt, en mann med nakkestøtte prøver å feste villt og en soldat har en følelsesladet gjenforening med familien sin.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Pussy On The Chainwax
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer Keegan som blir distraheret mens han snakker i telefon med kjæresten sin, at Keegan og Jordan har en ondskapsfull sjef og hvordan et nytt uttrykk blir til.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Les Miz
programme.desc: Vi møter vikaren fra bykjernen Mr. Garvey og A-Aron, Jordans kjæreste tar ham i å se på porno og karene har det moro med Les Mis.

programme.title: Broad City: The Lockout
programme.desc: Når Abbi får sprøytet leiligheten sin mot skadedyr og Ilana mister nøklene sine, blir jentene nødt til å bo på gaten - akkurat når Abbi har sin første kunstutstilling.

programme.title: Broad City: P*$$Y Weed
programme.desc: Jentene må bli voksne! Abbi vil kjøpe sin egen marihuana, som en voksen kvinne, mens Ilana må takle skatten på egen hånd. Og, jentene er høye som hus.

programme.title: Broad City: Fattest Asses
programme.desc: Når Abbi innser at hun er for snill, blir hun mere bitchy. Ilana bestemmer seg for å nå sitt fulle potential. De går på en eksklusiv fest og møter noen eventyrlige DJ-er. Nå kan ingenting gå galt.

programme.title: Broad City: Hurricane Wanda
programme.desc: Abbi og Ilana klarer sig igennem stormen med hjælp fra deres venner (Jaimé, Lincoln og Jeremy), men de får desværre selskab af Bevers og hans søster. Et spil 'Who Done It?' udspiller sig, mens orkanan raser udenfor.

programme.title: Broad City: In Heat
programme.desc: Ilana leter febrilsk etter en gave i siste øyeblikk til Lincoln, mens Abbi prøver å finne et klimaanlegg for å få det kjølig på soveværelset.

programme.title: Broad City: Mochalatta Chills
programme.desc: Der dukker opp nye muligheter når Abbi endelig kan trene noen på Soulstice og Ilana gjør suksess som firmasjef.

programme.title: Broad City: Wisdom Teeth
programme.desc: Abbi skal trekke visdomstennene og Ilana ser det som sin plikt å passe henne til hun får det bedre - noe som selvfølgelig innebærer en masse 'medikamenter' og en total mangel på tilsyn.

programme.title: Broad City: Knockoffs
programme.desc: Abbi og Jeremy går på en date som ender med en overraskelse. Ilana og hennes mor leter etter den perfekte håndvesken.

programme.title: Broad City: Hashtag FOMO
programme.desc: Jentene leter etter den perfekte fest, noe som avslører en underlig og surrealistisk side av Abbi, som igjen bekrefter Ilanas verste anelser.

programme.title: Broad City: Citizen Ship
programme.desc: Gjengen skal feire at Jaime har blitt amerikansk statsborger, men Bevers fører Abbi og Ilana på avveier med å love dem gratis sprit. Imens må Lincoln og Jaime klare seg selv blandt alle advokatene.

programme.title: Broad City: Coat Check
programme.desc: Abbi prøver å finne en forsvunnet frakk, mens Ilana utforsker en ny romanse - som føles merkelig kjent.

programme.desc: Good news and bad news for Wiegel: her boyfriend proposed, but he's going to be executed for multiple murders.

programme.title: RENO 911!: The Junior Bros.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Jet Ski Blues

programme.title: RENO 911!: Rick's On It

programme.title: RENO 911!: Spanish Mike Comes Back

programme.desc: The deputies vow to avenge Sheriff Chechekevitch's death, and Wiegel studies with Lamaze instructor Guy Gerricault.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Corporate Sponsor
programme.desc: Hotty's Restaurants sponsors the Reno Sheriff's Department, and the gang gets burned by the deal.

programme.desc: Dave gets Oprah pregnant and recalls being a member of the O.J. Simpson trial jury.

programme.desc: Crack addict Tyrone Biggums visits an elementary school.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Zapped & It's a Wonderful Chest
programme.desc: Dave screens his failed reality TV show and shares outtakes from "Roots."

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Reparations & NY Boobs
programme.desc: Great New York boobs get awards, and Dave predicts reparations chaos.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Great Moments in Hookup History & Ask a Black Dude
programme.desc: With time running out, Martin Johnson has one last stab at glory: Ashley "Smashly" Evans.

programme.title: Tosh.0: ToshCon: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Daniel reunites with past guests at the inaugural ToshCon, interviews BYU's first openly gay valedictorian for a job and gives a special thank you to his fans.

programme.title: Tosh.0: September 17, 2019 - SteveWillDoIt
programme.desc: Daniel examines a swinging tattoo convention, tests social media star SteveWillDoIt's limits, talks sports in Around the Horn.0 and unveils the Aussie Viddie of the Weekie.

programme.title: Tosh.0: September 24, 2019 - Brother K
programme.desc: Daniel meets with "intactivist" Brother K, teams up with Dom Irrera to quiz a focus group about racist terms and examines a video of a dog dancing to an accordion.

programme.title: Tosh.0: October 1, 2019 - "I Eat Ass" Free Speech Defender
programme.desc: Daniel gets his staff fired up for tape day, interviews an ass-eating First Amendment protector and is unnerved by videos of a man who pies himself in the face.

programme.title: Tosh.0: October 8, 2019 - Misha
programme.desc: Daniel reviews a college student's shocking night, meets a 12-year-old with a love for songs about video games, and reveals what it's really like to attend a live taping.

programme.title: Tosh.0: October 15, 2019 - BarSoap Guy
programme.desc: Daniel welcomes his best-smelling guest ever and wealth-shames young people on TikTok.

programme.title: Tosh.0: October 22, 2019 - Burping Girl
programme.desc: Daniel takes inspiration from a woman who sprayed milk from her breasts at a music festival, is taught how to slackline at the office and meets with a renowned burp fetishist.

programme.title: Tosh.0: October 29, 2019 - Super Bitch
programme.desc: Daniel looks at a gross way to maximize soup intake, meets a viral superhero with an anti-bullying message and watches parents traumatize their kids for Halloween.

programme.title: Tosh.0: November 5, 2019 - Pot Brothers at Law
programme.desc: Daniel breaks down a video of a father-son napping duo, meets two brothers who practice law and have a penchant for pot, and helps Todd Glass tame his prank show.

programme.title: Tosh.0: November 12, 2019 - Dumped Wife's Revenge
programme.desc: Daniel suffers an unfortunate pool-ball injury, sits down with a divorcee-turned-Instagram influencer and starts a podcast dedicated to trashing an old foe.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline, who is trying to face single life bravely, tries her hand at an evening on the town alone, with a little coaching from Richard.

programme.title: Caroline in the City

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline's naive, helpful nature comes out in full bloom when she starts catering to her new elderly neighbor, Miriam, but Annie thinks Caroline is being taken advantage of.

programme.title: Caroline in the City

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline has difficulty confronting her neglectful building superintendent, Mr. Tedescu about her faulty plumbing, so she hires a mediator to pressure Mr. Tedescu into taking care of her request.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Richard is stunned when his former love Julia informs him that she is about to be married.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: In the ongoing charade of Caroline pretending that she and Richard are married.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: A remorseful Caroline panics when she realizes that several hours have passed since she poured her heart out to Richard on his answering machine -- and she hasn't heard a response from him.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline realizes that the constant aching in her neck could be related to the stress she feels over her unresolved feelings toward Richard, but she doesn't let it get in the way of helping Richard navigate through troubled waters with Julia.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline feigns having read a writer’s novel to impress him, but their first date is a disaster as Caroline’s charade crumbles. Meanwhile, Richard jumps to Julia’s rescue when her waitress job at Remo’s leaves her customers hungry for attention.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Alex feels sympathy for a fare who’s a real loser with the women and arranges a date for the man with Elaine, who later discovers that her klutzy companion for the evening is a U.S. Congressman.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby’s career dreams come true when he lands a role in a soap opera, prompting him to throw his torn-up cabbie’s license at Louie, but the dispatcher vows to take revenge if Bobby ever comes crawling back.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: After an operation, Louie, the sharp-tongued dispatcher, panics when he has to keep a promise that he made to God during surgery to turn over a new leaf.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Mechanic Latka Gravas’ youthful and attractive mother makes her first visit to America, and after she and Alex meet and have an evening love affair, Latka assumes that he will soon be getting a new daddy.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When Alex’s ear is nearly shot off in a holdup attempt in his cab, he stuns his fellow cabbies by quitting and exchanging his driving clothes for a waiter’s tuxedo at a snobbish French restaurant.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies fall victim to a Hollywood-style roller coaster ride when a production company visits to do a film on taxi drivers. Life at the Sunshine Cab Company turns into a continual champagne and buffet festivity.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When John crashes Cab 804, the cabbies are shocked into a period of mourning, as they reminisce about the wild and memorable events that occurred when they were driving the legendary cab.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Mechanic Latka Gravas frantically works to save the cracked-up Cab 804 as the cabbies fondly recall times in the legendary auto when Alex delivered a baby, Louie beat a rich brat out of a wad of money, and Elaine met the perfect man.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: It’s a dream come true for Tony when he’s challenged by an aging ex-champ, but he has more than just a fight on his hand when the opposition unveils its secret weapon.
