programme.title: The Hills: When Lauren's Away...
programme.desc: Når Lauren drar på ferie med familien, ting går galt i Los Angeles. Stephanie dater Doug bak Laurens rygg, og Audrina og Heidi blir venner.

programme.title: The Hills: Don't Act Innocent
programme.desc: Sannheten om Stephanies forhold til Laurens eks Doug kommer til slutt fram når de alle møtes på Dougs poolparty. Heidis mor kommer overraskende på besøk til LA og havner i en konfrontasjon med Spencer.

programme.title: The Hills: If She Never Met Spencer...
programme.desc: Lauren får et brev fra Heidi hvor hun beklager og innser at det er bare én ting som hindrer dem fra å bli venner igjen. Audrina starter å date en ny fyr for å gjøre Justin sjalu, men planen går feil.

programme.title: The Hills: Who To Choose?
programme.desc: Audrina møter sin gamle flamme Corey igjen og sjonglerer plutselig to gutter. Spencer tvinger Heidi til å sparke ut søsteren hennes Holly fra leiligheten.

programme.title: The Hills: You'll Never Have This
programme.desc: Lauren og Audrina reiser til Cabo for Brody bursdag, men når Justin blir sjalu av Audrinas nye forhold, blir festen en slåsskamp. Spencer ydmyker Stephanie etter å funnet ut at hennes nye kjæreste er venn med Brody.

programme.title: The Hills: I Want You To Be With Me
programme.desc: Lauren prøver å skape fred mellom Brody og Stephanie. Audrina ønsker å få ting til å fungere med Corey, men Justin vil ikke gi slipp på henne. Stephanie tviler på sin nye kjæreste etter at han bryter sitt løfte om å stå opp mot Brody.

programme.title: The Hills: It's Her Move
programme.desc: Audrina får sitt eget sted, og håper at Justin vil flytte inn hos henne, men alle frykter at hun flytter av feil grunn. Heidi inviterer Spencer til et arrangement med jobben, og blir tatt i å ha litt for mye moro.

programme.title: The Hills: Back To New York
programme.desc: Whitney reiser til New York og den nye gutten Jay stjeler oppmerksomheten hennes. Heidi er nedfor etter å ha fått sparken, og da Spencer snakker med Brent for å få jobben hennes tilbake, gjør han bare situasjonen verre.

programme.title: The Hills: One Last Chance
programme.desc: Lauren lar Heidis søster sove over hos seg. Justin ber Audrina med på tur for en romantisk helg, og Heidis frustrasjon med Spencer vokser etter at hun må tigge for å få jobben tilbake.

programme.title: The Hills: You Did This
programme.desc: Audrina tror på et rykte hun hører: at Lauren har rotet med Justin. I mellomtiden prøver Holly å få Heidi bort fra Spencer.

programme.title: The Hills: It's About Trust
programme.desc: Audrina forsøker å redde vennskapet med Lauren etter å ha anklaget henne for å rote med Justin. Spencer og Stephanie besøker bestemoren deres, som er lei av at de krangler.

programme.title: The Hills: Dream Boy, Dream Job
programme.desc: Whitney blir tilbudt drømmejobben i NYC og håper å få møte Jay der. Lauren blir nostalgisk da foreldrene selger huset i Laguna Beach, og Stephanie ber Spencer om hjelp da hun ikke klarer å bestemme seg for hva hun skal gjøre med Cameron.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: You Can't Get Divorced Twice
programme.desc: Kyra og Davids forhold settes på prøve da eksen de fryktet dukker opp. Sannhetsbrettet gjør så alle i villaen stiller spørsmål ved sin egen virkelighet. Ranin og Elias kjemper for å finne ut hva vennskap betyr etter skilsmissen.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Ready For More Baggage?
programme.desc: En ny eks dukker opp med gaver med en overraskende vri. Bryce får hjertesorg og gråter etter sjokkerende nyheter om Nicole. Hemmelighullet tilfører mer bagasje enn huset fikser.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Exes Court is Now In Session
programme.desc: Kyra er splittet; hun må velge Emily eller David. Noe som gjør at en av dem slynges ut i sjalusi. . Mikes eksplosive oppførsel presser Arisce ennå lenger unna. Hemmeligheter avsløres når parene stilles overfor sannhetsbrettet i den endelige dommen.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Something Like The Truth
programme.desc: En eks kommer på verst mulig tid, og snur opp ned på Da'vonne og Alains nye romanse. Hemmelighullet gir anspenthet og gjør at et par stiller spørsmål ved forholdet sitt i syv minutter da de gjennomgår hverandres mobiler.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Where's The Lie?
programme.desc: Derynn havner i hemmelighullet hvor en overraskende gjest gir henne et skikkelig perspektiv på sitt forhold til Ricky. Rays spill avslører ham da Alexis avslører en hemmelighet. Det siste sannhetsbrettet setter alle på pinebenken.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Setting Sail On A Relation-Ship
programme.desc: Sannhetsbrettet skaper uorden og singlene må fatte en siste avgjørelse om de skal forlate øya med eksen eller alene. Hvem vil stå igjen i havnen?

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1978 Cadillac Sedan DeVille
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen Niles Cadillac Sedan DeVille. Nile ruller hjem i en mørkerosa metallic bil med bagasjerommet fullt av nye sko.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1986 Oldsmobile Cutlass Supreme
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet Logans Oldsmobile Cutlass Supreme. Logan ruller hjem med basketgulv og lakk i to farger.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1992 Honda Civic
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet Christines Honda Civic. Tre dager etter at avsnittet med Christine ble sendt, døde en nær slektning av magekreft.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1990 Mitsubishi Mirage
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Antwons Mitsubishi Mirage. Antwon ruller hjem på 18-tommersdekk og med et akvarium i baksetet.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1967 Ford Mustang
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper West Coast Customs Marys Ford Mustang. Bilen hennes utstyres med det aller nyeste innen flatskjerm-tv.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1985 Ford Ranger
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Jareds Ford Ranger. Jared ruller i vei tre tommer lavere, nylakkert i metallic oransje.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Pontiac Trans Am
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper West Coast Customs Danelles Pontiac Trans Am. Hun triller i vei i en bil utstyrt med kaffetrakter og krystallkrone.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1974 Chevy Luv
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen fra West Coast Customs Neils Chevrolet LUV Truck. Han triller av gårde i et campingtelt på hjul.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1989 Ford Mustang
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen fra West Coast Customs Shondas Ford Mustang Convertible. Hun ruller i vei i et pimpet og helt trafikksikkert kjøretøy.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Maxima Station Wagon
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Ezras Nissan Maxima Station Wagon. Han kjører av gårde i en mobil DJ-bås.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Volkswagen Baja
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Krissys Volkswagen Baja Bug. Boblen fra 1969 ble konstruert med holdbarhet som mål. Men med sitt bøyde eksosrør og sine ødelagte dører, kan den virkelig beskrives som alt annet enn akkurat det.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1987 Honda CRX
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Brians Honda CRX. Det er den første bilen som får en splitter ny motor, ettersom den gamle dør innen Xzibit får den inn på verkstedet.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Great Ex-pectations
programme.desc: Guttenes ekser blir invitert til skittentøyvask i en utfordring som skaper forlegenhet. Gio og Stephen får endelig høre sannheten når det gjelder Julia.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Third Eye Blind
programme.desc: Gamle konflikter koker over og huset går i oppløsning når en kjempekonflikt fører til sjokk og tårer. Med kun to parseremonier igjen, prøver huset desperat å bruke strategi for å vinne.

programme.title: Are You The One?: All or Nothing
programme.desc: Det er alt eller ingenting når siste og tiende parseremoni går av stabelen. Strategi fører til at gruppa tror på én parvariant, men Asaf vakler mellom å følge hjertet eller å være en lagspiller.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Swipe Right for Love
programme.desc: 22 single flytter inn i et hus i New Orleans for å prøve å finne sammen som 11 perfekte par og vinne $ 1,000,000. Parene dannes hardt og fort kjærlighetstrekanter tar form.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Shot Through the Heart
programme.desc: Malcolms flørting skaper problemer når han føler seg fanget mellom Diandra og Nurys. Keith og Alexis prøver å knuse hverandres hjerte ved å date andre mennesker.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Love in Limbo
programme.desc: De sterkeste parene i huset settes på prøve når folk begynner å tvile på deres forbindelser. Michael ryster huset ved å prøve å ødelegge flere av forholdene.

programme.title: MTV Teen Mom
programme.desc: Opplev de dramatiske øyeblikkene når de unge mødrene takler hverdagslige utfordringer eller opplever uforglemmelige øyeblikk. Det er uavbrutt drama hele dagen, hver dag.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The teams submit to the annual blind taste test challenge. The winners spend a day at a water park while the losers make deliveries, grind peppercorn, change the oil in the fryers and peel potatoes.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The remaining chefs create their own menus in the toughest challenge yet, chef Ramsay relies on diner comment cards for his brutally honest criticism.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Spurred on by a gospel choir serenade, the contestants must find inspiration from the American Deep South for a Southern-style menu.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The teams have to prepare three dishes of Chef Ramsay's choosing, taking it in turns to complete the dish. One team feels the heat during service and needs help from their rivals to get the food out.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The chefs compete against a team of former runners-up in a dinner-service showdown.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Each of the chefs try to teach a student how to re-create one of Ramsay's signature dishes, before serving an Italian-themed finale.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Ingen utvei
programme.desc: Da Alex og Trivette blir bortført av Walkers erkefiende og plassert i en tank med iskaldt vann, må Walker redde dem før de drukner.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Våpenbrødre
programme.desc: Da Walker og Trivette forsøker å stoppe en våpenhandel, oppdager de at Trivettes forsvunne bror står bak handelen.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Gåter
programme.desc: Mens Walker og Trivette er på sporet av en innsatt på rømmen, etterforsker CD det mystiske dødsfallet til sin venns sønn.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Maktens engler
programme.desc: Walker og Trivette tar en lånehai som utnytter en prests sønn.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Jakobs stige
programme.desc: Walker, Trivette og Alex må beskytte et nabolag mot en gjeng som bruker brann for å skremme vitner og dreper brannmenn.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: I faresonen, del 1
programme.desc: Walker og Alex blir fanget i et flyvrak som synker til bunns i en avsidesliggende innsjø.

programme.title: MTV Cribs: Redman, Eddie George, Howie Dorough
programme.desc: Featuring the homes of Redman, Howie (Backstreet Boys) and Eddie George - NFL.

programme.title: MTV Cribs: Chyna, Usher, Tony Hawk
programme.desc: Featuring the homes of Chyna, Usher, Tony Hawk.

programme.title: Made: Punk Rocker
programme.desc: Straight-A goody goody, Gracie Moreau wants to get noticed by being MADE into a Punk Rocker.

programme.title: Made: Ladies Man
programme.desc: A dorky, desperate, hygienically challenged senior wants to land his very first date and kiss by being MADE into an irresistible chick magnet. The catch? He has to get a girl to ask HIM out to the school dance.

programme.title: Made: Prom Queen - Kristy
programme.desc: Kristy McCallan wants to break out of her shy shell and dazzle her doubters by being MADE into a cool and confident Prom Queen.

programme.title: My Super Sweet 16 NO
programme.desc: Missed your Sweet 16? Throw a Sweet 18! That's what these triplets did when planning their Vegas themed birthday. Dealing with these three sisters means triple the drama!

programme.title: My Super Sweet 16 NO
programme.desc: A private jet to Vegas for dress shopping, 100% pure silver invitations and a hot VIP list is Lila's dream come true. So why did her mom go and hire those Latin dancers?

programme.title: My Super Sweet 16 NO
programme.desc: Years ago Jazmin lived in foster care. Now she's living large thanks to having been adopted by rich parents, and she's anxious to have a Sweet 16 to make up for all of the birthdays she's missed.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Pendulum
programme.desc: Dean Stockwell guest stars as Gunnar Malstrom, one of the leaders of Pendulum -- a secret terrorist organization -- who has a plan involving a major attack on the government that the Impossible Missions Force is assigned to uncover.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Western
programme.desc: Ed Nelson guest stars as Van Cleve, a brilliant thief who is convinced by the IMF that he has the power of precognition as part of its plan to recover the more than five million dollars worth of art treasures that he has stolen.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Imitation
programme.desc: Singer Barbara McNair guest stars as Jena Cole, the beautiful leader of a band of jewel thieves who falls in love with Barney who himself has infiltrated her operation to recover the stolen crown jewels of a foreign nation.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: TOD-5
programme.desc: To locate a terrorist ring called Alpha Group, the IMF convinces turncoat intelligence agent Gordon Holt (played by guest star Peter Haskell) that he's been exposed to the stolen biological weapon he's been hired to deliver.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Cocaine
programme.desc: William Shatner guest stars as Joe Conrad, a drug dealer who becomes the unwitting dupe of the Impossible Missions Force in their plan to capture the largest shipment of cocaine ever brought into the country.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 401
programme.desc: I første episode møter vi Tine og Lars, som har svimlende åtte millioner å kjøpe hus og pusse opp for. Men det store budsjettet har ikke hjulpet dem så langt - kan ekspertene være til hjelp?

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 402
programme.desc: Ekspertene drar til Hørning, der presten og hennes familie trenger et nytt sted å bo. De leier et lite rekkehus og nå vil de gjerne flytte.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 404
programme.desc: Ida og Rasmus drømmer om å bytte ut sine lille leiebolig på Nørrebro med en murervilla i Hillerød. Men de angrer bittert på at de har spurt ekspertene om hjelp når de får se huset pengene gikk til.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 405
programme.desc: Anna Thora og Jonas har to små barn - og en drøm om å bo sammen med besteforeldrene. Så ekspertene leter etter et hus som har plass til to familier, med plass til alle og deres behov.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Stockholm
programme.desc: When Tareq arrives in Stockholm he will meet innovation and world class gastronomy, a big city for foodies. He will make some pizza at the Rosendal garden café and go on an adventure in the archipielago.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Lolland
programme.desc: When Michelin star chefs move from Copenhagen to the countryside, they often end up in Lolland/Falster. Here Tareq will meet Claus Meyer the father of new nordic cuisine and other entrepreneurs that opened interesting restaurants here.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Skåne
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor explores his own backyard of Skåne and hometown of Malmö, a multi cultural food mix. Here you can find food and culture from all over the world that makes it a unique culinary destination.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Best Of
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor looks back on some of the food adventures he has been part of in the program series Nordic Cookery. Tareq promises delicacies from all over the Nordics and meetings with fantastic people along the way.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Läckö & Kinnekulle
programme.desc: By Lake Vänern you find Läckö and Kinnekulle, an area rich in history, culture and traditions. Tareq cooks exciting dishes on vendice roe, fish and local cheeses - all served on porcelain from the world-famous Rörstrand.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Sjuhärad
programme.desc: Sjuhärad is nature and culture in perfect symbiosis. Tareq takes the bike to meet some of the food entrepreneurs in the area who have started exciting new businesses. Here you live close to nature, forest and lakes.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Greater Copenhagen
programme.desc: Copenhagen and Skåne are a hot food destinations. Tareq visits Østergro, Denmark's first "rooftop farm" in the middle of Copenhagen, Eden in the new district Hyllie, Malmö and Häckeberga Castle where there will be wild boar for dinner.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Höganäs
programme.desc: The wild coast at Kullaberg in Skåne has a lot of culture and gastronomy to offer. Fantastic ceramics, vineyards and world-class ice cream. Tareq visits VikenTomater and cooks vegetarian ragù

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The Geordies React: Episode 203
programme.desc: Geordie Shore-gjengen er sammen med James, Holly og Abbies bestemor for en ny episode av The Geordies React! Finn ut hva de syns når de ser seg selv i serien. I denne episoden feirer Marnie bursdagen sin med karnivalfest.

programme.title: Geordie OGs: Their Story: Geordie OGs: Marnie's Story
programme.desc: Marnie Simpson ser tilbake på sitt liv og reisen fra Geordie Shores villbasse til heltidsmamma.

programme.title: Geordie OGs: Their Story: Geordie OGs: Holly's Story
programme.desc: Holly Hagan ser tilbake på sitt uvanlige liv. Fra å bli berømt på Geordie Shore til å drive kampanjer mot nettroll, og forlove seg med drømmemannen.

programme.title: Geordie OGs: Their Story: Geordie OGs: Aaron & Sophie's Story
programme.desc: Fra å jobbe på oljerigger til å feste verden rundt. Aaron forteller livshistorien sin. Mens Sophie forteller hvordan berømmelse endret livet hennes permanent og hvordan hun forlot festingen...nesten.

programme.title: Geordie OGs: Their Story: Geordie OGs: Gary's Story
programme.desc: Gary forteller historien om hans tidlige liv og overgangen fra maksimal gutt til heltidspappa.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Warm Welcome Home
programme.desc: Bli med en gjeng med gutter og jenter helt gira og klare for 6 ukers full fest i Newcastle. Det dreier seg om veltrente kropper og ville netter på jakt etter mulige klinemål. Har du først blitt Geordie, er det ingen vei tilbake.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: One Shot
programme.desc: Sommeren går mot slutten, men dramaet er ikke over. Pauly får en stalker, og en deltaker havner i fengsel etter en slåsskamp.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: That's How The Shore Goes
programme.desc: Ronnie slipper ut, og Snooki får trøst etter et møte med eksen. Gjengen tar farvel med The Shore, men ikke uten en siste tur i boblebadet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Season 1 Reunion
programme.desc: Man får svar på mange spørsmål når Snooki, The Situation, Jwoww, DJ Pauly D, Angelina, Ronnie, Sammi og Vinny kommer tilbake for mer krangling og innsikt i hva som faktisk foregikk i strandhuset i Jersey Shore.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Goin' South
programme.desc: Gjengen skal til Miami! Mike, Pauly D, Snooki og JWoww kjører, mens de andre tar fly. Tidligere deltaker Angelina skaper drama. Ronnie og Sammi er blitt single, men det er fortsatt komplisert.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: The Hangover
programme.desc: Sammi vil vite hva Ronnie gjorde på klubben kvelden før, men ingen vil si det. Angelina avbryter Paulys spill, og den vanligvis så rolige Pauly D viser en helt ny side.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Creepin'
programme.desc: Angelina ber jentene om unnskyldning. Mike, Vinny og Pauly leker med granater i boblebadet, og Ron fortsatt har hemmeligheter for Sammi.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: God Bless the Child
programme.desc: With Catherine's help, a pregnant teenage hooker is welcomed into the tunnels. Complications arise when she falls in love with Vincent.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Sticks and Stones
programme.desc: A deaf girl, who used to live below, falls in with a street gang that threatens to put an end to her first serious love affair.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: A Fair and Perfect Knight
programme.desc: Catherine befriends a boy from the world below who leaves the tunnels to go college.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Labyrinths
programme.desc: A young man gets lost in the tunnel world and he is found by the inhabitants. They're uncertain if they should let him go because they're not sure if he can be trusted to keep their secret.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Brothers
programme.desc: Vincent's "brother" Devin returns with Charles, a hideously deformed man seeking sanctuary.

programme.title: JAG: Against All Enemies
programme.desc: Harm, Mac and Bud board an aircraft carrier in the Sea of Japan to investigate the accidental shooting down of a North Korean civilian airliner by Navy jets.

programme.title: JAG: Impact
programme.desc: Harm and Bud investigate the crash of a Marine helicopter whose dead pilot is being blamed for the incident. They discover the chopper seems to have been hit by some form of UFO. Government security officials want to maintain a cover-up at all costs.

programme.title: JAG: People V. Rabb
programme.desc: Harm is arrested by the FBI for the murder of Konaplanik, a Russian who was selling Harm supposedly accurate information about his missing father's whereabouts. The killer turns out to be Col. Tomashevsky, a Russian agent.

programme.title: JAG: Defensless
programme.desc: A woman Navy ensign shoots and kills a Turkish colonel; she claims self-defense.

programme.title: JAG: With Intent to Die
programme.desc: With help from Harm, Mac, Harriet, and Bud, Admiral Chedwiggen investigates the apparent suicide of his mentor, Admiral Clancy, who allegedly shot himself while on a hunting trip. Harm and company ultimately uncover who the killer was.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Command Performance/ Sketchy Love/ Hyde And Seek
programme.desc: A mother and daughter are shocked to see the girl's long-lost father entertaining passengers as the cruise comedian. Plus, a teenager pursues Gopher and drastically changes her appearance to try and catch his eye.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Doc's Big Case/ Senior Sinners/ Abooming Romance
programme.desc: When a former medical-school friend (James Noble) becomes the center of attention, Doc wonders if he made the right career decision. Meanwhile, a reticent computer genius tries to win the affection of a woman who has eyes for another man

programme.title: The Love Boat: Going To The Dogs / Women'S Best Friend / Whose Dog Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Capt. Stubing and his crew host passengers and their pooches for the Honeycutt $10.000 Dog Show competition commencing in Acapulco.

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Spoonmaker Diamond - Part 1
programme.desc: A famous diamond is stolen from a museum in Istanbul just as the Pacific Princess is sailing the Aegean Sea. Doc proposes marriage to a beautiful woman who is more interested in someone else.

programme.title: Happy Days: Cruisin'
programme.desc: Richie, Potsie, and Ralph Malph visit another part of town to meet some girls and find themselves in trouble when the girls' boyfriends show up. Fonzie steps in to save the day.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fearless Fonzarelli Part I
programme.desc: For a television show, the Fonz sets a record by jumping his motorcycle over fourteen garbage cans. He ends up crashing into Arnold's chicken stand, and while recuperating from a broken leg, upsets the regimen of the Cunningham household.

programme.title: Happy Days: Football Frolics
programme.desc: To raise money for the big football game, the boys decide to start their own babysitting service. In Football Frolics, Richie, Potsie and Ralph have their hopes set on seeing the big football game of the year, but tickets can't be found anywhere.

programme.title: Happy Days: Two Angry Men
programme.desc: When Fonzie sets a pigeon coop atop the Cunningham garage and the roof caves, Mr. Cunningham sues to collect damages. In Two Angry Men, Laverne and Shirley prevail upon Fonzie to care for a coop of pigeons.

programme.title: Happy Days: Sight for Sore Eyes
programme.desc: After reading too many foreign car manuals, Fonzie is plagued with headaches and is forced to wear glasses for a few weeks, but fears glasses aren't cool.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie Loves Pinky Part II
programme.desc: The Malachi brothers sabotage Pinky's car the night before the demolition derby.

programme.title: Happy Days: The Physical
programme.desc: A short-tempered sergeant loses his tenuous grasp on discipline when the Fonz reports to the army recruitment center soon after draftees Richie, Ralph and Potsie check in for physicals.

programme.title: Happy Days: The Apartment
programme.desc: Personality quirks begin to fray nerves after best friends Richie, Ralph, and Potsie rent an apartment together.

programme.title: MacGyver: Gx-1
programme.desc: Working behind the iron curtain to destroy the wreckage of a top-secret jet, MacGyver comes to the aid of a renowned Russian psychic who wishes to defect.

programme.title: MacGyver: Jack in the Box
programme.desc: MacGyver and old buddy Jack Dalton are arrested and thrown into a labor camp, only to discover they are being used by the local authorities to search for some hidden bank robbery loot.

programme.title: MacGyver: Widowmaker
programme.desc: MacGyver and Nikki are trapped by old nemesis Murdoc and are forced to flee down the side of a sheer rock formation where an old friend of MacGyver's lost her life.

programme.title: MacGyver: Hell Week
programme.desc: MacGyver comes to the aid of college student David Ryman, distraught over losing a Physics contest sponsored by David's father, a professor at MacGyver's alma mater.

programme.title: MacGyver: Blow Out
programme.desc: Nikki unknowingly becomes the target of an international terrorist group, planning to detonate bombs across the city in exchange for the release of their recently imprisoned leader.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Ta frem bestikket! Fire fremmede konkurrerer om penger og tittelen som den ultimate vert for middagsselskapet, følg med for en spicy konkurranse.

programme.title: Matlock: The Capital Offense
programme.desc: It’s a race against time as Matlock tries to save conman Adam Spangler from being executed for a murder he claims he never committed.

programme.title: Matlock: The Haunted (Part 1)
programme.desc: Against Matlock’s approval, his associate, Cliff Lewis, advertises for a private client. He is hired by a flaky woman who becomes the main suspect in the murder of the plastic surgeon she sued.

programme.title: Matlock: The Kidnapping (Part 1)
programme.desc: After a failed attempt to kidnap Matlock’s daughter, the kidnappers take Matlock’s friend instead! Matlock tries to track down his friend, meanwhile, he’s asked to investigate the kidnapping of an eight-year-old boy.

programme.title: Matlock: The Temptation
programme.desc: What begins as a simple home burglary evolves into a very strange series of events for professional thief Kevin Gilliam.

programme.title: Matlock: The Crook
programme.desc: The church choir hits a sour note when parishioner Wally McDaniels, is accused of murder. McDanielsturns to fellow choir member Ben Matlock to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: When Steve is shot and falls into a coma, Mark does all in his power to find the assailant, even threatening a suspect with bodily harm.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: This episode takes place four months after Mark was convicted of murder. Steve is slowly recovering from his wounds and Mark is still rotting in prison.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A hospital emergency preparedness drill turns deadly when an unpopular and ambitious nurse is found dead amid the chaos with an eccentric artist the only witness.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A spat between a girl and her boyfriend leads to an apparent murder, leaving the girl and her mother with a dead body, just as dinner guests Mark and Amanda arrive.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A madman charges into a Lamaze class with a bomb, claiming that a fertility doctor was cheating him. Everything is complicated further when said doctor turns up dead.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Ratings seeking stunts by TV talk show hosts Darren & Mary have tragic results.

programme.desc: Følg med huseiere når de tar valget om å endre livsstilen sin og bytte ut bylivet med det rolige livet på landet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Vin Day
programme.desc: The San Diego trip comes to a close on a high note with a day of exercise, drinking, and strippers, and Vinny has a heart-to-heart with Angelina.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Reunion Part 1
programme.desc: Tvs flotteste italienske familie er tilbake på gjenforenings-scenen og holder ingenting tilbake... er Angeliners endelig blitt skilt? Er gamle Sitch borte for alltid?

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Reunion Part 2
programme.desc: Dine favorittsamboere er ikke klare ennå! Vinny og Angelina blir vågede, kjøttbollene uttrykker sin ville side og spenningen stiger så en samboer drar for å kjøle seg ned.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Where's the Charcuterie?
programme.desc: Samboerne samler seg rundt Mike, da han tar farvel med sin elskede hund, Mosey.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Sliding Into DMs
programme.desc: Snooki gjør Deena, Angelina og JWoww til en heiagjeng. Mike leder Rocky når han trener for 'Super Hole 3 Corn Hole Championships'.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Lake Jersey
programme.desc: Bare en vanlig dag ved sjøen, med seiling, drikking, krangel og lapdans.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The challenger is one of the few Mexican food specialists in Tokyo. This is a Latin duel at Kitchen Stadium.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Andre Pachon is the leader of the French chef community in Japan. Several of his apprentices have already appeared, but this time Pachon sends his number one man.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The younger sibling of the Liang brothers, rulers of Cantonese cuisine in Japan, faces the Iron Chef Chinese.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chef Chen engages Challenger Lian Su Qin using konnyaku, a unique Japanese healthy food.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The challenger is a woman who knows what she likes. As an elite culinary critic, she trained at Le Cordon Bleu and as well as Taillevent, an elite French restaurant in Paris.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The former Iron Chef Michiba decides that Morimoto needs some help finding his feet, so he recruits his number one sous-chef from his own days at Kitchen Stadium.

programme.title: Ridiculousness

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' går Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood på trynet i gresset idet de 'Eter plen', blir veltrent og hårete med muskelforbundne 'Gymhunder' og går langt under null i 'Dypfryst moro'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' er Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood en fare for seg selv i 'Selvfelling', drar på gymet for å få seg en 'Boksesekktrøkk' og går langt i å utfordre høydeskrekken med 'Elleville høyder'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' gjør Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood en smidig sorti over 'Sikkerhetsgjerder', trenger å rense bilinteriøret i 'Bil-kryp' og tester chuggekapasiteten i 'Styrterekyl'

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne 'Ridiculousness' har Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood med en spesiell gjest, Dee Snider, og møter rebeller i 'Tenker ikke å tåle det', opplever band som sliter i 'Kommer ikke til å slå gjennom' og blir nedstemt av spilt kaffe i 'Kaffetragedier'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' ser Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood på konsekvensene ved å overse skilt i 'Skiltblind', lærer om merkelige ting som er 'Teknisk sett sant' og finner ut hvordan sprø ting blir 'Sprøere og sprøere'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' ser Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood syklister få seg en overraskelse i 'Uventede sykkelhinder', møter ondskapsfulle katter som viser 'Kattevrede' før de tar en titt på folk som setter hodet fast i 'Skallefeller'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' prøver Rob, Steelo og Kristy Sarah seg på 'Kostymekatastrofer', kommer i kontakt med 'Etikettefjerne folk' og blir vitner til 'Nære på-overganger'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood se folk som snus opp ned av 'Påtvungne overslag', får seg en drink og to for mye med 'Pussa bestemødre' og finner ut grunnen til å unngå dansing med drinker i 'Ikke drikk og dans'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' med Rob, Steelo og Kristy Sarah får vi se strålende treffsikkerhet i 'Skallesnikskyting', finner ut av hva som er motsatt av å prestere under press i 'Vanære under press' og avslutter med noen 'Sjalu hjerter'.

programme.title: Andromeda: Cui Bono
programme.desc: Bekas onkel løper for kontoret i New Commonwealth, men et attentat får mannskapet til å opptre som hans sikkerhet.

programme.title: Andromeda: Den ensomme og jevne sanden
programme.desc: Når Andromeda blir angrepet av rompirater, blir de reddet av et langt mistet romskip fra jorden.

programme.title: Andromeda: Slipfighter Hunder av Krig
programme.desc: Mannskapet oppdager at en falsk planet, Marduk, har skapt masseødeleggelsesvåpen.

programme.title: Andromeda: Lepras kyss
programme.desc: En hitman med navnet Leper er rettet mot lederne for det nye samveldet.

programme.title: Andromeda: For hvem bjelleveiene
programme.desc: Andromeda hjemsøkes av en mystisk skapning som kommer ombord under en solstorm.

programme.title: Andromeda: Og ditt hjerte vil fly bort
programme.desc: Når en forlengst mistet kjærlighet kommer tilbake, forsvinner Tyr fra skipet for å beskytte henne mot en snikmorder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scratching The Surface
programme.desc: The only clue recovered from a shooting is a twelve-guage shotgun. Scientists use unique methods to lift the serial number from the weapon to trace it to its owner

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Proof
programme.desc: A serial arsonist starts several fires that cause millions of dollars worth of damage and the deaths of three people. He is discovered, partly through the use of forensic hypnosis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Breaking the Mold
programme.desc: A three-year-old develops a respiratory condition. His father has Alzheimers. An investigator reveals that their ill health is due to mold in their modern home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Call
programme.desc: A murder investigation in Florida crosses jurisdictions from New York and Jamaica. The police rely on cell phone mapping, wiretapping and a host of forensic evidence to link a suspect to a murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Fire
programme.desc: A woman convicted of killing her mother in a car fire is granted a new trial. An expert witness has a different opinion as to how the fire started and, if proven, would clear the woman of any culpability.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Last Will
programme.desc: Authorities track a kidnapper who let his victim write a last will and informed the family of her murder. A phone number written on a previous page left a lasting impression, which helped to convict.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dessert Served Cold
programme.desc: A man dies in his home after a long history of heart disease. A few weeks after the funeral, rumors surface that the death was no accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign Here
programme.desc: A mother of two vanishes after a shopping trip. Her body is discovered a month later, and witnesses say they saw the victim being forced into a car by an unknown person.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shadow of a Doubt
programme.desc: A woman is shot to death in her store just one day before she is to testify against the man accused of robbing her. The robber becomes the prime suspect, but he has a solid alibi: a timestamped videotape of his activities on the day of the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tourist Trap
programme.desc: In 1993, the state of Florida was known for more than just Disney World. Worldwide attention focused on a rash of robberies which targeted tourists. Some vacationers were killed in these attacks, but some fought and survived.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode: 12
programme.desc: This episode includes: Hat Box Baby, John Branion Pts. 1 & 2 & UD and Santa's Baby & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode: 13
programme.desc: This episode includes: Dreamy Disappearance, Update: Gypsy Fraud, Lucky Choir, Brinks & UD and ATV Murders & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode: 14

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode: 15

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode: 17

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Perfect Heist
programme.desc: Bank robbery is a brazen yet simple crime. A mask, a gun, a note passed to a teller. But bank burglary is different. It takes skill to disable an alarm, to penetrate a locked vault.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Death in Alaska
programme.desc: The day began like any other for Cheryl and Paul Chapman, until the silence of a peaceful Sunday morning was shattered with a phone call.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Lost Boys
programme.desc: In June of 1997, a crime wave swept Iowa like a tornado. It left a trail of robbery, kidnapping, and murder in its wake, and then it moved on. No one knew where.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Search For Lisa Rene
programme.desc: When a young woman was grabbed from her Texas home, the police raced to find her abductors. On the face of it, the kidnapping seemed like the random act of desperate men.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Obsession
programme.desc: Power is a responsibility as well as a privilege. But in the wrong hands, power can corrupt. For former Deputy Attorney General for the State of Delaware, losing sight of his sworn oath to uphold justice could prove lethal.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Blind Trust
programme.desc: A woman's body is found and investigators have little time and few clues to lead them to a killer who could strike again. Perpetrators try to conceal their crimes, yet savvy investigators can take the most obscure data and recreate a murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Double Helix
programme.desc: DNA Analysis: With the advent of DNA analysis, just a few microscopic cells found at a crime scene can be used to put a murder behind bars.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Stolen Youths
programme.desc: A young girl playing in her yard in Spokane, Washington suddenly vanishes. In St. Louis, another girl leaves to visit a friend. She never arrived.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Electronic Witness
programme.desc: George Orwell's concept of Big Brother remains in the realm of fiction. But as technology becomes more a part of our lives, it's becoming increasingly more difficult to make a move without leaving behind an electronic trace.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Patterns Of Guilt
programme.desc: The tread of a tire, a single shoe print and even the shape of a bruise help investigators track down killers, based solely on their patterns of guilt.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: WW2 Hospital Haunting
programme.desc: Built in the early 1900’s and now used as offices, a former world war hospital has become the new home for something supernatural. Strange voices, eerie footsteps and the sounds of painful screams have all been reported. What will be uncovered tonight?

programme.title: Past Hunters: The Chocolate Factory
programme.desc: Derek Acorah’s The Past Hunters travel to Hull to investigate ghostly goings on inside of a former chocolate factory. The investigation turns out to be no picnic, as the ghosts haunting make direct contact with the team.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Man with a Cane
programme.desc: The team head to Bolton and investigate the Old Three Crowns. Haunted by the spirit of a very angry man with a deadly cane and an upset, young, ghostly girl, will they uncover why the girl is so upset? And could they encounter the angry spirit man?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Ghosts of Bolton Sea Cadets
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team heads to Bolton to check out the alleged haunting at Sea Cadets academy.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: Norris Green Mansion Part 1
programme.desc: Many urban explorers have encountered paranormal activity inside of the building, including child like figures, unexplained voices and strange knocking sounds. Will anything from the ghost dimension make contact?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: Norris Green Mansion Part 2
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension's Bex and Sean investigate Norris Green Mansion. A 17th Century building, which is believed to hold some of the most haunted spirits in Liverpool. Will they make contact its ghostly entities tonight?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: Soul Less House of Ghosts - Part 1
programme.desc: Bex and Sean are joined by a special guest as they investigate an abandoned home full of spirits in Liverpool.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Extreme Deception Indicated
programme.desc: Joe and Tammy have been together for six years and they have two children. Joe faces cheating accusations again and returns to Steve's stage for his lie detector results!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve, I Think He's Gay
programme.desc: Monique’s friend claims that Adrian advertised himself on a “Gay for Pay” website. Then, pregnant Tyeasha suspects David of cheating on her with men. What will the polygraph say?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Wouldn't Wish This on Anybody
programme.desc: On today's Steve Wilkos, will the lie detector results reveal if Tamisha and Simone's men were faithful? Or will it reveal some more sinister results?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: The Devastating Truth
programme.desc: Desiaree refuses to believe her sister or mother's accusations against her father. Are their lies are keeping him in prison? Find out today!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Outraged!
programme.desc: Lagraciala tragically lost her ten month old son and cremated him, but after a serious fight with her fiancée AJ, she couldn't find the ashes. AJ admits to threatening to steal the ashes, but denies he took them!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Do Not Touch Her on My Stage
programme.desc: Scott and Dawn want their sister Betty to leave her boyfriend Michael because he's allegedly violent. The drama will explode when Scott confronts Michael on our stage today!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: A Shocking Statement
programme.desc: Today on Steve Wilkos, Vanessa reveals a secret she's been hiding from her boyfriend and Joel takes a DNA test to determine if he fathered Melissa's son!

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Follow the Money
programme.desc: The body of a 72-year-old man is found in a junkyard, stabbed 13 times and wearing nothing but his underwear and dentures.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Drive Thru Murder
programme.desc: Missy Berry is found dead in an idling car at a deserted intersection. A surprise twist in the investigation leads him into uncharted territory.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Hail of Bullets
programme.desc: The murder of a young father stuns his close-knit community, but the investigation reveals a neighborly dispute turned deadly.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Girl Next Door
programme.desc: When a young army vet is found stabbed to death on his living room floor, suspicions quickly fall to a neighbor who was arrested during a nearby altercation.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: No Good Deed
programme.desc: After a man is brutally gunned down in the middle of the street, Kenda must piece together a complicated puzzle of conflicting stories and dead ends.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Unlawful Flight
programme.desc: In Alabama, two desperate criminals fled the custody of a local deputy. Eluding authorities, they made their way across the country in a wave of car theft, abduction, and murder.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Secrets
programme.desc: Two young boys were the only witnesses to their mother's murder. The horrible crime appeared unmotivated, senseless and random.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Death In The Delta
programme.desc: When a wealthy young woman was abducted in front of her in-laws' home, the police had no shortage of suspects. The 25-year-old victim left behind a tumultuous marriage, an ex-husband and old boyfriends. All were on the FBI's short list.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Lost Boys
programme.desc: In June of 1997, a crime wave swept Iowa like a tornado. It left a trail of robbery, kidnapping, and murder in its wake, and then it moved on. No one knew where.

programme.title: Cops: It's Laundry Day
programme.desc: Deputies detain a man when a gun falls from his pantleg. Deputies are called when a father spits on his son's girlfriend. Officers respond when a child is bitten by two large dogs.

programme.title: Cops: Nothing Upstairs
programme.desc: Officers pursue a motorcyclist driving erratically. Deputies find broken drug paraphernalia in a car when conducting a traffic stop. A man who beat up his girlfriend hides from officers in an attic.

programme.title: Death Walker with Nick Groff: Van Horn Mansion
programme.desc: Nick tries to contact a spirit to see if she'll reveal her cause of death.

programme.title: Death Walker with Nick Groff: Risser Hospital
programme.desc: Nick investigates why the spirits of deceased patients of the Risser Hospital are becoming more aggressive.

programme.title: Death Walker with Nick Groff: The Tall Shadow Man
programme.desc: Nick calls upon the spirit of Tall Shadow Man to ask why he haunts those who enter the Iron Island Museum.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Lost Souls Of The Tivoli Venue
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension Team travels to North Wales and the Tivoli Theatre in Flint for a night of haunting entertainment.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: The Old Glen and Milner Curse

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: A Poltergeist Nightmare at 30 East Drive
programme.desc: The team step into a house that has become a legend with the paranormal community, 30 East Drive, Pontefract.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: All Choked Up
programme.desc: Carson Inez, en samler, bruker et gammelt halskjede for å få Sydney til å hjelpe henne med å oppdra Athena, som deretter vil hjelpe henne med å erobre verden.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Warlock of Nu Theta Phi
programme.desc: Når Sydneys student Megs romkamerat finner en hekses amulett, innlegger det Meg. Meg's kjærestes brorskap bror løper for å få amuletten. Hva gjør han?

programme.desc: Et kraftigere Andromeda-skip eksploderer på grunn av sannsynlig sabotasje, og tvinger Dylans mannskap til å redde dem.

programme.desc: Beka setter både mannskapet og en hel planet i fare når en tidligere kjærlighet dukker opp.

programme.title: Andromeda: Hva skjer med en revidert utsatt?
programme.desc: Andromeda mottar et rop om hjelp fra pastor Bam.

programme.title: CBS Mornings

programme.title: CBS News 24/7 Mornings

programme.title: CBS News 24/7

programme.title: CBS News 24/7

programme.title: On the Case: No Exit
programme.desc: A young couple, out on the town in Washington D.C., is gunned down in a savage attack. Investigators are at a loss. Would it take another murder to solve the mystery?

programme.title: On the Case: Kidnapped on the 4th of July
programme.desc: When a young woman's pizza delivery car is found abandoned in the middle of the desolate stretch of road, a twenty three year mystery begins.

programme.title: On the Case: Cry on My Shoulder
programme.desc: When a young woman disappears, police zero in on her violent ex-boyfriend. But the secret to solving the case is buried in a cold case file.

programme.title: On the Case: Betrayal in Big Cottonwood Canyon
programme.desc: A young woman is ambushed and murdered in Utah's Big Cottonwood Canyon.

programme.title: On the Case: The River's Edge
programme.desc: When seventeen year old high school student Stacey Fairchild disappears from a mall parking lot in Lancaster Ohio, police wonder if she ran away, was kidnapped for ransom or the victim of senseless murder.

programme.title: On the Case: Identical Evidence
programme.desc: Police discover a treasure trove of evidence after teacher Genai Coleman is found murdered in a parking lot, but detectives still face a challenge that may prevent the case from being solved.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Duane lands a huge contract for the Electra and puts enormous pressure on mechanic Adam to prep the plane without the help of his mentor Chuck.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Top of the World
programme.desc: The Electra flies to Alert, the northernmost settlement on Earth, forcing Adam and new senior manager Duane to work things out.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Last Days
programme.desc: Sparks fly when Joe discovers Gord has taken a job with a rival airline after completing expensive training on one of the Buffalo planes

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Push Comes to Shove
programme.desc: Trying to make his mark at Buffalo, Duane lands two more Electra contracts. But his over- zealous efforts result in a clash with the crew and with Joe, and a down-to-the-wire midnight departure to meet a deadline.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: The Doghouse

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Ice Strip
programme.desc: Mechanic Jimmy is sent to a northern mining camp to create an ice landing strip on a remote lake where AJ will have to land a DC-3 and the much bigger C-46.

programme.desc: Bronwyn Tarboton is sharing some genius upcycling tips including how to create home décor out of items in your trash.

programme.title: Cops: Crying Over Spilled Milk
programme.desc: After chasing down a suspect on foot, officers retrieve a fully loaded revolver from his pants, and police respond to a call about a man wielding a knife outside a bar.

programme.title: Cops: Front Door Felony
programme.desc: A fleeing motorcyclist tries to outsmart officers by hiding his bike in a retail garden area, and a concerned citizen reports seeing a man steal a package from a porch.

programme.title: Cops: What's in the Box
programme.desc: A jaywalking citation escalates to resisting arrest, an SUV contains more needles than one officer is willing to deal with, and a lovers' spat draws the attention of a patrol.

programme.title: Cops: Trouble in Paradise
programme.desc: A man refusing to drop his knife tests an officer's patience, neighbors hold an alleged thief until police arrive, and a couple of volatile newlyweds need police intervention.

programme.title: Cops: Carjacked Up
programme.desc: Officers spot a suspect running down the street with a knife, the driver of a stolen car takes off on foot after he's pulled over, and police find carjacked vehicles.

programme.title: Cops: No Helmet, No Ride
programme.desc: A man resisting arrest draws a crowd, an armed robbery suspect takes a walk down felony lane with an officer he recognizes, and a strange scene unfolds at a DUI checkpoint.

programme.title: Cops: Sidewalk Licker
programme.desc: A prostitution sting in Las Vegas nets more than just johns, police respond to reports of a woman licking the sidewalk, and a patrol happens on a lovers' row in a parking lot.

programme.title: Cops: From Sixty to Zero
programme.desc: A motorcyclist fleeing police slams into a pickup truck at high speed, and a man being frisked invents an interesting story to explain the suspicious bulge in his pants.

programme.title: Cops: First Time Caller
programme.desc: A fleet-footed deputy nabs a suspect on the run, officers responding to a domestic call are refused entry, and police try to ascertain the cause of a woman's hallucinations.

programme.title: Cops: Kicking and Screaming
programme.desc: An intoxicated man suspected of domestic abuse refuses to obey deputies' orders, police find drugs in a woman's car, and an alleged prostitute encounters the police.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Strange Hanging - Chantal Ternik Case
programme.desc: On April 3th 2003, Chantal Ternik, a 48 year old housewife, is discovered hanged in her house of Sanary-sur-Mer, in Var.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: Murder in Le Grand Bornand (Flactif case)
programme.desc: Xavier Flactif, his partner Graziella and their three children suddenly disappear. For several days, mystery reigns.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Mysterious Disappearences in Paris - Christelle Leroy
programme.desc: On March 21th 1991, Pascale Escarfail, 19 years old, is discovered dead at her studio in the 14th arrondissement of Paris, she was raped then stabbed multiple times.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: Killer Cop (Tavernier Case)
programme.desc: Firefighters in Barbizieux, Charente, are called to a fire in a large house in the village. They arrive to find the lifeless body of the owner, Claude Tavernier, 83, lying in a large pool of blood.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Fatal Student Night (Stéphane Kameugne Case)
programme.desc: On December 24, 2008, the body of Stéphane Kameugne was fished out from a canal in Châlons-en-Champagne. The young man had been missing for two weeks and no one had seen him since the evening of his graduation ceremony from his engineering school

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 304
programme.desc: I august 2004 stormer to bevæpnede personer inn i Munch-museet på Tøyen. I kaoset som oppstår tar de med seg de to verdenskjente maleriene Skrik og Madonna. Hvem står bak tyveriet, og er bildene tapt for alltid?

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 706
programme.desc: I mai 2017 ble småbarnsfaren Filip Viking funnet skutt i Katrineholm. Vitner skynder seg bort til ham og i forbindelse med forsøkene på å redde Filips liv, klarer de å se en lang svartkledd mann løpe fra åstedet.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 405
programme.desc: To reindriftsutøvere fra Vest Finnmark havner i politiets søkelys etter å ha innrapportert flere hundre rovdyrskadde reinsdyr. Kan det virkelig være slik at de to har mishandlet dyrene sine for å motta erstatning?

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: I juli 2022 rystes Mölndal da en død mann blir funnet halvt avkledd, brennemerket og med en båndopptaker plassert på kroppen. Politiet mistenker at noe langt mer urovekkende enn et vanlig drap har funnet sted.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 201
programme.desc: En augustdag i 1996 blir den 20 år gamle hotellarbeideren Trude Espås observert sittende på en stein ikke langt unna Geiranger sentrum. 11 dager senere blir hun funnet drept.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 203
programme.desc: Den tidligere artisten, flammeslukeren og TV-danseren Julio Kopseng lever et omsvermet liv i Oslos dansemiljø. Da han blir anmeldt for en voldtekt i 2013 utløses et skred av voldtektsanmeldelser mot ham.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A World of His Own
programme.desc: A playwright makes characters come to life.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Profile in Silver/Button, Button
programme.desc: A time traveling researcher attending the assassination of John F. Kennedy impulsively changes history/An unhappy couple is given an unusual offer. Push a button on a box and someone they don't know will die, but they will get $200,000.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Need to Know/Red Snow
programme.desc: Edward investigates town madness, discovers individual secret/KGB agent uncovers Stalin's exiles alive, dead drained of blood in Siberia.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: King Nine Will Not Return
programme.desc: A pilot of a downed WW II bomber comes to in the African desert and desperately tries to find out what happened to the rest of his crew.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Man in the Bottle
programme.desc: A luckless couple stumbles upon fortune when a genie materializes from a bottle in their antique shop. The genie grants them four wishes but warns them, prophetically, to be careful what you wish for.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Nervous Man in a Four Dollar Room
programme.desc: Small time criminal Jackie Rhoades must face both his past and his conscience while waiting for his next assignment.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Thing About Machines
programme.desc: Bartlett Finchley's paranoia about the machines around proves true.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Justin Timberlake Cries a River While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Justin Timberlake is one of the century's most prolific singer-songwriters, with 10 Grammy Award wins.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Margot Robbie Pushes Her Limits While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Margot Robbie has a list of film highlights that includes "Wolf of Wall Street," "Suicide Squad," and more.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Halle Berry Refuses to Lose to Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Halle Berry is one of the most successful actresses in Hollywood, with a storied 25 year career.

programme.title: Hot Ones: John Boyega Summons the Force While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: John Boyega is an actor-producer from films like "Attack the Block," "Pacific Rim: Uprising" and "Star Wars."

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Viola Davis is one of most decorated actors of the century, but can she win against the wings of death?

programme.title: Hot Ones: Gordon Ramsay Savagely Critiques Spicy Wings
programme.desc: The most-requested guest in "Hot Ones" history finally sits face-to-face with Sean Evans.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Mac DeMarco Tries to Stay Chill While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Musician, hashtag expert and Canadian icon Mac DeMarco may be the most laid-back "Hot Ones" guest of all time.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Natalie Portman Pirouettes in Pain While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Natalie Portman takes on a lineup of vegan drumsticks with some of the spiciest sauces in the world.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Lilly Singh Fears for Her Life While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Lilly Singh is a YouTube star, writer, producer, actress and author.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Mankind makes use of lead, a versatile but toxic metal, for 6,000 years; mining; car battery factory; specialists remove harmful lead objects from homes and businesses; lead makes crystal sparkle.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Limousines have been stretched to greater and greater lengths--as has the notion of what can be done inside them; you can have a rolling disco in a stretched SUV, go for a rumble off-road in a monster truck limousine, or take a direct hit.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: June 6, 1944, Operation Overlord springs into action as the greatest WWII machine with thousands of ships, aircraft, thousands of men, and millions of tons of steel; interlocking precision overcomes Hitler's defenses in history's greatest assault.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The Mighty Mac connects the pastoral northern mainland of Michigan with the state's heavily forested Upper Peninsula and stands as a testament to the dreams, determination, and hard work of a small few who created a true masterpiece.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Each flip of an electric-light switch attests to the genius of Nikola Tesla, creator of the alternating current (AC) system; the Tesla coil; energy-efficient bulbs.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Take a peek into one of today's fully-automated homes that is so smart, the owner can operate everything from the home theater to the outdoor waterfall at a push of one button.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Could the mighty M2 be the greatest machine gun in history? Nicknamed “Ma Deuce”, this American machine gun has dominated battlefields for over 80 years. Host Wil Willis tests it and recreates Audie Murphy’s famous Medal of Honor moment.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Victory in the Pacific
programme.desc: Japan continues its suicidal resistance, and invading it looks costly. After 2 atomic bombs, the Emperor intervenes and stops the War. Stalin grabs territory in East Asia. The War is over, and the Atomic Era and the Cold War start.

programme.title: WWII's The Great Escapes: The Freedom Trails: France and Spain: The Pyrenees
programme.desc: Monty treks one of the toughest and most famous freedom trails out of Nazi controlled France, taking him through the valleys and high ridges of the Pyrenees mountains and into Spain.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: Vidkun Quisling
programme.desc: Vidkun Quisling, once honored for diplomacy, turned traitor by collaborating with Nazis. His bid for power in Norway failed, relegated by Germans. Despite being named "fuehrer," his reign led to repression until his hanging post-Nazi defeat.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The Devil's Due
programme.desc: During WWII, Greek Prime Ministers Tsolakoglou, Logothetopoulos, and Rallis collaborated with Nazi occupiers, imposing fees that caused a famine.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg lover å ikke sladre
programme.desc: Carly får en B på historieprøven hun burde ha fått en A på. Sam, som griper sjansen på sitt ukentlige møte med rektor Franklin, forandrer Carlys karakter på datamaskinen og overrasker henne med A blank.

programme.title: iCarly: iCarly redder TV
programme.desc: En prestisjetung produsent vil gjøre iCarly om til et TV-show. Men Carly, Sam og Freddie blir raskt fortvilet når de hører om alle de store forandringene produsenten ønsker å foreta.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg hater Sams kjæreste
programme.desc: Sam får en kjæreste og de to blir uadskillelige. Men når forholdet begynner å få følger for iCarly, forstår Carly og Freddie at de må gjøre noe.

programme.title: iCarly: Overvåket
programme.desc: Etter å ha sett et klipp på iCarly der en mann selger illegale piratkopivideoer, bestemmer to detektiver seg for å bruke Carly og Spencers loft for overvåking.

programme.title: iCarly: Skolebytte
programme.desc: Carly får vite at hun får mulighet til å få et fullt stipend til en privat eliteskole pga nettshowet sitt. Skolen er Briarwood. Carly er i sterk tvil, men Sam og Freddie vet de må få henne til å gå for det.

programme.title: iCarly: Fektedrama
programme.desc: Freddie trenger litt guttetid, så han slår seg sammen med Spencer for å dra og fekte. Freddie er et naturtalent, men ting blir innviklet når Spencer får ham med i en kamp mot den utrolige Doug Toder.

programme.title: iCarly: Vinn en date
programme.desc: Når vennen deres Gibby er for sjenert for å be ut jenta han liker, bestemmer gjengen seg for å gjøre ham og hans flamme til deltagere i et "iWin A Date" innslag på nettvideoshowet deres

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg så han først
programme.desc: Når Carly og Sam viser interesse for den samme fyren, lover de at han ikke skal komme imellom dem. Men det er vanskelig, og når de slåss om hans oppmerksomhet, blir vennskapet deres satt på prøve.

programme.title: iCarly: Pack rat
programme.desc: Carly må trå til når Spencer blir avhengig av et videospil. Sam lurer Freddie til å tro at han blir forfulgt av uhell når han nekter å sende et kjedebrev videre.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg skylder deg en
programme.desc: Sam blir fornærmet når Freddie beskylder henne for ikke å betale ham og Carly noen av de pengene tilbake som hun konstant låner. Sam prøver iherdig å betale dem tilbake - hun finner seg en ordentlig jobb.
