programme.title: The Hills: Something Old, Something New
programme.desc: I Laurens siste episode må hun bestemme om hun er villig til å tilgi Spencer for å kunne stille opp for Heidi i hennes "prinsesse"-bryllup. Hele besetningen dukker opp og blir overrasket over en gjest ingen tenkte ville komme.

programme.title: The Hills: It's On Bitch
programme.desc: Kristin starter krig når hun forsøker seg på Justin foran Audrina. Spencer og Heidi leter etter hus, og Spencer kjøper et hus uten Heidis godkjennelse.

programme.title: The Hills: Mess With Me, I Mess With You
programme.desc: Etter at Audrina ikke dukket opp, bestemmer Kristin seg for ikke å kjempe mot sine følelser for Justin. Heidi melder seg som barnevakt for naboen, men Spencer vil ikke ha noe med unger å gjøre.

programme.title: The Hills: Strike One
programme.desc: Kristin får smake på hvordan det er å ha et forhold til Justin når han ikke dukker opp på Brodys overraskelsesfest. Heidi og Spencer er uenige om når de skal starte familie, og Audrina dater Justins bestevenn.

programme.title: The Hills: Old Habits Die Hard
programme.desc: Kristin tror hun har temmet Justin, men kanskje er han fortsatt ikke over Audrina. Når Holly mister kontrollen på en tilstelning, er det Heidis jobb å få søsteren til å innrømme alkoholproblemet sitt.

programme.title: The Hills: Sorry Boo, Strike Two
programme.desc: Justin gjør seg kostbar med Kristin, men biter seg i halen. Hollys drikking fører til at Heidi og Stephanie må gripe inn. Brody og Jayde krangler slik at de må revurdere forholdet sitt.

programme.title: The Hills: I'm Done With You
programme.desc: Justin går på glør etter at Kristin og Audrina endelig møtes ansikt til ansikt. Alt Heidi ønsker seg til bursdag er en baby, men Spencer har helt andre planer.

programme.title: The Hills: On To The Next
programme.desc: Kristin og Brody vurderer å date igjen, men når de støter på Jayde forstår de at tiden ikke er moden. Audrina og Justin møtes for å diskutere framtiden, men det ender ikke som hun håpet. Spencer går drastisk til verks mot Heidis babybesettelse.

programme.title: The Hills: Can't Always Get What You Want
programme.desc: Kristin støter sammen med Jayde når hun kommer for å gjenerobre Brody. Heidi legger en plan for å bli gravid med eller uten Spencers samtykke, og Audrina må takle at Justin fortsatt har følelser for Kristin.

programme.title: The Hills: Mr. Right Now
programme.desc: Kristin vil ikke ha Justin, men han gir henne ikke opp så lett. Audrina avslutter forholdet til Justin for godt. Brody får kalde føtter når Jayde vil flytte inn hos ham, og Spencer frykter at Heidi muligens kan være gravid.

programme.title: The Hills: The Boys Of Summer
programme.desc: Kristin og Justin vil gå videre med forholdet, og Spencer konfronterer Heidi med graviditetstesten. Brody har kanskje fortsatt følelser for Kristin etter at Jayde konfronterer ham med tilstanden til deres forhold på en forlovelsesfest.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: Når Vickys andre eks, Ricci, dukker opp, deles gruppa. Ash klikker på Liam med alvorlige konsekvenser. Dan truer med å klikke på Ricci, og Ricci og Vicky prøver på å få en slags avslutning med liten suksess.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Zahida Wages War
programme.desc: Åtte sexy single folk oppdager at drømmen om sommerkjærlighet blir til et mareritt når flere ekser kommer for å skape kaos. Zahida kriger med Maisie om Sean, men det er når den første eksen ankommer at det virkelige blodbadet skjer.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: A Sea Of Tears
programme.desc: Det koker i villaen når ikke bare en, men tre ekser ankommer og skaper kaos for turtelduene Ross og Harriette. Zahidas eks Joe mister kontrollen og Alex truer med å drukne seg i tårer.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Harriette's Love Triangle
programme.desc: Singlenes elendighet fortsetter når Sean hopper fra Zahida til Zaralena, og Harriettes kjærlighetstrekant blir verre. Maisie vil at noe skal skje og Aaron fra Geordie Shore gjør spektakulær entré, men hvem av eksene er hans?

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Nicole's Nightmare
programme.desc: Det blir spent i villaen når Zaralena får kjenne på Zahidas vrede. Den nye eksen får gutta til å oppføre seg eiersyke. Josh har et godt øye til Nicole, men tar det slutt når hun oppdager en grusom hemmelighet?

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: The Blonde Bombshell
programme.desc: Adam avslører sine følelser for Nicole, og Jack og Josh vil ha nytt blod i villaen. Zaralena og Aaron kommer nærmere hverandre, og Ross og Harriette tilbringer natten i loftsleiligheten. Men en ny eks kan ødelegge for dem alle.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: When Xzibit rolls on into the garage with the Fairlane, the boys can't believe their eyes. So they decide to give West his Fairlane back to tinker with and get him a brand-new pimped Toyota 4Runner.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: Xzibit and the boys at West Coast pimp Nate's Ford Econoline.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, West Coast Customs pimps Sara's Chevrolet S-10.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, West Coast Customs pimps Brooke's Chevrolet Cavalier Convertible.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, West Coast Customs pimps Tom's Chevrolet Caprice.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, West Coast Customs pimps JT's Honda Civic.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, West Coast Customs pimps Jekara's Chevrolet Bel Air.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, West Coast Customs pimps Eric's Mitsubishi Eclipse.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: Xzibit and the boys at West Coast get an unforgettable surprise when they discover a previous tenant living inside a neglected 1976 Pacer.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, West Coast Customs pimps Josh's Toyota Corolla.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, West Coast Customs pimps Heather's Chevrolet C10.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Tale of Two Players
programme.desc: Audrey blir paranoid når hun ser at Michael og Geles får kontakt. Malcolm blir konfrontert med sine sjekkemetoder, og huset begynner å utforske nye forbindelser.

programme.title: Are You The One?: No Love in Nola
programme.desc: Sjalusi blir hovedingrediensen i en vill Mardi Gras-fest. Geles blir alles verste fiende når hun prøver seg på flere av gutta i huset. Dimitri erter på seg Jada.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Love by the Numbers
programme.desc: Tyler håper at Nicole vil se på ham som noe mer enn en venn. Shad viser litt følelser. Alle i huset plages av hjertesorg og sjalusi, og henvender seg til Keith i håp om at han vil klare å pønske ut en vinnende strategi.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Playing with Fire
programme.desc: Den siste Match Up-seremonien nærmer seg, og huset er desperat etter å sende de riktige parene inn i sannhetsbåsen og finne sammen som 11 perfekte par. Keith og Alexis presser hverandre altfor langt.

programme.title: Are You The One?: 99 Problems But I Can't Find The One
programme.desc: Verten Terrence J gir oss en eksklusiv titt på denne sesongens AYTO-ensemble og forklarer hvorfor disse 22 enslige unge voksne er ræva på forhold.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Reunion The Final Matchup Part 1
programme.desc: Etter uker på leting etter kjærligheten og spill om penger møtes deltagerne fra sesong 6 igjen for å gi innsideinformasjon om de eksplosive episodene, sladre litt om dramaet bak scenen, og avsløre hva som skjedde etter at de forlot huset.

programme.title: MTV Teen Mom
programme.desc: Opplev de dramatiske øyeblikkene når de unge mødrene takler hverdagslige utfordringer eller opplever uforglemmelige øyeblikk. Det er uavbrutt drama hele dagen, hver dag.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Twenty aspiring restaurateurs hope to impress Ramsay by present their signature dishes to him. After the opening night dinner service, the least successful contestants face elimination.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Teamwork plays an important role during a relay race in which duos must accomplish basic culinary tasks; while challenge winners go to San Francisco, the losing team picks carrots at a farm; both teams disappoint during dinner service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The contestants learn about teamwork during a challenge involving pigs and potatoes; while the winning team enjoys a day on a yacht, the losers bathe their new livestock friends; a disorganized dinner service leaves chef Ramsay disappointed.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The contestants take part in a team competition involving 10 dishes of lobster ravioli that must be prepared perfectly. The winners earn a swim at a Beverly Hills residence.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The teams must pair side dishes with four different types of protein; while the losing team makes honey taffy from scratch, the winners spend a day at Laguna Beach; the teams prepare a breakfast reception for a wedding.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The teams must pick a team leader for the next dinner service; a chef serves an undercooked dish; a contestant is eliminated.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Krigerens vei
programme.desc: Walker står overfor en uvanlig utfordring når han reiser tilbake i tid for å etterforske en tidligere urett.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Bra bomull
programme.desc: Gage og Sydney går undercover for å finne Gages savnede søster som blir holdt til fange av en notorisk forbryter.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Lynn-søstrene
programme.desc: Walker og rangerne må redde syngende Lynn's fra en forbrytergjeng som vil tjene millioner på å piratkopiere deres siste konsert – noensinne.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Mistanke
programme.desc: Walker og rangerne må beskytte en døv jente som var vitne til et mafiamord.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Enkemakeren
programme.desc: Når en familie med bøller angriper en lokal rodeo og truer med å drepe Trivette, må Walker trå til for å stoppe noen fra å bli skadet.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Kjemp eller dø
programme.desc: Walker går undercover som straffedømt i et høysikkerhetsfengsel i Arkansas for å etterforske vakter som iscenesetter og filmer brutale slåsskamper mellom fangene og selger opptakene på nettet til en heftig pris.

programme.title: MTV Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek styrer serien, som inneholder klipp fra nettet, samt har kjendisgjester og medprogramledere som Sterling «Steelo», Madison Beer og danske Nina Agdal. Nye episoder hver onsdag.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: The Dingo
programme.desc: Snowboarderen The Dingo hjelper Rob med å presentere Pain Angels, Worst Case Scenarios og That'll Cost You. Og du gjetter aldri hva som skjer når en vektløfter mister kontrollen.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Matthew Mounce
programme.desc: Rob, Steelo og Chanel ler seg i hjel av Unnecessary Combos, Stay Out Of The Water og Who Put That There, og karateeksperten Matthew Mounce presenterer Bad Karate.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Jeff Tremaine
programme.desc: Produsenten Jeff Tremaine hjelper Rob med å presentere episodens klipp. Noen barn begynner tidlig i Ridiculousness in Training, og to elefanter hjelper hverandre med en vanskelig matbit.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Matt Schlager
programme.desc: Skjønnhetsdronningen Caite Upton er med i panelet, Matt Schlager viser hvordan man faller med ansiktet først, og du får se klippene Inappropriate Animals, Misfires And False Starts og Yoga Fart.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Tenåringsmoren Maci vurderer å slå opp med forloveden Ryan. Farrah dater en ny gutt, selv om familien misliker det. Amber strever med utdanningen, og Catelynn føler at forholdet til datteren er blitt svekket etter adopsjonen.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Catelynns familie liker ikke adopsjonsvalget. Amber og forloveden Gary krangler konstant. Farrah oppdager at dating ikke vanskelig for en ung mor, og Maci sliter med å balansere morsrollen og studiene når vennene begynner på college.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Konflikten mellom Amber og Gary når kokepunktet, og Catelynn leter etter et nytt sted å bo når moren hennes flytter. Nysingle Maci skifter mening, og guttegale Farrah ønsker beskyttelse.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Catelynn takler valget om adopsjon på en utflukt med andre mødre, og Maci og Ryan besøker en rådgiver. Amber vurderer å takke ja til hjelp fra eksen, og Farrah lurer på om hun burde være mer hjemme med barnet sitt.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Ultimatum
programme.desc: Phelps and Mimi take on the guises of fugitives to invade the home of Jerome Cooper, a nuclear scientist, who is threatening to destroy a major American city with a fifty-megaton hydrogen bomb.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Kidnap
programme.desc: Jim Phelps is kidnapped and held for ransom until Barney, Casey, and Willy can steal an incriminating letter from a safe deposit box and turn it over to crime syndicate boss Andrew Metzger.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Crack-Up
programme.desc: Jim Phelps poses as a master chess champion to trap a criminal with a near-genius mentality and his mysterious boss.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Puppet
programme.desc: Roddy McDowall guest stars as Leo Ostro, a brilliant crime syndicate boss who becomes the target of the IMF when he launches a mysterious one-hundred-million-dollar scheme.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Incarnate
programme.desc: Kim Hunter guest stars as Hannah O'Connel a brilliant but superstitious criminal who escapes to a Caribbean country and is drawn into a voodoo ceremony by the IMF to locate a cache of stolen gold she has hidden away.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 502
programme.desc: Anita og Martins to barn har tatt over hjemmet, og det er leker overalt. Løsningen er et større hjem, men paret har ikke klart å finne det rette huset enda. Nå får de hjelp av ekspertene, men det blir ikke lett.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 503
programme.desc: Tina og Danni solgte rekkehuset sitt i den tro at de snart skulle finne det rette huset. Men sånn gikk det ikke. Paret er utrolig kresne, og har høye krav. Kan ekspertene skape hjemmet som Tina og Danni drømmer om?

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 504
programme.desc: Laura og Jesper og Jespers to barn leier i Humlebæk, og de er mildt sagt lei av det. De mangler plass, hage - og de vil også ha barn sammen snart. Men to års husjakt har ikke gitt resultat.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 505
programme.desc: Ulla og Kristian bor i en vakker herskapsleilighet på Frederiksberg med sine to barn. Men de vil ha mer plass i et barnevennlig nabolag, innom sykkelavstand fra sentrum. Kan Tobias Edlev-Nielsen finne et hus til dem?

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 506
programme.desc: En liten leiebolig i Vanløse og to små barn - ikke den beste kombinasjonen. Lisa og Erling drømmer om et stort hus med en stor hage. Tobias må jobbe hardt, da drømmene er mye større enn budsjettet.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Malmö
programme.desc: Tareq is in his hometown of Malmö – Sweden’s third largest city. The food scene here is inspired by the traditional seafood dishes and the large immigrant population whose recipes have given Malmö a new energy.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Finland's South Coast
programme.desc: Tareq takes a late autumn trip along Finland’s southern coast. He stops in the capital Helsinki to see how the city's food culture is about to be discovered by the rest of the world, and dives into the freezing waters around Ekenäs.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Kiruna
programme.desc: Tareq arrives in Kiruna, over 200km north of the Arctic Circle. With the weather getting down to -30C, Tareq takes part in snow picnics, firing up the smoker, and using snow and ice as part of the recipes he prepares.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Bergen
programme.desc: Surrounded by some of the most beautiful landscapes in northern Europe, Bergen has become a centre for the finest seafood in northern Europe. Tareq heads into this winter wonderland to see the curious cuisine that has developed in western Norway.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: The Faroe Islands
programme.desc: Tareq comes to understand what is in the soul of the Faroese, and why their cuisine has developed the way it has. We explore the beautiful capital Torshavn and surrounding villages, and sail into a cave for a recipe prepared on a rowboat.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Central Jutland
programme.desc: Volcanoes and glaciers shaped this part of the country, leaving a giant fjord and pre-historic fossils in their wake. Farmers and food innovators work closely with nature to prepare food with the area’s plentiful herbs and award-winning seafood.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Åland (Part 2)
programme.desc: Tareq goes back to Åland to explore more of this island territory. Tareq finds a chef setting up a huge food village, sees forts left over from various invaders over the centuries, and learns about beer being recreated from 200 year old DNA.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Tornedalen
programme.desc: There are not many places like Tornedalen. A rushing river has provided for locals for centuries, and the very fertile land has yielded amazing crops for centuries.Tareq explores the traditions and the food that are part of the short summer season.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Vicky's Not Happy
programme.desc: Det er et sjokk for hele gjengen når Holly overraskende kommer tilbake til Geordie Shore-huset, men ikke før Jay og Gaz får sin tøffeste arbeidsoppgave i en 'Working Man's'- klubb og Anna driver Vicky for langt.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: It's Getting Complicated Vicky
programme.desc: Det er ingen eventyrlig slutt på finalen i Geordie Shore. Charlotte får alvorlige nyheter fra Gaz, forholdet til Jay og Vicky gjennomgår et sjokkerende utbrudd og Holly havner i en parkeringsplasskrangel.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Season 1 Reunion
programme.desc: Russel Kane er vert og gjengen fra Geordie Shore møtes igjen sammen med venner, familie og et par overraskelser for å avsløre et par sannheter - og vi får samtaler med dem som elsket og hatet showet.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Magaluf Madness Part 1
programme.desc: Geordie Shore-gjengen drar til Magaluf for sommerferie. Gutta gjør raskt opp for tapt tid med damene, og spenningen eksploderer mellom Char og Gaz, noe som gir den største Geordie-skjæringen noensinne!

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Magaluf Madness Part 2
programme.desc: Det er snarere Magaluf-galskap når Geordie Shore-gjengen kjemper med å komme overens. Charlotte og Vicky ser vaktsomt på mens Gary fortsetter å sjarmere damene. Holly knuser ved nok en våt t-skjorte konkurranse.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Geordie Shore's Best Bits
programme.desc: Vi har satt sammen ti av de råeste og mest minneverdige øyeblikkene fra serien, og har også med input fra kjendisfans som Tim Westwood og Harry fra TOWIE!

programme.title: Jersey Shore: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike truer med å fortelle Jose om Angelina og Vinny. Vinnys familie kommer på besøk. Og Vinny og Pauly finner drømmejentene, men en vil få knust hjertet sitt.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Dirty Pad
programme.desc: Angelina er i trøbbel når gjengen får vite at hun lå med Jose etter en natt med Vin. Men den siste dråpen kommer når Mike oppdager flere ubehageligheter på badet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Gone, Baby, Gone
programme.desc: Mike gjenforens med sin kanadiske skjønnhet, til stor underholdning for hele huset. Angelina forteller gjengen hva hun syns om dem, noe som gjør Snooki rasende og får begeret til å flyte over.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Girls Like That
programme.desc: Vinny velger mellom to grupper jenter. Siden Angelina er borte vil Snooki at hun og Jenni skal skvære opp med Sam. Gleden blir kortvarig for Snooki, når Mike blir stadig mer fiendtlig.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Deja Vu All Over Again
programme.desc: Alle er frustrerte over Mike - han får gjengen sparket ut av en klubben, får bilen tauet vekk, brenner nesten ned huset og svikter Pauly. To ganger.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Back into the Fold
programme.desc: Pauly og Vin har sine siste dater med Miami-jentene, mens Sam og Ron raskt havner i krangel. Jenni lager bråk mellom Pauly og Mike, og det blir en siste kveld full av drama i boblebadet.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Arabesque
programme.desc: Vincent's childhood sweetheart returns to the tunnels, and Vincent reveals a painful memory of her to Catherine.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: When the Blue Bird Sings
programme.desc: Catherine meets a persistent artist, who follows and spies on her. But this artist isn't all what he seems to be.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Watcher
programme.desc: On Vincent and Catherine's two year anniversary, Catherine receives a phone message indicating that someone is watching them.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: A Distant Shore
programme.desc: Catherine heads out to L.A California, to find a witness for an investigation.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Trial
programme.desc: Catherine is put in charge of a murder case in court, and to bring justice to a five year old murdered son.

programme.title: JAG: The Imposter
programme.desc: Harm is held captive by Palmer, a renegade government agent with whom he had crossed swords a few months ago. While Palmer prepares a life mask so he can pass for Harm, he explains his plans to assassinate the key witness in the trial.

programme.title: JAG: To Russia With Love
programme.desc: With evidence that his missing father could still be alive in, Harm convinces the Admiral to give him time off so he can go to Russia. In Moscow, they are questioned by Mark Falcon, the KGB agent who had stolen a list of POW's earlier from Harm.

programme.title: JAG: Gypsy Eyes
programme.desc: Unable to lose the pursuing Russian fighters, Harm's and Mac’s hijacked Mig is shot out of the sky over Siberia.

programme.title: JAG: Act of Terror
programme.desc: When Arab terrorists attach a mine to a US Navy warship in an attempt to sink it, Marine guards are able to kill one and capture the other, even after the mine explodes, killing two sailors.

programme.title: JAG: The Black Jet
programme.desc: Harm and Mac are sent to Teheran, Iran to represent a Navy flier whose Stealth jet crashed in Iran due to a major mechanical failure.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Same Wavelength/ Winning Isn't Everything/ A Honeymoon For Horace
programme.desc: A mindreader meets a man and uses the reading to improve her chances at getting his attention. Meanwhile, Capt. Stubing's friend brags about his son's accomplishments, but Vicki hears a totally different story.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Too Many Dads/ Love Will Find A Way/ The Best Of Friends
programme.desc: A 10-year-old boy is torn between his biological father, who he hasn't seen since he was a baby, and the stepfather who raised him. Meanwhile, Elaine tries to tell her parents that her fiance is a paraplegic.

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Tomorrow Lady/ Father, Dear Father/ Still Life
programme.desc: A woman's (Greer Garson) ability to see the future may hinder her relationship with an attractive man. Plus, a single mother thinks she meets a divorced man traveling with his daughter, but that's not exactly the case.

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Christmas Presence
programme.desc: Angelorum Dominicus suddenly appears aboard the Pacific Princess without a reservation and soon begins to spread love and happiness to everyone on the cruise, especially a little boy in need of an operation.

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Groupies/ The Audition/ Doc'S Nephew
programme.desc: A female producer is adamant about not wanting to start a relationship with an actor, but the thespian has other plans. Meanwhile, a therapist goes on a cruise with his group, while Doc and his nephew compete for the affection of the same woman.

programme.title: Happy Days: Bye Bye Blackball
programme.desc: Richie, Ralph, and Potsie endure the harassment of "hell week" to prove themselves worthy to enter their college fraternity, Phi Kappa Nu.

programme.title: Happy Days: Joanie's First Kiss
programme.desc: Sophomore Joanie Cunningham gets basic back-seat defense tips from Richie and Fonzie before her first "car date" with a senior boy, and then cramps her older brother's style when she and her date show up at his college "make-out" party.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie Almost Dies
programme.desc: What begins as a humorous escapade with a motorcycle turns into a tragic vigil for the Cunninghams and their friends.

programme.title: Happy Days: Do You Want to Dance
programme.desc: Fonzie's latest romantic interest, a ballet teacher, is secretly yearning to turn professional and dance with the greats in New York. Fonzie, however, has trouble accepting that she may forgo their relationship to pursue her dreams of fame.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fearless Malph
programme.desc: When Ralph Malph is hypnotized to cure his fright after a tornado warning is posted, Ralph's loss of fear causes him to tempt fate by suggesting that the Fonz needs training wheels for his stupid motorcycle

programme.title: Happy Days: Smokin' Ain'T Cool
programme.desc: Joanie believes she has to smoke to fit in with the cool girls. She ignores the pleas from her family to stop, until the Fonz defines what cool really means

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie's Blindness
programme.desc: In a poignant, change-of-pace episode titled Fonzie's Blindness, Al barges through the kitchen door at the drive-in and hits Fonzie in the head with a tray of food.

programme.title: Happy Days: Casanova Cunningham
programme.desc: When Richie is caught two-timing Lori Beth for a pretty baton twirler, the Fonz has to step in and give Richie a few lessons in love.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie Gets Framed
programme.desc: Richie and the Fonz visit a massage parlor to escape the pressures of a heated class presidency race, and Richie's opposition photographs the sheet-clad candidate with a pretty masseuse.

programme.title: MacGyver: Thin Ice
programme.desc: MacGyver helps a promising young hockey player tone down his aggressive style of play and possibly reclaim his position on Team USA, America's ice hockey team.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Negotiator
programme.desc: MacGyver is marked for death after stopping the construction of a proposed marina and unknowingly falls in love with the hired killer sent to stop him.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Spoilers (Aka "Earthquake")
programme.desc: MacGyver comes to the rescue of a mountain man who has been framed for murder after agreeing to testify against a chemical company that is illegally disposing of hazardous materials in nearby streams.

programme.title: MacGyver: Mask of the Wolf
programme.desc: MacGyver and Jack Dalton come to the rescue of an Indian who is kidnapped by fortune hunters seeking the secret location of a legendary mask.

programme.title: MacGyver: Rock and Cradle
programme.desc: An abandoned baby lands MacGyver and Jack Dalton in the middle of a sophisticated counterfeiting scheme.

programme.title: Matlock: The Tabloid
programme.desc: A frame-up finds Matlock immersed in libel, scandal, and tales of alien spaceships! Delving into the lurid world of tabloid publishing, Matlock and his new investigator, Jerri Stone, sort through the world’s weirdest clues to solve a murder.

programme.title: Matlock: Deadly Dose
programme.desc: A surgical mishap and a malpractice suit aren’t the end of Dr. Bradley Gray’s troubles. He’s been murdered! Jerri Stone’s little sister, Nurse Rachel, is the number one suspect.

programme.title: Matlock: The Target
programme.desc: An afternoon fishing expedition evolves into a nightmare. Matlock watches in horror as the boat he just disembarked suddenly explodes into a fireball killing his companion, Judge Stern.

programme.title: Matlock: The Judge
programme.desc: Judge kills mistress.

programme.title: Matlock: The Stripper
programme.desc: A stripper is accused of killing her ex-husband.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: The Matthews family has reunited after years apart. Here, Ryan and Tess Matthews come to LA to help Kate when she's in trouble with a con man.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Travis gets involved in the treacherous and deadly trade of catering when he oversees the annual charity banquet.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan insists that a man he helped condemn to death for a series of bombings is guilty, even after a post-execution explosion.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Three months after the execution of Lewis Sweeney, explosions are still rocking the LA area every four days. The unpopular Dr. Sloan continues his efforts to nail Carter Sweeney for the bombings.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: An explosion at Community General leaves Agent Wagner with minor bruises, but he prepares himself for the grim task of searching for Amanda and her friends amidst the rubble.

programme.title: Escape to the Country

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Dancing With The Chooch
programme.desc: Vinny danser, Mike fatter noen tvilsomme motevalg, og snart starter familieferien til New Orleans.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: What A Waste Of Cake!
programme.desc: Guido-ene marsjerer inn i New Orleans for en familieferie. Festløvene har med en masse vin.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Operation Mike Drop
programme.desc: Mike fortsetter striden med Angelina om Twitter-krigen deres. Samtidig klekker Pauly og Vinny en plan om å gi Mike alle tiders genusavsløring, 3 km oppe i lufta.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: F.F.D. 2
programme.desc: Deenas jazzkveld med med kostymer er så vidt over da hun planlegger enda mer familemoro med matchende skjorter. Angelina inviterer den nye kjæresten på ferie.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Divorce Party
programme.desc: Angelinas nye mann ankommer akkurat til skilsmissefesten hennes. Snooki brenner bryllupskjolen til Ang. Pauly tar med alle til det mest hjemsøkte huset noensinne.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Meiji Kinenkan is the oldest bridal hall in Japan undergoing an upgrade to celebrate its 50th anniversary. This includes the addition of a Chinese restaurant and its new grand chef.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chef Chen stirs up his best yogurt presentation against Challenger Junichi Ito.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chef Morimoto battles with Challenger Tsuyoshi Kajimoto as they innovate with abalone, a shellfish.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The Iron Chef is called upon to face Miyoko Sakai, a famed Thai food critic who has had the privilege to learn the secrets of royal Thai cuisine straight from the source.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chef Morimoto faces another traditionalist who is infamous for his temper, his steadfast discipline and his adherence to tradition.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The challenger in this battle of peach is Masanobu Watabe, owner of Le Rameau d'Or in Yokohama, Japan. Watabe runs the entire 22-seat restaurant by himself.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCIV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' tar Rob, Steelo og gjest Carly Aquilino trappene med barn som gjør noen 'Mini-feilsteg', tester senger med 'Madrassprøving' og lokaliserer alle de løse skruene i 'Oppussingsanger'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XL
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' avdekker Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood farene med døråpninger i 'Dørdengt' før de drar til havs på 'Kræsjcruise' og avslutter med noen mestere i forkledning i 'Bykamuflasje'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' slåss Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino mot vinden i 'Aggressiv luft', sliter med spisepinnene i 'Fomlepinner' og viser fram rare evner i 'Ferdigheter er ferdigheter'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' ser Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino nærmere på utsatte besteforeldre i 'Barnebarnskader', får ødelagt humøret av 'Stemningssenkere' og har det gøy med litt 'Landsens avslapping'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' tar Rob, Steelo og Karrueche Tran sjansen på å ta seg en lur i 'Blottlagte blunder', finner nye bruksområder i tillegg til hockey i 'Nyttekøller' og får seg en trøkk fra oven med 'Takattakk'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino seg en kakk i hodet når de er 'Uten høydebevissthet', får multitaskingeksamen ved 'Simultankapasitets-universitetet og betrakter barn som dras i 'Hunder med barneslep'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' blir Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino litt konkurransesugne i 'Utilsiktede hjulskader', opplever T-banekaos på 'Ville tog' og morer seg stort med 'Skjelettkompiser'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' forårsaker Rob, Steelo og Karrueche Tran alvorlige skader når de spiller 'Hjemmegolf', møter bygningsarbeidere som morer seg med 'Jobbskøyere' og blir vitner til vindens kraft i 'Tatt av vinden'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' deltar Rob, Steelo og Karrueche Tran i timen med 'Forelesningssabotører', stopper hjorter som foretar 'Bukkattakk' og flipper helt når de får seg en 'Turntrøkk'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' sklir Rob, Steelo og gjest Karrueche Tran rundt i gatene fordi de er 'Dårlig til å drifte', tar seg litt snacks med folk som liker å 'Småspise i alle situasjoner' og holder festen i gang med 'Bursdagsbomber'.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Risk-All Point
programme.desc: Et kraftigere Andromeda-skip eksploderer på grunn av sannsynlig sabotasje, og tvinger Dylans mannskap til å redde dem.

programme.title: Andromeda: Den rette hesten
programme.desc: Beka setter både mannskapet og en hel planet i fare når en tidligere kjærlighet dukker opp.

programme.title: Andromeda: Hva skjer med en revidert utsatt?
programme.desc: Andromeda mottar et rop om hjelp fra pastor Bam.

programme.title: Andromeda: Spydspunktet
programme.desc: Etter at en Commonwealth-planet er angrepet av pyriske pyroformere, blir Dylan tvunget til å kjempe for å beskytte den nye planeten.

programme.title: Andromeda: Himmelhvelvet
programme.desc: Dylan hører stemmer som tilsier ham til en planet med 'ild og is'.

programme.title: Andromeda: Deep Midnight's Voice
programme.desc: Mens han er fanget i en kamp mellom to Nietzschean-stolthetspunkter, fanger mannskapet en fiendtlig som hevder at stoltheten hans har et kart over slipstream.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Private Thoughts
programme.desc: Firefighters find an entire family dead inside their home in an apparent murder-suicide, but there are several inconsistent clues in the rubble. Could ballistics, a time card and some secret audiotapes unravel the mystery?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair of the Dog
programme.desc: Investigators are baffled after finding a murder scene devoid of any physical evidence, but they suspect that the victim's dog had witnessed the crime. If so, forensic scientists would have to find some way to learn what the dog had seen.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Breaking News
programme.desc: A young TV news producer is raped and murdered in her apartment. Police identify two suspects, but both are cleared of any wrongdoing. When the case stalls for more than a year, investigators turn to the Commonwealth of Virginia's DNA Databank.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All the World's a Stage
programme.desc: Police are dispatched to the scene of a shooting and discover the victim's husband is one of their own: a homicide detective who says his wife accidentally shot herself in the head.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Big Chill
programme.desc: For years, a woman suffered from what appeared to be the unpleasant side effects of lithium, a drug prescribed to treat bipolar disorder. When she died, investigators had to determine if her death was due to natural causes, suicide or murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bound for Jail
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in a ravine, and crucial evidence has been washed away by severe thunderstorms. Twice, the trail turns cold. Almost 20 years later, an old hat and a chip of stainless steel brings the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sphere of Influence
programme.desc: When an 11-year-old girl disappears from a remote Alaska town, investigators wonder if she has been attacked by a bear or become lost in the dense woods. Eventually, they realize that neither assumption is true.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nailed
programme.desc: Just weeks before a witness is to testify against the man accused of sexually assaulting her, she is murdered in the front yard of her own home. Investigators immediately suspect her attacker, but they don't have enough evidence to prove his guilt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Zodiac
programme.desc: For six years, a serial killer prowled the streets of New York City. He wrote letters to police and The New York Post, indicating he would kill twelve people — one for each astrological sign.

programme.title: Forensic Files: True Lies
programme.desc: In the summer of 1986, Kathleen Lipscomb's body was found on a deserted road outside of San Antonio. Months and years passed, but the crime was never solved. Finally, a private investigator discovered Kathleen's diary.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 2
programme.desc: This episode includes: Bermuda Triangle, Prison Mom & UD, Heck He's Gone & UD and Scare Tactics.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 3
programme.desc: This episode includes: Ladies Man & UD, Dr. Rapist & UD, Interstate Disappearance & UD and One Minute Million.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 4
programme.desc: This episode includes: The Man Who Knew Too Much, Update: Sweetheart Swindler, Dark Dante & UD and The Promise & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 5
programme.desc: This episode includes: Freedon, Update: Mental Daze, Down & Out, Nazi War Treasure and Sweetheart Escape & Update.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 6
programme.desc: This episode includes: Real Twin Peaks & UD, Update: Baby Broker, Twins, Mary and Martha & UD and Serial Child Molester & UD.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Moving Target
programme.desc: When a sniper in Utah started targeting African-American men for death, authorities launched a massive investigation. With scant clues and no witnesses they found the odds stacked against them, and they had no idea where the killer would strike next.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Backstage Murder
programme.desc: In the 1980's, two partners created a nightclub that would bring them wealth and international fame. The male strip club phenomenon promised female patrons fun and excitement. But the bright lights hid a dark side.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Stranger
programme.desc: The body of a young woman found burned in a truck launched a manhunt to find her killer. When more bodies began to turn up across the country, the FBI believed the cases were linked. Investigators had a suspect. They just couldn't find him.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Manhunt
programme.desc: A killer was on the loose in one of America's most popular tourist destinations. Armed and desperate, he evaded law enforcement at every turn. As the Fourth of July weekend quickly approached, thousands of people became potential targets.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Crazy Don
programme.desc: To the FBI, he was believed to be the boss of New York's most powerful mafia organizationthe Genovese crime family. Was Gigante crazy or was his behavior a shrewd attempt to disguise his position as a ruthless mafia boss?

programme.title: The New Detectives: Price of Murder
programme.desc: Using science as their most powerful weapon, investigators must find these hired killers and make them pay the true price of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Critical Evidence
programme.desc: To the astute detective and forensic specialist, the biggest clues often hide in plain sight, and what seems trivial to some is in reality Critical Evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Predators and Parasites
programme.desc: For the forensic entomologist, the insects that nest in dead bodies are like tiny witnesses to a crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Military Justice
programme.desc: The Naval Criminal Investigative Service uses forensic science to solve three perplexing murders and fulfill their motto: "To the living we owe respect; to the dead, we owe the truth."

programme.title: The New Detectives: Bodies of Evidence
programme.desc: It is difficult to convict a murderer if the body can't be found. But forensic science is finding ways to do it. Devious killers can think up many was to dispose of their victim's remains, but they are often no matches for investigators.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: In a church reborn as a gym, something old still lingers in the shadows. Sean and Bex investigate Dream Body Gym inside the former Manor Church — where whispers echo through stairwells, music box melodies drift through empty rooms.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: Deep in the woods on the outskirts of Liverpool lie the crumbling remains of a forgotten gatehouse — and the land surrounding it is said to be cursed. As Sean and Bex begin their nighttime investigation, unsettling activity begins to unfold.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: Sean and Bex head to one of Leeds’ oldest public libraries, where the silence hides more than just books. Reports of shadow figures, unexplained voices, and a terrifying presence in the basement have kept rumours alive for decades.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: In the first of a five-part investigation inside the historic Greenfield Valley Heritage Park, the team explores the eerie ruins of the old mills. Known for reports of ghostly children, unexplained footsteps, and phantom knocks on stone walls.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: As the team delves deeper into the Valley Mills, subtle sounds begin to stir the silence—unheard by the cameras, but felt by those present. A chilling metallic swing echoes through the empty building with no visible source.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: In this chilling third part of our Greenfield Valley investigation, we continue deep within the historic mills—where echoes of the past seem to come alive. With intense K2 meter spikes, disembodied footsteps and unexplained sounds.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: This Should Be Explosive...
programme.desc: Katrina believes her sister Kendra’s boyfriend is a cheater and having sex with her best friend Nay-Nay! Later, John returns to the stage with a shocking update!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Do You Need a Medic or Are You Guilty?
programme.desc: Michelle needs answers about who hurt her daughter. She will stop at nothing to protect her baby. Will the father James clear his name on Steve's stage?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: DNA: Don't Run From the Results
programme.desc: Roberta suspects that her husband Bryan has been cheating. They both believe the other is cheating. Find out whether these men are really the father on today's Steve Wilkos!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: He Said Give Your Baby Away and You Did
programme.desc: Shannan claims Tim fathered her child. He doesn't buy it because he doesn't recall having sex with her! Later, Ayana is furious that her boyfriend Patrick denies their son!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I'm a Survivor, but I Can't Take This
programme.desc: Is Khadisa's boyfriend Chad cheating on her with her own sister? Will Maya's ex trust her and her current beau with their infant son?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Your Kids Need Their Mom, But You Chose Him
programme.desc: Will Nadia and Woody's lie detector test results prove that they were negligent and deserved to lose custody of their children? Then, can Steve set the record straight about Josette's daughter?

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: We Kill the Ones We Love
programme.desc: A drive-by shooting leaves Van Terry dead; to crack the case, Lt. Joe Kenda must put his faith… in a burglar.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Nine-Year-Old Hostage
programme.desc: A hostage situation puts Sgt. Joe Kenda and his team to the test, as they try to save a family without getting shot themselves.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Door No. 12
programme.desc: Neighbors are stunned when close friends Louis Matos and Colleen Johnson are gunned down for no apparent reason. The case kicks into high gear when Lt Joe Kenda locates a panic-stricken eyewitness.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Powder Kegs
programme.desc: When uninvited guests crash a barrio birthday party, violence erupts—leaving Enrique Urrutia dead and potentially sparking a gang war.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Confession
programme.desc: After a husband and wife are viciously attacked in their own home, Kenda is on the hunt for a troubled teen whose appetite for violence knows no bounds.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Joker In the Pack
programme.desc: A card game is interrupted by gunfire, leaving a young man dead. Lt. Joe Kenda soon learns the seeds of his destruction were sewn earlier the same day.

programme.title: CIA Declassified
programme.desc: In the year 2000, the bombers of USS Cole in the Yemen port of Aden were found but the leadership remained elusive. After 9/11, Al Qaeda escalated attacks; the godfather of terror was revealed. His use of a satphone located him; he was killed by a drone.

programme.title: CIA Declassified
programme.desc: In 1959, Fidel Castro is a growing threat to the U.S. It’s decided he should be terminated. But who can do it? This is the true story of how the CIA turned his lover into a deadly assassin and sent her on a mission to kill their formidable enemy.

programme.title: CIA Declassified
programme.desc: America is at its knees as the infamous US Embassy Hostage crisis begins, but then the CIA discovers that six diplomats have secretly escaped. When they recruit in their ace ‘rescue’ agent Tony Mendez to get them out, he devises a ‘Hollywood’-based plan

programme.title: CIA Declassified
programme.desc: The true story of how CIA Director William Casey allegedly sanctioned an off-the-books assassination attempt on Sheikh Mohammed Fadlallah in Beirut. Casey was convinced Fadlallah was the head of Hezbollah and behind a series of terrorist attacks.

programme.title: CIA Declassified
programme.desc: The CIA’s hunt for Osama bin Laden is a story we think we know. Yet the movies don’t tell us everything. With testimony from those directly involved from the start, we reveal the de-classified truth behind the 15-year manhunt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crash Course
programme.desc: A highway patrolman was dispatched to what he thought would be a routine traffic accident — until he looked in the car. He had seen hundreds of accidents, but none with as much blood as this.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Grisly Murders of Jack the Ripper
programme.desc: Ryan and Shane take a look at the clues to the identity of one of history's most infamous serial killers.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Thrilling Gardner Museum Heist / The Ghastly Cleveland Torso Murders
programme.desc: Ryan and Shane examine America's biggest property crime and explore the case of the Cleveland Torso Murderer.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Enigmatic Death of the Isdal Woman
programme.desc: Join Ryan and Shane as they unravel the untold secrets involved in the disturbing murder of the Isdal Woman.

programme.title: Celebrity Ghost Stories (Classics): Joan Rivers, David Carradine, Scott Baio, Teri Polo
programme.desc: Joan Rivers asks a voodoo priestess to help her with an angry ghost.

programme.title: Celebrity Ghost Stories (Classics): Barry Williams, Debi Mazar, Greg Grunberg, Sammy Hagar
programme.desc: When Barry Williams holds a memorial service for his father, a few strange "happenings" make the day even more unforgettable; Debi Mazer gets a hostile welcome from a ghost when she moves into a friend's home.

programme.title: Celebrity Ghost Stories (Classics): Carrie Fisher, Rue McClanahan, John Waters, Federico Castelluccio
programme.desc: Carrie Fisher has a spooky experience after her best friend dies in her bed; John Waters still remembers a scary night in the woods back in the 1950s.

programme.title: Mutant X: Age of Innocence
programme.desc: Mutant X avdekker et gammelt militært eksperiment som involverer et aldersreverseringsserum og er overrasket over å oppdage at bestefaren til Jesse er en av testpersonene.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Fire in the Sky
programme.desc: Mens Sydney holder foredrag om indianerne som møtte en mystisk katastrofe 600 år tidligere, gir en innfødt henne en relikvie fra den tiden. Hva er hemmeligheten?

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Hunting with the Enemy
programme.desc: En urn bestilt i et kambodsjansk kloster av den kinesiske keiseren for restene av Confucius er i ferd med å bli ødelagt av den systematiske bombingen av en hel provins.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Under the Ice
programme.desc: Til tross for forferdelig vær, drar Sidney Nigel med til en arktisk base hvor en gammel indisk mamma er funnet, som viser seg å være en Anasazi.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Antianeirai
programme.desc: Sydney og Nigel reiser til Istanbul for å undersøke dødsfallet til en av Sydneys venner, en professor som prøvde å bevise at Hercules eksisterte ved å finne Hippolytebeltet.

programme.title: Andromeda: Himmelhvelvet
programme.desc: Dylan hører stemmer som tilsier ham til en planet med 'ild og is'.

programme.title: CBS News 24/7
programme.desc: Coverage, reporting and storytelling from CBS News and Stations; a look at how news coverage comes together.

programme.title: The Takeout with Major Garrett
programme.desc: The Takeout is a new spin on the widely acclaimed podcast hosted by Major Garrett; a daily streaming show that harnesses the best of CBS News' political reporting and lives comfortably in deep discussions.

programme.title: The Daily Report
programme.desc: The Daily Report on CBS News features original interviews and insights on the most important, urgent and interesting stories of the day.

programme.title: 24/7 Primetime
programme.desc: 24/7 Primetime is your essential daily guide to all the stories shaping your world. Anchored by CBS News' Elizabeth Cook, the show delivers the news you need to know.

programme.title: On the Case: Eyes of a Killer
programme.desc: Eyewitnesses helplessly watch as a 19-year-old clerk is abducted from a Del Ray Beach convenience store.

programme.title: On the Case: Taken
programme.desc: In the span of 8 months, 3 young girls are kidnapped from their homes and murdered. When their killer strikes again a young girl's heroic actions solves the case.

programme.title: On the Case: A Deadly Omen

programme.title: On the Case: Path of Destruction
programme.desc: When a 14 year old girl is murdered detectives must solve several terrifying crimes before they can bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: On the Case: Twisted Lies

programme.title: On the Case: The Day After Christmas

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: A Tale of Two Pilots
programme.desc: Weighed down by the responsibility of training a new rampie, and struggling to get out of Joe's doghouse, DC-3 co-pilot Tyler gets a once in a lifetime opportunity to stunt fly in his Cessna 150 for a visiting film crew.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Ice Jam

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: A Very Buffalo Christmas

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Crash Landing
programme.desc: Just months from retiring, Electra captain Ray Weber leads his crew on a multi-trip mission that requires landing on a rough ice strip on a remote lake.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: For Sale By Owner
programme.desc: When South Korean buyers come to Buffalo to look at a water bomber, the pressure is on mechanic Cory to get the plane ready. But a landing gear emergency puts him and chief pilot Justin in serious danger.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Over Seas
programme.desc: Buffalo has to get a CL-215 water bomber to buyers in Korea. So Justin and Cory fly the plane to Vancouver Harbour, where it will be hoisted onto a cargo ship sailing across the Pacific Ocean to its destination a method of delivery no one has ever tried.

programme.title: Hitler and I: Reflections on Evil
programme.desc: An in-depth, behind-the-scenes exploration of the making of the miniseries "Hitler: The Rise of Evil."

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The Arajs Kommando
programme.desc: Viktor Arajs, a Latvian, played a significant role in the Holocaust, collaborating with the Nazis to eliminate Jews. Leading the Arajs Kommando, he orchestrated the killings of around 30,000 Jews. Arajs justified his actions as patriotic defense.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The IRA Conspiracy
programme.desc: During WWII, the IRA's "S Plan" aimed to bomb Britain, drawing German support to weaken the British. "Operation Green" and "Plan Kathleen" envisioned IRA aiding a German invasion of Northern Ireland, but both failed due to bungling and infighting.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The Good Collaborators?
programme.desc: Finland defended itself in the Winter War under Marshal Mannerheim. Finland allied with Nazi Germany against the Soviet Union in 1941. Finland later negotiated peace with the Allies and switched sides as Nazi defeat became apparent.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: iCarly: A date en pøbel del 1
programme.desc: Når Carly dater er en tøffing, prøver hun å holde forholdet skjult for Spencer. Og Sam betaler Freddie for å lage en hjemmeside der hun kan legge ut alle sine ekle videofavoritter.

programme.title: iCarly: Gjenforening med Missy
programme.desc: Da Carlys gamle venninne Missy flytter tilbake til Seattle, tror Sam at Missy prøver å skifte henne ut som Carlys bestevenninne.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg må ha skap 239
programme.desc: Når Sam og Freddie begge to vinner konkurransen for skolens beste skap, slir de nødt til å dele skap. Carly ber Spencer gi henne timer i billedkunst.

programme.title: iCarly: iCarly utdelingen
programme.desc: Carly, Sam og Freddie holder en iCarly-galla for de beste bruker-bidragene i iCarly, og hyller pristagerne live på web-showet. Spencer verver europeiske badedraktmodeller for å hjelpe ham å lage premiestatuettene.

programme.title: iCarly: Tvillinger
programme.desc: Freddie prøver å bevise at Melanie, Sams tvillingesøster, er Sam i forkledning. Når Carly underviser Spencers nemesis, Chuck, prøver Spencer å overbevise henne om at Chuck er ond.

programme.title: iCarly: A date en pøbel del 2
programme.desc: Når Carly oppdager at hennes tøffe kjæreste Griffin samler på små Pee Wee Babies, må hun ta stilling til om hun holder ut å date en kar som har en kosedyrsamling. I mens forsøker Spencer å hjelpe Sam med å bli kvitt et mareritt.

programme.title: iCarly: iKamp mot Dingo
programme.desc: Dingo-kanalen har stjålet idéer fra iCarly, så Carly, Sam, Freddie og Spencer drar til Dingos Studio for å fortelle manusforfatterne hva de mener om det.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg tror de kysset
programme.desc: Da Sam kommer til å avsløre overfor Carly at hun og Freddie smugkysset, konfronterer Carly dem med hvorfor de ikke fortalte henne om det. Og Spencer underviser fanger i billedkunst i fengselet.

programme.title: iCarly: Kokkekamp
programme.desc: Når Carl, Sam og Freddie vinner over en berømt tv-kokk i en matlagningskonkurranse, vil ikke kokken lage mat mer og nekter å komme ut av soverommet sitt. Spencer prøver å oppfylle en fremtidsdrøm.

programme.title: iCarly: Rektor kampen
programme.desc: Når Carly, Sam og Freddie får rektor Franklin sparket, overtar miss Briggs og mr. Howard ledelsen og innfører strenge regler. Og Spencer leier en gammel rodeostjerne til å lære ham å ri på en mekanisk okse.

programme.title: iCarly: iSpeed Date
programme.desc: Så mange gutter dukker opp til 'ta Carly med på fest'-konkurransen, at Carly, Sam og Freddie må benytte speed-dating for å møte dem alle sammen. Spencer følger et merkelig treningsprogram fra en ny app.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Christmas Cheers
programme.desc: Julaften blir en trist affære i baren etter at Rebecca ber alle om å jobbe sent.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Woody for Hire Meets Norman of the Apes
programme.desc: Woody prøver å overbevise vennene sine om at han har fått en rolle i en TV-serie.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Suspicious Minds
programme.desc: Jealousy gets the best of Sabrina when Harvey and Libby are paired together for a school project.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Pom-Pom Incident
programme.desc: Sabrina's good intentions go bad when she prevents Valerie from trying out for the cheerleading squad.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Pancake Madness
programme.desc: An addiction to pancakes threatens to send Sabrina’s life spinning out of control.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Good Will Haunting
programme.desc: Halloween turns truly frightful when a demented doll takes charge of the festivities.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: You Bet Your Family
programme.desc: Salem’s gambling debts get the best of him, but its Sabrina and her aunts who pay the price.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: And The Sabrina Goes To
programme.desc: A spell to get her just desserts leaves Sabrina with egg on her face instead.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Nobody Nose * Libby Like Sabrina Knows * Libby
programme.desc: An out-of-control magic spaceship lands Sabrina and Salem inside Libby’s brain.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina and The Beast
programme.desc: In order to teach Sabrina a lesson about love and beauty, Harvey is turned into a beast.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Christmas Amnesia
programme.desc: It’s beginning to look a lot like Christmas until Sabrina accidentally erases the holiday

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Whose So-Called Life is it Anyway?
programme.desc: Sabrina’s charitable magic turns out to be anything but a good deed.

programme.title: Fem i familien: The Fugitive, Part 1
programme.desc: Elyse's younger brother and Alex's idol, Ned, makes a surprise visit. However, everyone is puzzled by the go-getter corporate executive's suspicious behavior.

programme.title: Fem i familien: The Fugitive, Part 2
programme.desc: With the FBI hot on Ned's heels for embezzling 4.5 million dollars in corporate funds, Elyse's ethical brother and Alex's idol tells the family why and where he hid the money.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Margin Of Error
programme.desc: Alex amasses a bundle by playing the stock market on paper for his economics class, and courts disaster by secretly investing his father's money.

programme.title: Fem i familien: French Lessons
programme.desc: Mallory's handsome but shy French tutor, Jeff, finally musters up the nerve to ask her out and then courts disaster by enlisting Alex's advice on how to behave on the date.

programme.title: Fem i familien: I Gotta Be Ming
programme.desc: As Big Brother to a 10-year-old Vietnamese boy, Alex tries to mold Ming into his own image, and he learns an unforgettable lesson when he breaks a promise to the adoring child.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Stage Fright
programme.desc: While gearing up to face the television cameras as captain of his high school's team on "Quiz-Em", Alex panics at first when a teammate drops out and then launches a tutoring program a la Eliza Doolittle for his sister Mallory.

programme.title: Fem i familien: The Fifth Wheel
programme.desc: Alex gets stuck babysitting for his little sister Jennifer, who is fed up with feeling in the way at his poker game and decides to disappear.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Tender is the Knight
programme.desc: When pretty Carrie Newman and her mother Julia come to visit the Keatons, Carrie's forward behavior sends Alex into a panic.

programme.title: Fem i familien: The Homecoming
programme.desc: When Mallory's boyfriend Jeff arrives home from college and wants to go steady, she's elated, but it's soon apparent that he's a little awed by the school and merely grasping at the familiar.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Aerobics Meltdown
programme.desc: Stan Lee har noen nye superhelter, og en gatesmart fyr mister sin street cred når han opplever en hjernefrysning. Og sist, men ikke minst, utvikler en mann en komplisert minnesanordning for å huske hvor han har parkert.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Obama College Years
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan befinner seg plutselig i en gjenoppføring av Borgerkrigen, Jesus møter en farlig hallik, og vi får en god titt på president Barack Obama de første årene på college.

programme.title: Key & Peele: MMMMMM
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan opptrer foran et oppstemt publikum, en trafikkreporter blir utsatt for turbulens i et helikopter og halvdelen av en R&B duo avslører sine sanne følelser for sin partner under en opptreden.

programme.title: Key & Peele: The Power of Wings
programme.desc: Inkluderer sketsjer der Keegan og Jordan avlytter hvite kvinner som elsker svarte menn, Wendell lager en musikkvideo og Kareem og Jahar går på treningssenteret.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Soul Food
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan diskuterer hvem som er mest svart, og å være den eneste svarte på en fest. Sketsjer inkluderer Tea Party som oppdager et nytt håp, hærens ververe som tenker annerledes, og Bobby McFerrin som duellerer mot Michael Winslow.

programme.title: Key & Peele: The 420 Special
programme.desc: Neil deGrasse Tyson slapper av hjemme, Keegan må bevare fatningen under et jobbintervju, en skredder får en klient med luft i magen, parkeringsvaktene diskuterer 'Game of Thrones' og en telefonselger prøver en ny strategi.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Terrorist Meeting
programme.desc: En gangster prøver desperat å bevise at han er gal, terrorister møtes for å planlegge sitt neste trekk og en sjalu storebror gjør familiemiddagen pinlig.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Bone Thugs And Homeless
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer en hund som plager en nyhetsreporter og Harriet Tubman som løper fritt omkring.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Landlord
programme.desc: I sesongfinalen vil president Obama behandles som alle andre, Jordan ser på en leilighet som er eid av en mistenksom utleier, og et par festfiksere som vil få gang i festen på en bar mitzvah.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Hollywood Sequel Doctor
programme.desc: Kileleking mellem to venner blir plutselig merkelig, forfattere brainstormer til 'Gremlins 2', to bøller mistenker vennen sin for å stjele og Keegan og Jordan diskuterer Afrika på en fest.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Biological Dad
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer et romvesen som lærer om kvinnelig anatomi, karer som prøver å overgå hverandre og møtet mellom de to siste mennesker på Jorden.

programme.title: Broad City: Florida
programme.desc: Abbi, Ilana, Eliot og Bobbi drar til Florida for å rydde ut av Grandma Esthers leilighet.

programme.title: Broad City: House Sitting
programme.desc: Abbi, Ilana, Jaime og Lincoln passer huset til Strands. Ilana og Lincoln definerer forholdet deres, og Abbi går på en Bumble-date med en mann fra fortiden hennes.

programme.title: Broad City: Bed Bugs
programme.desc: En fancy ny veske gir Abbi tillit under arbeidsledigheten. Ilana og Jaimé må ta tak i et uunngåelig New York City-mareritt.

programme.title: Broad City: Friendiversary
programme.desc: Jentenes 'Friendiversary' utvikler seg i en farlig retning når de blir vitne til noe forferdelig.

programme.title: Broad City: Stories
programme.desc: Abbi og Ilana farer fra toppen av Manhattan til bunnen for å feire Abbis 30-årsdag, og treffer på både gamle og nye venner på veien.

programme.title: Broad City: Shework and S**t Bucket
programme.desc: Ilana gir seg i kast med sin seneste mulighet til å tjene penger da hun en åpner et utendørs kontorlandskap for New Yorks røykere; Abbi konfronterer husverten sin da han nekter å modernisere sanitæranlegget hennes.

programme.title: Broad City: Bitcoin & the Missing Girl
programme.desc: Ilana besøker en gammel flamme for å få sin del av en Bitcoin-formue; Abbi glemmer klesvasken sin for første gang, og mister favorittgenseren sin.

programme.title: Broad City: Make the Space
programme.desc: Ilana oppdager en skremmende hemmelighet om Jaimé; Abbi prøver å avansere fra genserbretter til vinduskunstner på Anthropologie.

programme.title: Broad City: Artsy Fartsy
programme.desc: Abbi inviteres til et fancy kunstarrangement på MoMA; Ilana og Lincoln analyserer det første året de har vært sammen.

programme.title: Broad City: Lost and Found
programme.desc: Jentene møter Ilanas femtenmenning, som overlevde Holocaust, og tar ham med på en kjedelig brunch; Abbi prøver en ny look.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Strong Sister
programme.desc: Strong Sister magazine visits the station for an in-depth profile on Williams, and the deputies enforce Reno's six-foot rule for lap dances.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Wiegel's Dad Returns
programme.desc: While the deputies investigate Reno's Thai sex trade, Wiegel's long-lost father returns to reconnect with his daughter.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Junior Runs for Office

programme.title: RENO 911!: Undercover Acting Coach
programme.desc: Sergeant Clift, the LAPD's undercover acting coach, teaches the deputies the subtle art of theater.

programme.title: RENO 911!: The Parade
programme.desc: The Carson City Parade Float Contest brings out the deputies' competitive spirit.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Training Day

programme.title: RENO 911!: Extradition to Thailand!
programme.desc: Junior and Jones reap the benefits that come from extraditing a murderer, and Dangle and Rizzo receive a surprise crash course in surgery.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Digging with the Murderer
programme.desc: Dangle and Williams haggle with a serial killer to get him to reveal where he buried his victims.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Dangle's Murder Mystery, Pt. 1
programme.desc: Dangle invites the gang to a Reno's Sierra Historical Society dinner -- and a murder.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Dangle's Murder Mystery, Pt. 2
programme.desc: Who murdered Debbie Dangle, and how does her death tie into the deputies' sordid past?

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Wayne Brady & Tyrone Biggums's Fear Factor
programme.desc: Dave gives up his show to Wayne Brady, and Tyrone Biggums returns as a guest on "Fear Factor."

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Lil Jon on Lil Jon & Black Bush
programme.desc: Dave considers how recent events would have played out if President Bush were black; special guests Jamie Foxx, Lil John, and music from Outkast's Big Boi.

programme.desc: A blind white supremacist unleashes hate, and Dave unveils Nat King Cole's booty videos.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Tyrone Biggums at School & Wrap It Up Box
programme.desc: Crack addict Tyrone Biggums visits an elementary school.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Zapped & It's a Wonderful Chest
programme.desc: Dave screens his failed reality TV show and shares outtakes from "Roots."

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Reparations & NY Boobs

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Great Moments in Hookup History & Ask a Black Dude
programme.desc: With time running out, Martin Johnson has one last stab at glory: Ashley "Smashly" Evans.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Mad Real World & Ask a Gay Dude
programme.desc: Dave imagines a "Real World" season with an all-black cast and one super-white guy.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Real Movies & Wu-Tang Financial
programme.desc: Dave takes a realistic look at "Pretty Woman" and "The Matrix" and introduces the Wu-Tang Clan's new financial consulting firm.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Tyrone Biggums's Intervention & Racist Hollywood Animals
programme.desc: Tyrone mistakes an intervention for a crack sale, and "Frontline" covers racist animals.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Blackzilla & Playa Haters' Ball
programme.desc: Dave takes Japan by storm in the sci-fi adventure "Blackzilla," and America Undercover presents The Playa Haters' Ball.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Worst Best Man Speech
programme.desc: Daniel Tosh tar for seg alt det Internett har å tilby. I kveld byr han på en nettoppreisning for verdens verste forlover, lunsj med Harland Williams og så svarer Daniel på deres tweets.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Drunk Dunk
programme.desc: Daniel Tosh tar for seg alt det Internett har å tilby. I kveld byr han på Daniels popkorn-utfordring, Dizzy Dunks nettoppreisning og Tommy Chung er med i "Gress eller salvia?".

programme.title: Tosh.0: Skateboard Girl
programme.desc: Daniel Tosh tar for seg alt det Internett har å tilby. I kveld byr han på videosvar fra popkornutfordringen, skateboard-jentas nettoppreisning og et tilbakeblikk på de ti første episodene.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Tron Guy

programme.desc: Daniel Tosh tar for seg alt det Internett har å tilby. I kveld byr han på en ny fetisj fra Adultcon, Old Lee skal lese opp Miley Cyrus-tweeter, og hagebryteren får sin nettoppreisning.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Crying Giants Fan
programme.desc: Daniel Tosh tar for seg alt det Internett har å tilby. I kveld får den gråtende Giants-fansen sin nettoppreisning, strippere tar til stangen og havner på gulvet, og David Letterman er inspirasjonen bak en flash mob.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Nintendo 64 Kid

programme.title: Tosh.0: November 12, 2009 - Ladder Fail Guy

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline stumbles across Richard's (Malcolm Gets) divorce papers in his desk drawer, but an office mishap sends her on a frantic paper chase to retrieve the documents after they are lost in the interoffice mail.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Tired of losing acting roles to other, more well-endowed women, Annie (Amy Pietz) surprises the gang on Thanksgiving Day by announcing that she plans to get breast implants.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Richard gets an offer that his empty bank account can't refuse: his Aunt Frieda promises to give him $5,000 as a Bar Mitzvah gift if he agrees to finally go through the ceremony.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Richard (Malcolm Gets) agrees to let Reg become a houseguest after the cartoonist has a fight with his girlfriend, Wanda.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline (Lea Thompson) and Del (Eric Lutes) experience mixed results when they become office mentors to a young cartoonist with an overactive libido and an eager marketing student.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline (Lea Thompson) tries to take Charlie (guest star Andy Lauer) under her wing and teach him the fundamentals of life after Del (Eric Lutes) is forced to fire the hapless in-line skater from his job at the greeting card company.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline (Lea Thompson) tries to right an old wrong by giving up a romantic weekend in Boston with Richard (Malcolm Gets) to help out a visiting childhood chum, Joanie (guest star Kelly Coffield), whom Caroline once bullied in school.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline (Lea Thompson) and the gang visit Caroline's family home in Pestigo, Wisconsin, but the homecoming is ruined when her parents tell Caroline that they are selling the house.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline (Lea Thompson) gives Richard(Malcolm Gets) a 7 p.m. deadline to make a marital commitment to her, then is coerced into spending the day making pottery with Del (Eric Lutes) and Annie (Amy Pietz) while she anxiously awaits his decision.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: After deciding they can't wait to get married, Caroline (Lea Thompson) and Richard (Malcolm Gets) plan their nuptials for the following week.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Hilarious sparks fly when Tony tries to fix up his divorced sister with Alex. Instead, she ends up falling for Reverend Jim and Tony goes outrageously overboard trying to break up the affair.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Lecherous Louie the dispatcher has the dubious honor of being selected by his employer’s revenge-seeking wife to be her clandestine lover, and comedic panic grips the love lair when the boss shows up unexpectedly.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Wild and crazy theatrics erupt when Tony decides to become an actor and Bobby, as his skeptical agent, is aghast when Tony lands a role because he is the right type.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby’s vicious letter to a hated critic is salvaged from the wastebasket and sent to the newspaper by a gleeful Louie, setting the stage for a wild and comical night when the critic, and the cabbies, decide to take in Bobby’s one-man play.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When Latka Gravas is rejected by a young beauty, he sets out on an uproarious crash course to learn to be a swinging American Bachelor, a turnabout that works fantastically with the girls but turns off all of his friends at the garage.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Jim turns into a soothsayer when he warns of a bizarre catastrophe to befall Alex that also involves an affair with a beautiful blonde.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The taxi gang hits the bricks in a hilarious hunt for new jobs when the Sunshine Cab. Co. goes out of business, with the promise that they will meet at Mario’s in one month to review their experiences.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies discover that life on the outside is not so rosy when the Sunshine Cab Co. shuts down. They all end up hilariously assuming new careers.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie turns into a jealous romantic when his overtures to accompany Elaine on her European vacation are rejected. Instead, Alex becomes the pretty cabbie's holiday companion on a tour of Europe's hot spots—culminating in a romantic rendezvous.

programme.desc: Becker bores a bartender with a story about his ex-wife's wedding.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Reggie decides to help Jake fulfill some of the dreams he had as a child, with disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Dr. John Becker's laundry, apartment, and mail have all been tampered with and he is sure the culprit is one of his pesky neighbors.

programme.title: Becker

programme.title: Becker
